name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z90ofa5rp2unocu9qbl3qvjan5v1fnukbcu7lp0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cjh62o31cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ee11j2li7k7ivgkip625vuc96t9d9i3qj908s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cjh62o31cdh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn01c1apahs8ugkh8sft5r6rblkueahocln9mjfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cjh62o31cdh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4ol5sbep2rl8trj4mvn7vab1bqhnfq968eocmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cjh62o31cdh2bs)
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4c6aol6r38tv69aegsa33lro5b8i6t12k1tr52g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cjh62o31cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c1jm2p30s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpcfaqebki6ds2422ungea474g16qbvrsj20uuko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0cjh62o31cdh2bs)_

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NrByRvR7vjbQ-R8_axdMRA~~/AARclBA~/X6UnZ8HUHAHpq0CpQI4pQTROttIqY6s80_J2LSMAxoqKvvsccKPuBg-CO-Mxzm9k2yeyRqED457UWvPvqF5kVXVVk5Q3IZ5lrzk2-AnUNBs4J7gZ7ozqo32Bj3XJ-eRr1CY2JxfUzM_ltUCXU8snhXPAMtmMpUAYAEf9mfWGOgRNfPiPACYAJTziBNZpJAufYMYUiP6HxXlokzablNASy0r43I1E9_U8wgDIMNNUuq38gZ-Wyp8dx0Ex-oY8NMvltI0gOEL8cnjJ8K29R_xSXhfSinzUsBTMDAX27Pjy0cgl2BnbourMGOlPPzo5IQZuXlojuMaXtJn4ZACFrFaLNM9PGfZ3fv9ologY-e_PV-ico4O2ifuAHFmm0WU3mxATK1DBQwNDBotTuZlyumDUqZ6JtNtRalZSKtohgC49BFM~)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

clean_body: But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges | | | ~ My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | ~ Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. ~ ~ I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA ~ | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9_WMkUpvw5hzhj30ciMahg~~/AARclBA~/XYdOO8TQrT4ja6xDljZMJ1GFfj7nwFIsZ-iczLMuGEPfdPLtwRrTHfCdbaNteu2ZpuHx2U4XfvzWz40qqJx0bL3PwtPjovqcY77BxLt_4Zgtsw9_9INzgK0FZpTLbQTmCfuWZc5aauztEKCIKERGvpWlxf6wEgz1-ODCrWQAT7lYqFcLJCEYrUL1TQgMvXI7cUR8FNVT3U9ci6j9ktpU6wljuGm5cvFymB0IKhT1pohKB8dAe73AWwl5QYVsGgjQMq4zmDUlbxdKXHmXr-PClpfev4TByPl2_jCBHqiMha4TqLca26trKgvyOYi0B3Ley6q_A27CTFRDyDwB13tw_5GiFqnrb_HwPn8GZc-i9uo~) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9_WMkUpvw5hzhj30ciMahg~~/AARclBA~/XYdOO8TQrT4ja6xDljZMJ1GFfj7nwFIsZ-iczLMuGEPfdPLtwRrTHfCdbaNteu2ZpuHx2U4XfvzWz40qqJx0bL3PwtPjovqcY77BxLt_4Zgtsw9_9INzgK0FZpTLbQTmCfuWZc5aauztEKCIKERGvpWlxf6wEgz1-ODCrWQAT7lYqFcLJCEYrUL1TQgMvXI7cUR8FNVT3U9ci6j9ktpU6wljuGm5cvFymB0IKhT1pohKB8dAe73AWwl5QYVsGgjQMq4zmDUlbxdKXHmXr-PClpfev4TByPl2_jCBHqiMha4TqLca26trKgvyOYi0B3Ley6q_A27CTFRDyDwB13tw_5GiFqnrb_HwPn8GZc-i9uo~) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9_WMkUpvw5hzhj30ciMahg~~/AARclBA~/XYdOO8TQrT4ja6xDljZMJ1GFfj7nwFIsZ-iczLMuGEPfdPLtwRrTHfCdbaNteu2ZpuHx2U4XfvzWz40qqJx0bL3PwtPjovqcY77BxLt_4Zgtsw9_9INzgK0FZpTLbQTmCfuWZc5aauztEKCIKERGvpWlxf6wEgz1-ODCrWQAT7lYqFcLJCEYrUL1TQgMvXI7cUR8FNVT3U9ci6j9ktpU6wljuGm5cvFymB0IKhT1pohKB8dAe73AWwl5QYVsGgjQMq4zmDUlbxdKXHmXr-PClpfev4TByPl2_jCBHqiMha4TqLca26trKgvyOYi0B3Ley6q_A27CTFRDyDwB13tw_5GiFqnrb_HwPn8GZc-i9uo~). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9_WMkUpvw5hzhj30ciMahg~~/AARclBA~/XYdOO8TQrT4ja6xDljZMJ1GFfj7nwFIsZ-iczLMuGEPfdPLtwRrTHfCdbaNteu2ZpuHx2U4XfvzWz40qqJx0bL3PwtPjovqcY77BxLt_4Zgtsw9_9INzgK0FZpTLbQTmCfuWZc5aauztEKCIKERGvpWlxf6wEgz1-ODCrWQAT7lYqFcLJCEYrUL1TQgMvXI7cUR8FNVT3U9ci6j9ktpU6wljuGm5cvFymB0IKhT1pohKB8dAe73AWwl5QYVsGgjQMq4zmDUlbxdKXHmXr-PClpfev4TByPl2_jCBHqiMha4TqLca26trKgvyOYi0B3Ley6q_A27CTFRDyDwB13tw_5GiFqnrb_HwPn8GZc-i9uo~)** Best regards,

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~ Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. ~ One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m running for Governor of Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T325710b3-1f8b-4d2b-992d-3f849c588304/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, “We have a responsibility to ensure that everyone gets a fair shot in life.” That’s what my parents taught me growing up, and I’ve carried that lesson every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State. I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot. [If you’re with me, will you make a contribution of any amount today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97070391-4422-42c8-a832-d9207707adf0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m ready for this work. I’ve investigated radical extremist groups, taught civil rights and voting rights law, and I ran for Secretary of State to make sure government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted. Some people didn’t like that very much — but I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities. I’m running for Governor to truly make government work for everyone. We need transparent leadership, safe schools and neighborhoods, and good education and childcare. Every Michigander should be able to pay their bills, put food on the table, and take care of their families. [That’s what I’m ready to fight for as Michigan’s next Governor. Please, will you chip in $15 today to support this campaign and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teedb5116-3b4f-4e0b-86ed-555e1e7cea7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SPLIT A DONATION →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcad137e8-7955-4295-bd4d-29f977b6b29b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I love Michigan and I believe in our future. We’re tough, we work hard, and we never back down from a fight. Let’s make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, stay, and call home. I can’t do this without you. Working together, I know we can do all of this, and more. Let’s go. — Jocelyn Benson
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal polls and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64a37791-da66-4fc9-a895-ddc0fbb17139/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Flyover
subject: Zelensky Responds, Social Security Sheds Staff, and a Flying Car
body:
One day after an Oval Office blowup, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky [thanked President Trump and the American people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAURp8Gb1hwATsZGP7FW_61o3UTrmMaDBGQUPfpK3fv-unT0dH5uMwX9MHH-3_cyNYlzSDAcKG4gNmhD_usO2cXIiDVkZWjFmep4Ky71WqhFqlwPJ_AkBE0GDGomzZaojFXPXbeHjShBEgpJMhenhbnBMJVOofDQEwLcr6m3H8mH-tKS9jTm3J_S1sX7FrrszD1j8HEYGqt9ZFaiVh9ijG143XsKQfHYMqvUjxyrLxhZjB9U6BYHvvO64rxUXjNr-3JU-Rf3OHOcamU-UpYyfGNqPp4ZzB12bpn8yH4MoxMi_uGPvwK1b8CvS38BAAA__-n2GnF) Saturday but said Trump needs to stand “more firmly” behind Ukraine.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z8tq6zAQgOGnkXYxMyNFsRdaHAg-mybQC3RpFGlsq5Ev2GpM3r64--5_Pvg_L83FxRTH7uoGtrmdGgI6HkAdgJrgYno2WgbbMhMryRZPGipUVGnZW2e8rtCV5D1T5eEIhF5DeYSWjSm9jHbXQAEhAhIWWLYhgKMbhuCMYaGBQ8zTUnxNccw9t-k5PXgp_DTIZPuc51Wof4JqQfW2bUV_nznn5T52eyKofvt_ul7Pgmr18v56_qA9VfX6fUOhzgaB5GLDvMWU4mpOQkM3uJh-_fzX78PSTwAAAP__-pxUYA) | |
# Sunday, March 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1933, the blockbuster movie _King Kong_ opened to rave reviews at Radio City Music Hall in New York City, becoming one of America’s early iconic films. ([See Trailer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FqwzAQxvGnkbaY00mJ60FDoQQ6pENL6WjOOslWLUfBUez67Yu7d_0--MH_69JeKKZ47d9o8raE3CLg8QD6ANgyxbS1RrIN3qPX0ltVG2iUxsbIwR7JEdSNZxdch7pmBUZjwxQocE1ORrtroAGVAoWqUk-BGQg7xUynkxcGPMeS5-o7x2sZfEhbXvxcuTzJZIdSbnehnwWeBZ7Xda22_CiPzu__vlBxg9DnReiXz9c-vv_kcfwY5Wz5tsaU4v1UCwP9RDH9keW_xMXibwAAAP__S11UIw)). For years, people have used the million-dollar mark as an ideal figure for retirement savings, but can you really live on $1 million, plus Social Security benefits? In some states, the answer is a resounding yes. In others, well, don't bank it. [Check out this list](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp_GdIPsMeSncHEbutx2SzSxx2FWBiPsBPH2K7bf_vuOjs7XY3yQJFle_2lmV2MeUWMP2oLGMZCkY-ya4CIzsm3YmWun78bivWsm54l6bf3VR4sm3kLvKVpzi2xC7L23jbiTpq1GY7RB05pbDEETPk0IdLmw6jQHqXlrv7MsdeKYjvzhrfV5bpKbal2Lsv8UDgqHfd_bj5Q3JU-rVEpS6jlUOMy0rhxgyjtE2sDALClJXuDFtcCR3yALbFxl45mXCs8D3lCgVKqscGg2F9b9vJTLVXX6NZOkX4f6V5OPw58AAAD__-c2Zo4) of how long your money will last in each state. We're sponsored today by [Dr. Steven Gundry MD](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z8tq6zAQgOGnkXYxMyNFsRdaHAg-mybQC3RpFGlsq5Ev2GpM3r64--5_Pvg_L83FxRTH7uoGtrmdGgI6HkAdgJrgYno2WgbbMhMryRZPGipUVGnZW2e8rtCV5D1T5eEIhF5DeYSWjSm9jHbXQAEhAhIWWLYhgKMbhuCMYaGBQ8zTUnxNccw9t-k5PXgp_DTIZPuc51Wof4JqQfW2bUV_nznn5T52eyKofvt_ul7Pgmr18v56_qA9VfX6fUOhzgaB5GLDvMWU4mpOQkM3uJh-_fzX78PSTwAAAP__-pxUYA), offering nutritional advice in today's edition.
|
---
## Zelensky Thanks Trump, Asks for More
One day after an Oval Office blowup, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky [thanked President Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAURp8Gb1hwATsZGP7FW_61o3UTrmMaDBGQUPfpK3fv-unT0dH5uMwX9MHH-3_cyNYlzSDAcKG4gNmhD_usO2cXIiDVkZWjFmep4Ky71WqhFqlwPJ_AkBE0GDGomzZaojFXPXbeHjShBEgpJMhenhbnBMJVOofDQEwLcr6m3H8mH-tKS9jTm3J_S1sX7FrrszD1j8HEYGqt9ZFaiVh9ijG143XsKQfHYMqvUjxyrLxhZjB9U6BYHvvO64rxUXjNr-3JU-Rf3OHOcamU-UpYyfGNqPp4ZzB12bpn8yH4MoxMi_uGPvwK1b8CvS38BAAA__-n2GnF) for America's support, but he also said Trump needs to stand “more firmly” behind Ukraine. The posted remarks on X came after Zelensky refused to sign a proposed mineral deal with the U.S. that could have helped secure a ceasefire in the war between Ukraine and Russia. Zelensky [arrived in London on Saturday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u7CAUBOCnwR0WHGB3XVDcxt3eNqWF4eAl4cfCeC3n6SOnTzfSJ41G8_GcnibEkJf_JqFuvkzAQFEmKIPJmRDPSXZOe0RA0aHmd8kGLmCQ3Us_zGxBPpwyHLlCGLyyA-OeOeUHK1QX9NXGBAPOGQfe84d3jhmYuXPmdkMiGbrQSu0_S8jthT6e5Y21tyV1Ub9aWzci_hEYCYzHcfR5thmP7XIC4xUvKDU6AuM3Rszb13lSTFgXzPakuNeyosl021MKjc51D1vIC211TyvFbMueG1ZabTZ8kAJUV7VbjxBj2G53ItmSTIi_i9pfD701_AQAAP__PuJrcQ) ahead of a Sunday summit organized by British Prime Minister Keir Starmer with other European leaders. French President Emmanuel Macron and Prime Minister of Luxembourg Luc Frieden were among the [European leaders who defended ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAURp8GOwxcQH8Lir-xm223NFe4zrCDYBDHuE-_me23-5IvOTk5n7fphiGGdP_AlWxd8gQCDBeKC5g8hnhNuvF2IQJSDVnZazFIBYNuHlYp6Y2eB62Fm13X9-DRCWO86wwOxjTBvmlCCZBSSJCt_Ld4LxBm6T12HTEtyIeaS_uVQ6oPWuKVX1Ral9cm2ket287UfwYjg_E8z9bNe6Jzf_8MxvdkMNJR8kaYOMYYaOcFY7w4lnwkz49nwZCI13KsG_-mSGl_Xhd_YXLEV6Ia0p3B2BTrtzPEGPauZ1rcVwzx16P-1eVl4ScAAP__q99nsQ)the Ukranian president. Poland’s President Andrzej Duda, however, called on Zelensky to return to the negotiating table, arguing that only the U.S. is able to stop Russian aggression.
## Hackman, Wife Test Negative For Carbon Monoxide
Actor Gene Hackman and his wife, Betsy Arakawa, [both tested negative](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn-N6YzsMTihcHHSiS7XnE5XogkeYHaNHdlOEP9-le23_T7p6en9v0035MBx_YM7ubqkCRT0UhmpYPLI4Zy6xruFCMg05PSlU4M2MHTN5pT2lhQC2f56X6gf1MUO1g5KD-gN-obdm6aMAq2VBt3q6-K9Qrhr79FaEp0izzXl9iNxrBst4Uwvyu2c9ia4rdZHEeaXgFHAiPc50lHaNb1vAeO_v-_1WbeUuTIVWQjzvHFcJcZyUC4Sl0pZrhRJbjh_7hjlwQvJ_SyVMqdnCaeAsdSUT2FG9sL81nqAq9F912TnHweHwMVeRKfWHTl8q9WfUr0cfAUAAP__H-5sQg) for carbon monoxide, authorities revealed Friday. Both were found dead, alongside one of their dogs, at their home in Santa Fe, New Mexico on Wednesday. Hackman is believed to have died on Feb. 17. Santa Fe County Sheriff's Office authorities indicated that was the date of the last recorded "event" on his pacemaker. The two were found in separate rooms. Hackman, 95, [had lived in Santa Fe since the 1980s](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAQhZ8Gd2PB4N-CYht32XZLawxDzC4Gyybx5u2vEt32lkfn6JPO9-c23yjEkO6_aWNTfJ5RYgtSg8TZUYivuamc8czIumKj-kaOSuPYVKuRre1Rjo4bObbMVvW2Z-o6YouL174K5k2TWqJSUqGq1eCdk4SLco66jkUj2YWSj_pvDqms7OMrP_mobd6qaNZS9lPoXwIngdN1XfVJqZDnxNfG_4Ol9F4KnBJfp8ApZktx_g7nykfwHu6cGFay_zZKcAXP4PMjOXBMDkKCDxM8w5o3hpTfdYQ90gvOx7mzLewETnSUYCPPyDQMbUvgm2UApdjD0koFvUaNhEuLStdr2WJ1GLdfIcZwdr1o5H2jED_Pyk-mnwa_AgAA__8PSIH2) and married Arakawa, a classical pianist, 65, in 1991. Hackman, who retired in the early 2000s after a decades-long career that included roles as villains, heroes, and antiheroes, [kept a low profile](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQBb9G6mhwl--CxW3c-bYphbW4tJhQlCERdvz3gdOnPDjAYDAfl-lCpZZ2-08rx563CSUaIZWQOCUq9TXpMcXMjKxGjuC0DKAw6HGJaMBDCHDNVl-NMXYOOYHyDiBIR34s8U2TSiKABIQT-JySJLxCSmQtD1pyKn3bT59baX3hXF_bg_fTvK1jjUvv92NQ_wY8D3ime-Pn8b7eY-9lrjzg-caNxULz10pNHNQ6icyi8VOs_F3mTQAl9Mqb2VvwFjL6YMA66zRItC6Pe0z3Z6m1HNYNWt5WKvXXoP9V5BHxJwAA___urF9R) in the Rocky Mountain foothills town, long known as a refuge for famous actors and authors seeking to escape the spotlight.
## Social Security to Trim 7,000 Workers
The Social Security Administration announced plans on Friday [to cut 7,000 workers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdEbrtUNI4eI1dHntlWhjL2FPBkfYBPH3p1x_9Ugz0nzdxztJkvX5nxb2dcojAl40WA04RpJ0jq6JfmJGtg17c3VwMxZvrpm9NdceOwjG9ZO7WOyQiIJlE8hMHTwa8R8bWEBjwKBpTT_FCIQPEyN1HSsHHKXmrf3OstaZp3TmN29tyEuT_Fzrqyj7T-GgcDiOoz1pzvlDFQ4rH0XhsOuSg1DShcO-ST01xUVWKXWjKnnVYa8a0N0cQn9p57qkZvPxdUhKUrqrcvBcSNJvs_714O3xJwAA__8EUl5i) as part of the Trump administration's effort to slash the size of the federal workforce. The U.S. government agency, which sends checks to 73 million retired and disabled Americans each month, said the 12 percent reduction would trim staffing to 50,000 workers. The agency's workforce cuts come as the ranks of Americans receiving Social Security benefits [have swelled to an all-time high](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOszAUhJ_GdEbHlx9C4eLXruiSdkvky3E4WYMjbILy9iu233ZGM_r0fV2nq6VE6_1mFzQ15kmC_MdBcZBTsJTek26CiYgSVYNG9BoGoeSgm9m4qBCUH7xTqKG7RATsVOhdD1HrMDRkzjdQIIUAIUUrLjEEsNKJEGzXIdOAgWre2kemtc4Y0zu_cGt9Xppk5lqfhan_TI5MjsdxtN6VFY9y9kyOPqe82ZCZHM-UybFkTzbxgn7fqL65wxUj1cILbi_yWHjd9uXJMeWVL3v55o_suN_rOWZqpLV6Ckx9ftyuHIALsC6IudlMeB6UEpWuZxrui6X0C1n_kvYy8icAAP__Pl5wXg), largely due to the aging baby boomer population. An average of about 11,000 boomers are set to turn 65 each day this year through 2027.

clean_body: One day after an Oval Office blowup, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky Saturday but said Trump needs to stand “more firmly” behind Ukraine. | | | | | | Sunday, March 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1933, the blockbuster movie King Kong opened to rave reviews at Radio City Music Hall in New York City, becoming one of America’s early iconic films. (). For years, people have used the million-dollar mark as an ideal figure for retirement savings, but can you really live on $1 million, plus Social Security benefits? In some states, the answer is a resounding yes. In others, well, don't bank it. of how long your money will last in each state. We're sponsored today by , offering nutritional advice in today's edition. | Zelensky Thanks Trump, Asks for More One day after an Oval Office blowup, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky for America's support, but he also said Trump needs to stand “more firmly” behind Ukraine. The posted remarks on X came after Zelensky refused to sign a proposed mineral deal with the U.S. that could have helped secure a ceasefire in the war between Ukraine and Russia. Zelensky ahead of a Sunday summit organized by British Prime Minister Keir Starmer with other European leaders. French President Emmanuel Macron and Prime Minister of Luxembourg Luc Frieden were among the Ukranian president. Poland’s President Andrzej Duda, however, called on Zelensky to return to the negotiating table, arguing that only the U.S. is able to stop Russian aggression. Hackman, Wife Test Negative For Carbon Monoxide Actor Gene Hackman and his wife, Betsy Arakawa, for carbon monoxide, authorities revealed Friday. Both were found dead, alongside one of their dogs, at their home in Santa Fe, New Mexico on Wednesday. Hackman is believed to have died on Feb. 17. Santa Fe County Sheriff's Office authorities indicated that was the date of the last recorded "event" on his pacemaker. The two were found in separate rooms. Hackman, 95, and married Arakawa, a classical pianist, 65, in 1991. Hackman, who retired in the early 2000s after a decades-long career that included roles as villains, heroes, and antiheroes, in the Rocky Mountain foothills town, long known as a refuge for famous actors and authors seeking to escape the spotlight. Social Security to Trim 7,000 Workers The Social Security Administration announced plans on Friday as part of the Trump administration's effort to slash the size of the federal workforce. The U.S. government agency, which sends checks to 73 million retired and disabled Americans each month, said the 12 percent reduction would trim staffing to 50,000 workers. The agency's workforce cuts come as the ranks of Americans receiving Social Security benefits , largely due to the aging baby boomer population. An average of about 11,000 boomers are set to turn 65 each day this year through 2027. subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/skquoH8tnzhEsx85je_MMHGagqTy2Mwj8H0aXxzrKzZCArEi-sQVtqQCtA8rwFUUWFp9CLHg77niU-WuxPOfUAPNKd4to5m72w5dPwas-Dz3KbPfLjZVDO_N0GFvmxb9b9WGKhM26yUf_EnfamKQJJRa_I9_8SFbBO3IPs_7jq1HtfESTKsNXZ6SKJyhTarkXnAYQ_zrm9CnVdGTdxa0Pe17dvvSln2edMz_nmnOq0C2uwBkS3ALaPpAIA4wCzf2YhMFPAe2uiISvGYs1G8xlBbcy5ok8c8haYEaJr-WprTzGCBCzZ2yezOagxQFNdD-SF6gt1zRui-vCU6qSdaW2sbEw3DG1RhNpLN4NZ38qx4l5-LDj2ZurmZuY4g_ZbCruvq799B9EhA0W7MIkC7QvYuoKzXhNHmhYnPZjqOzgk-Y4HnmUYCUKg/PGqvv7MQ2SxCLFOVbGxQxoMaLqHCjIBT/6)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/jI04-bsk19SEtl33YneiOPOOhs0u0g6evxzcW4fcVt1ARYEpb1dipFyqn693a1Sm7OgLRifM9tFPpT_2AdaIn5MbMu-PGB4_HxFYLUcxjUfnS7d_EusY4X6VO-J0clf_FRwkA-aMdrhdg9lsZ2cLQ-bhtnmUprGogvFKHVfqbuCrSX8BNpEzoRXvPtzt8pFSy2ARmj2_diiAbw_KwYeL1KGB4FXvGOZ9JDvlaVznw70Ih_d11oScPBRiC46g-zwYSMZOihqms_ApwycUinDNtmWXAKzl3WBiGWzltnnubxj1kaqmBS_A2B6wWaE4pqZBD6pgbFPfc6tqg-tg3ztbZ-YLVGcJYC93CkVjRVlvTQgC04riDaNiFLADTHjrRybUQ8Xxon2bji-50zw1zvomqMmhDftZ7HxLOz02nF5aVThm_aWKjid0Xw/PxDopEaI8UlviSs6QFtHSarfeH-B51_b/6)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/I2cyPHCIS-CX-1bePct4tpEMYFl2h_NApI9xrbDnlJlEJKgW66CFtb1gu1viZMNbmNsG1DqPBPQIjW5TAm1ySU9LHVSdUpxZYFdNsO6o8hpq2n4CAjEQF4GhxvwCf-Z4rEhZv2PJzIeUSz8YkwwgGHIrlb_CIk2RRa3UGj0IrP5veAoAXd5lPTwzAHWHIBKDprmqQV5ggtq-Z6KRqdA7tkQ7-Dd68p_J-O2tCJPNKpFWyNQoCoNbb7Do3QVo1-UMLazP3igtSth-vt72qMF15YaiEY9ElopqvrYYfkrL8id5E_eH8si4chXB2v3oCcRGhcIZ0kZK-mm-WTwOhU1A5MZcm-z3DgDWHjzZtsAIil0BM2AiL9atsMdAXUCtl_zawuG_15Ba_XL1BrcTUkSLmleMLeH8ZyChO14j3bcfPu9MbPqMr2jdvg/45x_hmPydJekKeLZpAcZjFthhM3Zt7bu/6)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/HuwHvh2mfUTsqf9K7W8GfRF2WjS6GzsV0Int1_TvZUwH5EWi5cIGN26Cejmh1eHw9u6Rg2A40zwf-NV-0bPDVu4Gfyrf3LC_xzDeAm3bWu0P7T9O00TcIgyxeWoEI3QvmxL0xiaaq_3IydUEO6tsUiTODFDNSKxPsZCuFKKoqnJFMFOP0jN0LaRTztR1kFVHX5qAC3krO7u6JOKBaWdYoAq3C5K-PMuMqxPXhOzbJMTqj3Ygx3G_4s76TkOndIljE7HjXti4F1aqahdnyVrDtW17lsJG1ZSTaobLmA9o_qaAr5UYzccteAu-233QcAVBIozwZPxmFCz_nQsH9V6jmeqEtSo4Be9_nnwcjgbm2NpoVNZqTokhbphRasQpSW7WbWzSu98ocLgiAH01ZrxDSUl-b7hRYxQkzVirGRbslHZHOW7kyoGaig/T-NMSh9y9Ici-lWdZ1PqpMUU3UKoKanJ/6)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Democrats are trying to dismantle D.O.G.E.
body:
They don’t want you to know the truth

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a4Fi/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend,
Democrats are losing their minds over D.O.G.E.
And they’ve NEVER been more desperate to take back the House so they can shut it down and bury the waste being exposed.
**Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E.) is ripping the mask off their waste, fraud, and abuse that has gone on for far too long.**
And the Democrats know that the more we uncover, the harder it will be for them to hide their waste fraud and abuse and the fact that** they’re using YOUR tax dollars to fund their radical woke agenda.**
So they have made destroying the House GOP Majority and killing D.O.G.E. their top priority.
_We cannot let that happen. With special elections for critical House seats coming up fast, the fight for the majority is NOW._
**If we lose this fight, Democrats will**** _silence us_****,****_halt every investigation_****, and**** _let the Swamp go right back to robbing the American people_****.**
Friend, I’m calling on folks like you to step up right now to help us fight for accountability.
**_[Can I count on you to stand with us today to defend the GOP House Majority](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a4Fi/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?**
[DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a4Fi/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
President Trump and his administration have already hit the ground running.
Right now we have a HUGE opportunity to put an end to the fourth branch of government that’s filled with unelected bureaucrats who are pulling the strings with impunity.
**_President Trump and I promised to Drain The Swamp._****_ _****_D.O.G.E. is delivering on that promise._**
Friend, The Left knows that they are cornered which is why they are panicking and throwing everything they have at us to take back the House.
**They will stop at nothing to take back power and prevent us from exposing the deep-seated waste, fraud and abuse they have embedded in our nation’s government.**
[DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a4Fi/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, with YOUR help, we will crush their plans by holding onto the House, continuing to expose the truth, and finally taking our country back from the DC Swamp.
**_[So please if you are able chip in to our House GOP Battleground Fund today to defend the majority](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a4Fi/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
Every day counts and time is short to make sure we do not fall behind the Democrats.
I would be honored to receive your support today as my colleagues and I continue to fight in Congress to Make America Great Again.
_For America_ ,
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a4Fi/?__vbtrk=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc3NDc3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

And the Democrats know that the more we uncover, the harder it will be for them to hide their waste fraud and abuse and the fact that they’re using YOUR tax dollars to fund their radical woke agenda. So they have made destroying the House GOP Majority and killing D.O.G.E. their top priority. We cannot let that happen. With special elections for critical House seats coming up fast, the fight for the majority is NOW. If we lose this fight, Democrats will silence us,halt every investigation, and let the Swamp go right back to robbing the American people. Friend, I’m calling on folks like you to step up right now to help us fight for accountability. ? President Trump and his administration have already hit the ground running. Right now we have a HUGE opportunity to put an end to the fourth branch of government that’s filled with unelected bureaucrats who are pulling the strings with impunity. President Trump and I promised to Drain The Swamp. D.O.G.E. is delivering on that promise. Friend, The Left knows that they are cornered which is why they are panicking and throwing everything they have at us to take back the House. They will stop at nothing to take back power and prevent us from exposing the deep-seated waste, fraud and abuse they have embedded in our nation’s government. Friend, with YOUR help, we will crush their plans by holding onto the House, continuing to expose the truth, and finally taking our country back from the DC Swamp. . Every day counts and time is short to make sure we do not fall behind the Democrats. I would be honored to receive your support today as my colleagues and I continue to fight in Congress to Make America Great Again. For America , | | Congressman Jim Jordan | | | | | | | | | | _ | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/dtV3NuBt5p16Hu0zvNEsFq9eI9IOraZlhzOxfKqLII_G2XtLXjMt20P4k0lN7cLxiLdLhouoD5l1OEATivit6gKQtoEAMrIUHNYApg7TYEYmcLEy3AwZXwG98t51gLmJw3IEYFG1TeVX1w4T7V3eU_ByTdhEGkIEUyibfkUBeviG0W9fRzUsCNTSjT8xKTuwFuX9jchSNlBQXocigO-mxe0tEjdtcBjbRiVlTBfoYy3UiAwlSgghyqisbKKsHBqBAZeyYM3SToprARSGbHlulB5uonGG8vpLetC6qg5mJwP8TYjDggXl0ncZGtk0w04QMU-WmqJnZXcSicVVAxKwro-vs9_5cA6kOFa7ZuQfj8e90idQIAdKd2FsAixjQgDI_ftED_ZwrI32iuD27L7jfaNBA3bxwaFKYVn6b2eQPoXT7btQ9MvLrbGmumfuW1x9YeSrs4khDoeTwtWzQT5DI_wxdZfJxUBqOXPXi45DIfikLz71ICeocuLE/sp9mCNOZ2__iEcMsy5B1gyZQbDHDvGjB/6) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/bYutWIJFZHwKq5Ua9uIFY3DZasEMGZY3_3hsaWTdXDntgYZWyk_OVgVBnH0NXSOn_LTSQmwsgXWUrxREkDYL6TpoFc3mhQDEmyHSqYWrl4x916ZzhADIFJ7KW8agNsRoPvk8jOK8m4Eiulq8aUEf4qyolrIZYyi14vybdRHAOWCA9cPnUcKkKOljxVJEXvHKa0hMw1vyWpULU7Nru7u6zORixPw0A-AysWDdAyfLbWFNVzZG5FQksFMnGgs8uIEBzR_WDcaqSgNRLr3CPbSUbJTQASxsxU9ABDmcWq5KlyYC1T1xaDxiNRJsFEeGgUhdKoFtqh7reLz24j5alypacSeoTByZ1_4vNWx0o1REuAASsrvVUynFR1-Eq0CfrzCdPb9FJh33MTM7DArpWhWilINALSVvWVqr5lT589X2QPdzui9L9bOCXrqN32G1wbfa_GEAQgeFGuhPcLPsMAbBenGmSDWGtVgqfOUC4rnGfw_tBPzhX5hNHCvY/bQ14gXTX524nvPsPcyEJY8xUrG6VlRxo/6) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/EwCviu0WQAp4MMFfxCY7lVjQZUjlnBUlkzXGj8TJvsP_8rb4cbt-SedxyGvzxAjkD8SPXg_2ebqhKsvU31RtQYvGq8RfIJ2C4lKOfg0Y-x5s6UwnCnfGFwlnERc82x64qfonE2UoUpoJsZhDQ7fcIq6GVtqWocGaABstLCyYDp9ygQSD9XjN96Q_3OPbqTM_OGuth6TeZSh3y39eV_FuvE1QTY2RTAdDpGRabvQOEnRrp8j8bxNPOry46HSWn3TfuLxvCS-PxlyaA4GUBLv6MMBghvHvUJHTSaUzGil-7RLR8OSLDE9pT3Wt8W15leEEhcPwlptpIUTevhUSE2S6UQLwL2q4Gj3gBk-714X24h8uyVovmQMjHNJ0V4pibfiQOp_QKhpQnSMnxZMrYyrPiO_tt4CU-90VcWXUO458zTnS4SMsdDkjCYvkWSJ4-NAVs3qaKlUIKEHaBigxM1Hm18wNyTI-YA24WGo5_5J1kX1nlvEuf721drJ2/oSYHkMCQ_QutQqM91z2jKzOcx2Mj93Ki/6). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/ilqQuQhGWOwBZSN9hfgz-Di0Oe2RNjGya0kobdXSZozNRA-TEZ-P1ZZCU2VKAVEOvsXl3Kd85IlTNF9E8kwp-cIFBLQ9pzzw2PW7ZXyO2Y06hRILEVqwFR4bY7uEsiln5oSXJgC4MracaFt7KfH6C0Eeapufs1BCIdM9WFPFMnaxqGv4MEq4-LInd43HuDwS-HGlbKGmBFKlMvc76FYINPN6KfMvsX5l2pOmgNXZ2Hs7piDx_kLDY6samawdMgjIMDKPwT6OQH8VSO4_GFhteWhTGkFck0pGtnG1pSIahRucDte_FMKan1mNq2p9LgGrNBwxwTX8aOJlNW_ahC6F8VqN5t-ENz6PypogpJwjQrOjuiixDOPtPMIeheMCFO8RH5O8QF3hmWeOh_igN0PrQH0tB_XCxuIKViwxWl5XYtRyXvrzel7JR_EFwIb-KpikwUUbA034ThejxaYZY7iuNd8_Ec4WPJg2sBKuYYXuqP0yHCyeINqg92Nx/emfErEXav7KhkntQcdLMeZ3sH5LknnoQ/6)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t_Lt5_L4Jb7fhhim8JBHsg~~/AARclBA~/-p22SqHFWxGeRrBhYEe-vFwNrZdT8EGK16zjdPKBjvkO2Uo90LmctSvOUzeh0WZ0aRV3JUKTGo609ZiAFaVPZYKmqkSRHDBxYaQtDfv5qAChGLxwXXgmAHH4nte4BmawM42NL0xcCzwyuBbmK9IenaedbfrPfZZHOt9BH8rKn2m-mMAHdjlVWGCOa7uoDpeie3fKx6XuWpdFw0SPxnFyZCuBzl1I__DDOVMn5-RMwc0dQ3PbG2o9N0gA3DZAaOIcwU7II-hL3cLorTYzqUElPo83myg6yxO1WSKbnTRi6II~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t_Lt5_L4Jb7fhhim8JBHsg~~/AARclBA~/-p22SqHFWxGeRrBhYEe-vFwNrZdT8EGK16zjdPKBjvkO2Uo90LmctSvOUzeh0WZ0aRV3JUKTGo609ZiAFaVPZYKmqkSRHDBxYaQtDfv5qAChGLxwXXgmAHH4nte4BmawM42NL0xcCzwyuBbmK9IenaedbfrPfZZHOt9BH8rKn2m-mMAHdjlVWGCOa7uoDpeie3fKx6XuWpdFw0SPxnFyZCuBzl1I__DDOVMn5-RMwc0dQ3PbG2o9N0gA3DZAaOIcwU7II-hL3cLorTYzqUElPo83myg6yxO1WSKbnTRi6II~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t_Lt5_L4Jb7fhhim8JBHsg~~/AARclBA~/-p22SqHFWxGeRrBhYEe-vFwNrZdT8EGK16zjdPKBjvkO2Uo90LmctSvOUzeh0WZ0aRV3JUKTGo609ZiAFaVPZYKmqkSRHDBxYaQtDfv5qAChGLxwXXgmAHH4nte4BmawM42NL0xcCzwyuBbmK9IenaedbfrPfZZHOt9BH8rKn2m-mMAHdjlVWGCOa7uoDpeie3fKx6XuWpdFw0SPxnFyZCuBzl1I__DDOVMn5-RMwc0dQ3PbG2o9N0gA3DZAaOIcwU7II-hL3cLorTYzqUElPo83myg6yxO1WSKbnTRi6II~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t_Lt5_L4Jb7fhhim8JBHsg~~/AARclBA~/-p22SqHFWxGeRrBhYEe-vFwNrZdT8EGK16zjdPKBjvkO2Uo90LmctSvOUzeh0WZ0aRV3JUKTGo609ZiAFaVPZYKmqkSRHDBxYaQtDfv5qAChGLxwXXgmAHH4nte4BmawM42NL0xcCzwyuBbmK9IenaedbfrPfZZHOt9BH8rKn2m-mMAHdjlVWGCOa7uoDpeie3fKx6XuWpdFw0SPxnFyZCuBzl1I__DDOVMn5-RMwc0dQ3PbG2o9N0gA3DZAaOIcwU7II-hL3cLorTYzqUElPo83myg6yxO1WSKbnTRi6II~)
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Nv_qLI1dLBvEmGKUzdLy5E7jBi9GGoXcwZyHFT7-afrryktax0mlAox0dBUi4W5Sd9-PcdP6GHcM8FK1BWJkNAuv89L7KdDZGYC6V5fbvpl4rTP8CDEMuzttjnw4vG4qQVtspbDAC2SjAiQFpLPqlOKM66wXMg04RqmC1iH2b0mX9jcqAABGAlNdyBV9g3oh1ED-3w9DbLl_Jz9z8TQKdfNRTLasYdd-Q56MDifOlh7grMH_BDwBeVfSo5MXtuGZjByJh0ftSof4PH1bGVtm2T5UsXx5M5kBPWkl0rHPkKdDsUIT-svJgqeDOdcAonJNNmrlXmCOuoFa5tLKEZ9H_VRijtta9zlsxKQdsR-HwuyGcAJNDWgSO9BWf67veNTOXqQTNnBhQPBiKjMpJWXdVstMgwkZn3nEBjXgXAejxNBsODu7WII08w/3HROIQ31tPkfuultv4N1EfYLlq-bJcnA/6)

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/OHnTHdJnwOjYva5_9Kc_MkNJWVvVzQ8NjbfNFeN84rjIRQ-DIicsbcTHy9Nj8FJHKQXQdJq3mpVIBGfnwhgpEGtrpvKU1Zwc4ZF9KVLaeHDt1YazytLXKfZoW-mqGfMJSfgpN7XKZxkVhR8bXGhe6p3TwLY1OFVIwNc6keP0otBHZFwxgRZWJhuwnaHUZyp1LMVPvytaflV8AIEHxa5UXNLVmDkWOUpzef7M2XyyouFRVuL0mgWhjl5OKQHtuw6cYMuuirtMBZk-Sg0cUJ5quSnaucfRw04BHmSib5piAPaCWYipDz-uWEP7JYQzx87Zwtw5eqVlO1p83mV6dzq2Gz9BE9o0G8YlZtdfyF6LI82eFE445CUHvghHYx5RB5eTaqmZ3A4Yn02d9wMP6zkZDLCq2WEMX2msBf5MPKEi4xMN6sy2GhR_uA/dZ-zDLFwuwVD5qcfepwOfhoOnX6AKNNg/6)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/jtd1IwJE5Mng1W0_P4l7XtLpes_BuG-VtgmcmMXEfNLlreiuLr7cx7OVlvqm3Uxtfj5O0NOYp4jN78JOpdvDiB9qp7gkfBvf_l9Tokc47db02wzg8SzBTzm3r6vOViBQllZw9Dgp6ThEeUPt4sFCAOfB3hzsRmtvpAKNjiLmEnHUTnteB1_hnxoeUCuHm8ECET3ZRIJHfn8ywvOHzb_Bd-v0K0VzX0gpLNgpwdHMBLiEXUfLe4SjTBwz7O44afAg0IzRB84SgL4QBIOc-ZTMmZ-ANctUVNc6RAmq5JEYmHW5hOtETtEJL2V37aVGHNNEq0jQRATseSHCMMcuYSAzhkh5dzeQcV06dDjEHpzhKJCLZQW0MhaJS17xir0UkWp3Njt3X_0Q9BPdA8-craS6H_dTccHo6d0i_isDr1nuCqCP_o2WFO1Mvg/MTZT5bSEL529GvvJAQYohSO3pWbeOGjX/6)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

The internet may have made spoilers more common, but it certainly didn’t invent them.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dfkzjw8hcfhfrm8ewdb4j6ihx3xccxmlsiqjjs3byswi04f9fi080yqa2qfiyyq7hj29fb9fx13iv6zl9t82ysn5gfy5shu5rex8unqtvlhinqww0smtc9xwd981f4w8o96pg4x1f3spuxc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The “L.A. Times” spoiled the winners of the 12th Academy Awards.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he internet may have made spoilers more common, but it certainly didn’t invent them. Back in 1940, for instance, the _Los Angeles Times_ accidentally [revealed](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the winners of the 12th Academy Awards by publishing them before the end of the event on February 29, 1940. At the time, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences gave certain newspapers the list of winners prior to the event on the condition that they not publish them until after the ceremony concluded. As the 8:45 p.m. edition of the _L.A. Times_ came out before that happened, the news spread that _Gone With the Wind_ had won Best Picture before it was officially announced.
---
The film won [seven other Oscars](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that night, including Best Director for Victor Fleming, Best Actress for Vivien Leigh, and Best Supporting Actress for Hattie McDaniel, making her the first Black person to win an Academy Award. Other big winners that night included Robert Donat, who was named Best Actor for his performance in _Goodbye, Mr. Chips_ , and Thomas Mitchell, whose turn in _Stagecoach_ earned him the Best Supporting Actor statuette. _The Wizard of Oz_ , also directed by Fleming in one of the most notable years a director has ever had, won two Oscars: Best Original Score and Best Original Song for “Over the Rainbow.” Following the early reveal, the academy stopped giving out the winners early and started the sealed-envelope tradition that continues to this day.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Adjusted for inflation, “Gone With the Wind” is still the highest-grossing film of all time.
As of now, the highest-grossing film of all time is James Cameron’s _Avatar_ , which retook the box-office crown from _Avengers: Endgame_ after its most recent rerelease and has made a total of $2.9 billion. (No. 3 and No. 4 on the list are _Avatar: The Way of Water_ and _Titanic_ , also directed by Cameron.) But that’s only when you don’t account for inflation. When you do, _Gone With the Wind_ clears the competition with around [$4.6 billion](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — nearly 10 times its unadjusted gross of around [$400 million](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sshwdh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). It’s benefited from a number of theatrical rereleases over the decades, but that doesn’t change the fact that just under 60 million people — nearly half the U.S. population at the time — purchased a ticket to _Gone With the Wind_ within four years of its release.

clean_body: The internet may have made spoilers more common, but it certainly didn’t invent them. | T he internet may have made spoilers more common, but it certainly didn’t invent them. Back in 1940, for instance, the Los Angeles Times accidentally the winners of the 12th Academy Awards by publishing them before the end of the event on February 29, 1940. At the time, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences gave certain newspapers the list of winners prior to the event on the condition that they not publish them until after the ceremony concluded. As the 8:45 p.m. edition of the L.A. Times came out before that happened, the news spread that Gone With the Wind had won Best Picture before it was officially announced. The film won that night, including Best Director for Victor Fleming, Best Actress for Vivien Leigh, and Best Supporting Actress for Hattie McDaniel, making her the first Black person to win an Academy Award. Other big winners that night included Robert Donat, who was named Best Actor for his performance in Goodbye, Mr. Chips , and Thomas Mitchell, whose turn in Stagecoach earned him the Best Supporting Actor statuette. The Wizard of Oz , also directed by Fleming in one of the most notable years a director has ever had, won two Oscars: Best Original Score and Best Original Song for “Over the Rainbow.” Following the early reveal, the academy stopped giving out the winners early and started the sealed-envelope tradition that continues to this day. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Stars on the Hollywood Walk of Fame for Hattie McDaniel 2 | | The most Oscars won by a single movie (Ben-Hur , Titanic , and The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King) 11 | The most Oscars won by a single movie (Ben-Hur , Titanic , and The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King) 11 | | Movies that have been nominated for Best Picture 611 | | The most Oscar nominations for a single movie (All About Eve , Titanic , La La Land) 14 | The most Oscar nominations for a single movie (All About Eve , Titanic , La La Land) 14 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Adjusted for inflation, “Gone With the Wind” is still the highest-grossing film of all time. As of now, the highest-grossing film of all time is James Cameron’s Avatar , which retook the box-office crown from Avengers: Endgame after its most recent rerelease and has made a total of $2.9 billion. (No. 3 and No. 4 on the list are Avatar: The Way of Water and Titanic , also directed by Cameron.) But that’s only when you don’t account for inflation. When you do, Gone With the Wind clears the competition with around — nearly 10 times its unadjusted gross of around . It’s benefited from a number of theatrical rereleases over the decades, but that doesn’t change the fact that just under 60 million people — nearly half the U.S. population at the time — purchased a ticket to Gone With the Wind within four years of its release. subject: February was a slog.

body:
We promised to be honest with you - even when it's hard

| |
---
| | | We promised to be honest with you - even when it's hard. So here it goes:

**February was a slog.** It's a short month, folks are exhausted after a long election cycle, and the next election seems like a long way off. It makes sense that our fundraising goal was a long shot.

Unfortunately, we're now in a real bind heading into the last month of the first quarter. Why? Because...
**1.** Three CRUCIAL special elections are closing in. If we lose these, we might as well kiss our Majority goodbye and prepare to be on defense against the Radical Democrats.

**2.** Liberals everywhere are coming after Elon Musk and DOGE with everything they have. They've taken legal action against DOGE and even made a petition to FIRE Elon Musk.

**3.** The largest Democrat Super PAC unleashed $50 MILLION this month to take out our most vulnerable House Conservatives in the Midterm.
_And if we kept listing all the reasons, this email would be never-ending. _

_**[So we will get to the point: we desperately need you to chip in anything you can right here and now to help defend our Majority and President Trump from the Democrats.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c424b0965d44afb802fb55c7194b599&_e=IN4y8YO4Lntu4N1iXcRPBSfEvwxHss_KiSbFORJWgX_VY53XsfgfTwgUm_tQ7agoVd84bsZCyjDvKwBPb431yNcsghBsPjy9hH0LE8J1g-SvYV6tzwLaWNJBbRqy2K4EBJSInnh4VbhIRCqC_Q4b2OlpVETslFy4dCb6eCXeFjPFi4MB7alBvQGwQ6068x5bDJ1oHGFGejqJBYn3giZDkB3tcfQxzpHXxpacn80lcCbJtqafL-J92Zj93_WTs7EFE6Him21bbRsSdbiqisxM8jB1PYRqpsXKWO7lxu7in4EV9ibg8UlYSNAuWLgBTOhAOTJ-tZkkDqym2-9XcApbyMpVpIM4zoHu_amVGIcoO8T0s4fNf3YQtOYwpx66lN8noMf2-Z-Bs8JdqbPXFrY3vISi_ECGYxEBG-_B08tJ1l_WuvlKgUMl6DKtRGm3-RyndTdaMKdFalvoV_dmUKX-NQ%3D%3D "So we will get to the point: we desperately need you to chip in anything you can right here and now to help defend our Majority and President Trump from the Democrats.")**_

**We can 't let that happen **_- everything we've worked so hard for is on the line._

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Around the World: March 2nd, 2025
body:
Selling Out Ukraine? Trump’s Deal Raises Alarm
| | | | | |
---
**_Around the World_**
---
Hello, friend! We’re thrilled to reintroduce _Around the World_ , an email series from _No Dem Left Behind_ that explores the global stories shaping politics. These developments aren’t just headlines—they have the power to influence U.S. policy and upcoming elections, making it essential to stay informed. I’m Olya Makarova, and every Sunday, I’ll guide you through the latest in foreign policy. From major global events to shifting voter sentiments, _Around the World_ will give you a front-row seat to the stories that matter most. -Olya Makarova
---
| | | | **Ukraine**
---
|
---
For the past three years, Ukraine has been fighting to defend itself from Russia’s brutal invasion, which began in 2022. But now, Donald Trump is pushing the false claim that Ukraine actually started the war—playing right into Russia’s hands. This isn’t just about rewriting history; it’s about weakening U.S. support for Ukraine and making Americans question whether they should continue helping. Meanwhile, Trump is trying to exploit Ukraine’s desperate situation to force them into a bad minerals deal—one that benefits the U.S. far more than it helps Ukraine. We all want the war to end, but Trump’s approach would leave Ukraine crippled for decades, stripping it of the resources it needs to rebuild. The deal he’s pushing would grant the U.S. access to valuable rare earth minerals in Ukraine’s eastern regions—resources crucial for modern technology. In return, Ukraine would supposedly receive security guarantees. The problem? Trump isn’t offering any solid promises, and Ukraine’s President Zelenskyy isn’t willing to trade away his country’s resources for vague assurances. Trump’s actions look less like an ally helping a friend in need and more like a businessman trying to squeeze a desperate partner into a bad deal. Things came to a head this past Friday when Zelenskyy met with Trump at the White House, hoping to secure a fair deal and continued U.S. support. Instead, the meeting reportedly erupted into a shouting match between Zelenskyy, Trump, and J.D. Vance. Now, with tensions at an all-time high, the question remains: Will Trump keep pushing Ukraine into a bad bargain, or will the U.S. stand by its ally and work to end this war in a way that doesn’t destroy Ukraine? **Join us next week for the latest updates and stay informed with NDLB!**
---
|
---
-Olya Makarova
---

subject: I’m OFFICIALLY the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fb23287a20c4015877c205a59969b47&_e=oakMZV1qGQuuLOc2KnbcJuEtb7WJ2cFyyl5JEF5VfYqruVTgT6bGkybhttZ2W6tNm3GMQkEdTiacxXYIXeLtrJmui3NPVTY0mgrrs3lQes4jMz_h1Wk4xIje--e-rWmnb4toY6rT-T4Om7oRrrZ73OMJ27Z872vu_Tyl5NOcCOkt_N-DKs_RdQFoHQElZeXbXnSR1L_LW2k-IzeqRr38Sgtz9Sl9J6NBtFDFdUKfqQGWmCuEzLyn8irULaIg2x65c1OHjwO_20Sf8RP2VZD94rMrXeAHk4e8v1xksII5wtyyxk8I-o2LuaUsXhQo3qynZ0CD5Ek5GwT-IG36XSYAiGSWnm5G3_jP3jkL0klX2zWlwMnxxXR-r4fCb_Dfgvwz)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fb23287a20c4015877c205a59969b47&_e=oakMZV1qGQuuLOc2KnbcJuEtb7WJ2cFyyl5JEF5VfYqruVTgT6bGkybhttZ2W6tNm3GMQkEdTiacxXYIXeLtrJmui3NPVTY0mgrrs3lQes4jMz_h1Wk4xIje--e-rWmnb4toY6rT-T4Om7oRrrZ73OMJ27Z872vu_Tyl5NOcCOkt_N-DKs_RdQFoHQElZeXbXnSR1L_LW2k-IzeqRr38Sgtz9Sl9J6NBtFDFdUKfqQFWmQ9ms-IsGrQ0rgJg8mdlYShESxn3xnaJsH_Pt5WS2BbaEh8o3DKweyxy4cG1vlPFNqj_8pjFlfnUj0c7ZSv7YQ_CZGjtXhWb0xt66hH57USnQ-HCOA6UnroDD-QWuP7RfSs77LlheYtgickRaqtX)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fb23287a20c4015877c205a59969b47&_e=oakMZV1qGQuuLOc2KnbcJuEtb7WJ2cFyyl5JEF5VfYqruVTgT6bGkybhttZ2W6tNm3GMQkEdTiacxXYIXeLtrJmui3NPVTY0mgrrs3lQes4jMz_h1Wk4xIje--e-rWmnb4toY6rT-T4Om7oRrrZ73OMJ27Z872vu_Tyl5NOcCOkt_N-DKs_RdQFoHQElZeXbXnSR1L_LW2k-IzeqRr38Sgtz9Sl9J6NBtFDFdUKfqQFtNaUn9i79TYEiQmdG17tTcP2Jykxt9glMaYDHAi2kLl5WQCQlXpZCIy1D_nEPYRoDXHXqv6Mqg9xBVMEV5wN3vY4S1kpIJUHlpNUCLSyBSJ4r7ankCQT4XI5BIQCb8Env9hvpC2oo17j9Rq15yPeG)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fb23287a20c4015877c205a59969b47&_e=oakMZV1qGQuuLOc2KnbcJuEtb7WJ2cFyyl5JEF5VfYqruVTgT6bGkybhttZ2W6tNm3GMQkEdTiacxXYIXeLtrJmui3NPVTY0mgrrs3lQes4jMz_h1Wk4xIje--e-rWmnb4toY6rT-T4Om7oRrrZ73OMJ27Z872vu_Tyl5NOcCOkt_N-DKs_RdQFoHQElZeXbXnSR1L_LW2k-IzeqRr38Sgtz9Sl9J6NBtFDFdUKfqQE7tyB2rX5WcDZFnE2P9TohC-2afCsA5yK95KvyfURBtYvSkiMIvLhRNZ8qsnHxgAu4mcrTk1tUTI7wCkG7oXwl7xgYOCR0pF2JMzS35IPNlThnsdVDB7zgR5Odh9CH7wKDVbEBg2vnSbY5TDJenRAx)
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

subject: Dear Ukraine: Sorry that our VP is a jerk
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Dear Ukraine: Sorry our VP is such a jerk ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82ccf657-f176-4097-8138-4961fd8dc43d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74834566-ac7e-4f8d-8494-85706a253a65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Dear Ukraine: You already knew that [Trump is an idiot](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdde99dfc-f773-4ade-bc92-44c406712ce3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), based on years of interactions. But you may not have realized just how big a jerk Vice President JD Vance is, given that he's relatively new to the scene. **Unfortunately,[he showed it to the world](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf709f622-7bbf-4ff1-ab81-ce6718025129/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in the meeting with your president. He was obnoxious, combative, and made up lie after lie.** Because Vance is a jerk. A massive one. And we are really sorry you have to deal with him, when you're already in the midst of a fight for survival. [**On behalf of America, please accept our apologies. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56d0ea8f-2f68-41f7-bef0-0d6faca4d515/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Krasner's unsettling endorsement
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cb2737e09c&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Krasner receives endorsement from Democratic ward leader convicted of sex offenses against a minor](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=78b55f8991&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
A Philadelphia Democratic ward leader with recent felony convictions for sex crimes against a minor under the age of thirteen gave a de facto endorsement to District Attorney Larry Krasner on Saturday according to sources and a video, creating the odd and unseemly spectacle of a district attorney receiving support from a political leader prosecuted by his office who must now register as a sex offender for the rest of his life.

The developments set off a new wave of unease among the many Philly Democratic party leaders who have long opposed the former defense attorney turned prosecutor on the merits, but which leaders have also felt hamstrung in speaking out against Krasner because of his close ties to monied progressive kingmakers like billionaire George Soros and a progressive grassroots determined to drag the Democratic City Committee to the ideological left.

Sources say (and video appears to confirm) 52nd Ward Leader Stephen Jones, 79, endorsed Krasner by inviting him to a signature-gathering breakfast, a clear and unequivocal show of support in the language of ward politics.

**Why It Matters**. Sentencing in the case is set for May 22, two days after the municipal primary concludes — at which time Jones will be 80 and the city will know whether Krasner is back on the glide path for re-election or if the city will have a new top cop.
Krasner is expected to face his toughest primary challenge yet, as former Philadelphia municipal judge Patrick Dugan has also joined the race. A Dugan representative said its campaign was not invited to the same breakfast.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=73b8926b3a&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Ghosts of government cuts past](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ac6c359f0e&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Andy Bloom_
President Donald Trump and Elon Musk, who is leading DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency), continue moving at lightning speed and, in the process, causing Democrats to lose their collective minds.

The point of DOGE is to reduce waste, inefficiency, duplication, and fraud within the federal government, principles Democrats supported when Barack Obama and Bill Clinton were president.

Clinton launched numerous initiatives, placing Al Gore in charge of what eventually became known as “Reinventing Government.”

Between 1993 and 2000, the Clinton administration eliminated a net of 426,000 federal jobs, most from the Department of Defense, which lost eighteen percent of its civilian workforce. Clinton used various methods to achieve the reductions, including offering buyouts of up to $25,000 to eligible employees who left voluntarily.

**Why It Matters**. I understand that Trump and Musk are moving quickly. They are swinging axes. Obama and Clinton used scalpels.

There’s a good reason Obama and Clinton could use scalpels, and Trump needs to use an axe.
In 2000, the national debt was $5.659 trillion, about 56 percent of the country’s Gross Domestic Product (GDP).

By the end of fiscal year 2010, the total federal debt reached $13.562 trillion, 93 percent of GDP.

The debt is growing at an accelerated pace. It’s over $36 trillion and is projected to reach $37 trillion in June. The debt is now over 130 percent of GDP. The impending disaster is obvious and coming fast.

It’s long past time to take an axe to the federal government and spending.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3cd2b9e76b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Pennsylvania gets an A in educational funding and a D in student outcomes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ec021d2f37&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[CBSD teachers’ discrimination lawsuit continues after setback](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b13c781d09&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Trump’s DHS says criminals are not welcome in the United States](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3aa18ded0b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Campaign finance filings raise new questions about link between D.A. Krasner and disgraced Democratic ward leader](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f748fab9a0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Michael Thomas Leibrandt: How will Deepseek AI-R affect Philadelphia?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=978fcd6a08&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Wally Zimolong: Democrats are Article II deniers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4982fd1c40&e=b7b3eddce2)**

|

|
# **4\. This Tie Made History**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4d5966329b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| Sen. Joe Picozzi shares an [unexpected story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b52f2a215d&e=b7b3eddce2) on the [_Voices of Reason_ podcast](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=05ce0c51ed&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
|
# **5\. Having an Impact**
We cover news that matters, and sometimes we are even able to make a difference. A part of _Broad + Liberty_ ’s mission has always been to give voice to issues and ideas that have been shut out of our discourse for too long. Sometimes that is a nationwide trend, sometimes it is a local injustice. Beth Ann Rosica uncovered one such injustice in our region when the Chester County Health Department shut down the kitchen at St. Agnes Catholic Church in West Chester, a place that had for decades provided free, hot meals to the needy members of their community. A classic case of malicious government overreach, the county health officials suddenly adopted a stricter standard on food preparation than they ever had before — and stricter than any other county in the commonwealth. Even in the very progressive borough of West Chester, shutting down a church’s efforts to feed the poor met with some opposition, but it might have slipped under the radar if not for Rosica’s reporting. Instead, [the word got out, the people rallied, and elected officials listened](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5e09c48c67&e=b7b3eddce2) — the perfect result for a good cause, and one that would not have happened but for the generous support of _Broad + Liberty_ readers.
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
The mainstream media is bending over backward to make the Trump administration look reasonable. On CBS’s Face the Nation last week, anchor Margaret Brennan indignantly told Secretary of State Marco Rubio that the Holocaust was caused by an excess of free speech. Rubio patiently disabused her of this wildly ahistorical notion. As [Paul du Quenoy noted for the _Telegraph_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1eb81e531e&e=b7b3eddce2), it was just the latest example of how “America’s legacy media desperately grasps at straws to maintain its languishing credibility.” You might have thought that the second Trump administration would induce less unhinged derangement than the first. After all, we’ve all done this before just four years ago. But no, the mainstream press is going about with its hair on fire, just like it was 2017 again. And looking all the more foolish for it.
---

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
