clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd A Philadelphia Democratic ward leader with recent felony convictions for sex crimes against a minor under the age of thirteen gave a de facto endorsement to District Attorney Larry Krasner on Saturday according to sources and a video, creating the odd and unseemly spectacle of a district attorney receiving support from a political leader prosecuted by his office who must now register as a sex offender for the rest of his life. The developments set off a new wave of unease among the many Philly Democratic party leaders who have long opposed the former defense attorney turned prosecutor on the merits, but which leaders have also felt hamstrung in speaking out against Krasner because of his close ties to monied progressive kingmakers like billionaire George Soros and a progressive grassroots determined to drag the Democratic City Committee to the ideological left. Sources say (and video appears to confirm) 52nd Ward Leader Stephen Jones, 79, endorsed Krasner by inviting him to a signature-gathering breakfast, a clear and unequivocal show of support in the language of ward politics. Why It Matters. Sentencing in the case is set for May 22, two days after the municipal primary concludes — at which time Jones will be 80 and the city will know whether Krasner is back on the glide path for re-election or if the city will have a new top cop. Krasner is expected to face his toughest primary challenge yet, as former Philadelphia municipal judge Patrick Dugan has also joined the race. A Dugan representative said its campaign was not invited to the same breakfast. | | 2. By Andy Bloom President Donald Trump and Elon Musk, who is leading DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency), continue moving at lightning speed and, in the process, causing Democrats to lose their collective minds. The point of DOGE is to reduce waste, inefficiency, duplication, and fraud within the federal government, principles Democrats supported when Barack Obama and Bill Clinton were president. Clinton launched numerous initiatives, placing Al Gore in charge of what eventually became known as “Reinventing Government.” Between 1993 and 2000, the Clinton administration eliminated a net of 426,000 federal jobs, most from the Department of Defense, which lost eighteen percent of its civilian workforce. Clinton used various methods to achieve the reductions, including offering buyouts of up to $25,000 to eligible employees who left voluntarily. Why It Matters. I understand that Trump and Musk are moving quickly. They are swinging axes. Obama and Clinton used scalpels. There’s a good reason Obama and Clinton could use scalpels, and Trump needs to use an axe. In 2000, the national debt was $5.659 trillion, about 56 percent of the country’s Gross Domestic Product (GDP). By the end of fiscal year 2010, the total federal debt reached $13.562 trillion, 93 percent of GDP. The debt is growing at an accelerated pace. It’s over $36 trillion and is projected to reach $37 trillion in June. The debt is now over 130 percent of GDP. The impending disaster is obvious and coming fast. It’s long past time to take an axe to the federal government and spending. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. This Tie Made History | | Sen. Joe Picozzi shares an on the . | | 5\. Having an Impact We cover news that matters, and sometimes we are even able to make a difference. A part of Broad + Liberty ’s mission has always been to give voice to issues and ideas that have been shut out of our discourse for too long. Sometimes that is a nationwide trend, sometimes it is a local injustice. Beth Ann Rosica uncovered one such injustice in our region when the Chester County Health Department shut down the kitchen at St. Agnes Catholic Church in West Chester, a place that had for decades provided free, hot meals to the needy members of their community. A classic case of malicious government overreach, the county health officials suddenly adopted a stricter standard on food preparation than they ever had before — and stricter than any other county in the commonwealth. Even in the very progressive borough of West Chester, shutting down a church’s efforts to feed the poor met with some opposition, but it might have slipped under the radar if not for Rosica’s reporting. Instead, — the perfect result for a good cause, and one that would not have happened but for the generous support of Broad + Liberty readers. | | 5\. What we're reading The mainstream media is bending over backward to make the Trump administration look reasonable. On CBS’s Face the Nation last week, anchor Margaret Brennan indignantly told Secretary of State Marco Rubio that the Holocaust was caused by an excess of free speech. Rubio patiently disabused her of this wildly ahistorical notion. As , it was just the latest example of how “America’s legacy media desperately grasps at straws to maintain its languishing credibility.” You might have thought that the second Trump administration would induce less unhinged derangement than the first. After all, we’ve all done this before just four years ago. But no, the mainstream press is going about with its hair on fire, just like it was 2017 again. And looking all the more foolish for it. | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19103%2E878179%2EH1Va-I). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19103%2E878179%2EH1Va-I).**

name: The Kids Guide Team
subject: Trump/ Elon - Two Bold Leaders
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bf111506da44aeea8c03cc78eecfb24&_e=8XcOrVm_VKB9NdAhHL_noJtD9ISPrcPJTWOad-Vqp0gLH1842aeO7EGOO8cJQpHz411APydTyFe8Ob6C-h6KlpixGRIwT3idNJ3-ZHQQDbb7SMrpThGlsr10zMcFlxpDqnRcD_Y6wbMpe2sNOF8SSq4V7MljUPM9f9EnEF6-ygbkzuEF2aKCTKRp62XrQrIHVe3q_u4I19KGTeOWPszdB3l7TDFqkm9f1gdLSP_611oqVMRjapo7CJlcBQzZKCV3VBxeD2qptJwgU2-TNMtr2gFghTXOKMSaEGPFtpxplKXfMyPBEGwDU42yeEB2KK3XVUz61Hzh0PSyWQBAUHy9KSTQkoUdd3DxSpTZrLUgoWtMQhHM-UgB1WfQoxlcAOH-ocHpVd5GVa616fQK49tFaw%3D%3D)

Peter,

America doesn’t move forward without bold leaders—people who fight back, break the rules of the establishment, and refuse to let the media control the narrative.

[**President Donald Trump and Elon Musk aren’t just shaping the future—they’re leading it.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bf111506da44aeea8c03cc78eecfb24&_e=8XcOrVm_VKB9NdAhHL_noJtD9ISPrcPJTWOad-Vqp0gLH1842aeO7EGOO8cJQpHz411APydTyFe8Ob6C-h6KlpixGRIwT3idNJ3-ZHQQDbb7SMrpThGlsr10zMcFlxpDqnRcD_Y6wbMpe2sNOF8SSq4V7MljUPM9f9EnEF6-ygbkzuEF2aKCTKRp62XrQrIHVe3q_u4I19KGTeOWPszdB3l7TDFqkm9f1gdLSP_611pDx2bi569sqsOE1rLLom2aYQvzUL41SUCsTYcSLoh-oUcBTKR-f-GVuJZN-Ck-ewq-wLXIbKunBEwRmz_HrZTB9l7EAfDQGEmTe7v-HdOviSKaWO430xrWxn4_VMLFRz7XR1spYs43ouq-KEcmFnv-G1bkoFNI1zivrU8SbQ4WNw%3D%3D)

President Trump is taking on Washington and fighting for American families, while Elon Musk is revolutionizing technology, taking on Big Government, and proving that bold ideas can reshape the future.

But let’s be honest—our kids aren’t hearing the truth. The media, the left, and even their schools are distorting the facts about these two leaders. If we don’t teach them what real leadership looks like, who will?

That’s why we’re excited to offer you this [FREE educational bundle](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bf111506da44aeea8c03cc78eecfb24&_e=8XcOrVm_VKB9NdAhHL_noJtD9ISPrcPJTWOad-Vqp0gLH1842aeO7EGOO8cJQpHz411APydTyFe8Ob6C-h6KlpixGRIwT3idNJ3-ZHQQDbb7SMrpThGlsr10zMcFlxpDqnRcD_Y6wbMpe2sNOF8SSq4V7MljUPM9f9EnEF6-ygbkzuEF2aKCTKRp62XrQrIHVe3q_u4I19KGTeOWPszdB3l7TDFqkm9f1gdLSP_611rsDGBhPvU2JIT-5g7RukeivvoUhfpsqD6OIQgkTU_7NMRtnLf6LJ6W5SWbI4SL14BlaiogUF08-W02zv_mZZ7r3S4Nu5qg804QguzustlrlM5Y2HtRD-shV6x9sk6qqbxwGPQiXhrbEKs1to3xnsFUKfuC2HEMpGVV4o52StTY1w%3D%3D)—to give kids the real story of these two bold leaders and their impact on America’s future.

[**Two Leaders. Two Stories. Two Must-Have Guides for Your Kids**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bf111506da44aeea8c03cc78eecfb24&_e=8XcOrVm_VKB9NdAhHL_noJtD9ISPrcPJTWOad-Vqp0gLH1842aeO7EGOO8cJQpHz411APydTyFe8Ob6C-h6KlpixGRIwT3idNJ3-ZHQQDbb7SMrpThGlsr10zMcFlxpDqnRcD_Y6wbMpe2sNOF8SSq4V7MljUPM9f9EnEF6-ygbkzuEF2aKCTKRp62XrQrIHVe3q_u4I19KGTeOWPszdB3l7TDFqkm9f1gdLSP_611qHs_Rf4Db1cqcRsrYmLYREP9hodrIPm7qfwAOnjOSqcm2-fjDzNFjUqm536-HBnnrkpgT-VbjVoxphx0zhXQ1HOKYJ5f5_7kuSeEDJ0N3Ud179qVil1KsH8zWqPUwBHg6Q4eRC7_opLMdcamWA2Bk-ML4D4lJAB48iGCnXdQB1DA%3D%3D)

✔ Donald Trump: The leader who put America First, fought for families, and reshaped politics.
✔ Elon Musk: The visionary behind Tesla, SpaceX, and groundbreaking technology.
✔ How they’re teaming up to challenge the status quo and fix what’s broken.

[**Right now, you can claim BOTH guides for FREE—just $2 shipping!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bf111506da44aeea8c03cc78eecfb24&_e=8XcOrVm_VKB9NdAhHL_noJtD9ISPrcPJTWOad-Vqp0gLH1842aeO7EGOO8cJQpHz411APydTyFe8Ob6C-h6KlpixGRIwT3idNJ3-ZHQQDbb7SMrpThGlsr10zMcFlxpDqnRcD_Y6wbMpe2sNOF8SSq4V7MljUPM9f9EnEF6-ygbkzuEF2aKCTKRp62XrQrIHVe3q_u4I19KGTeOWPszdB3l7TDFqkm9f1gdLSP_611r06g0HGfJWoRyK2dlmNmZE9Nc5I-ukPylqCDSreQxi3stEwTQq8PdOERwMw0VZD58SHPgH4vRSP5yRVwl7sAcUcfSIT6kMv1457RzfApsr-NqTk9xLrKGloKyPJ0ILkkXp_gvmxIfNpyD45lryIRxnOCgY36nvNBisMZudXJ3lLA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Peter, America doesn’t move forward without bold leaders—people who fight back, break the rules of the establishment, and refuse to let the media control the narrative. President Trump is taking on Washington and fighting for American families, while Elon Musk is revolutionizing technology, taking on Big Government, and proving that bold ideas can reshape the future. But let’s be honest—our kids aren’t hearing the truth. The media, the left, and even their schools are distorting the facts about these two leaders. If we don’t teach them what real leadership looks like, who will? That’s why we’re excited to offer you this —to give kids the real story of these two bold leaders and their impact on America’s future. ✔ Donald Trump: The leader who put America First, fought for families, and reshaped politics. ✔ Elon Musk: The visionary behind Tesla, SpaceX, and groundbreaking technology. ✔ How they’re teaming up to challenge the status quo and fix what’s broken. Trump is taking on Washington’s corruption. Musk is taking on Big Tech. Trump fought to bring back American jobs. Musk is creating the jobs of the future. Together, they’re proving that leadership, innovation, and thinking big can change everything. Our kids deserve to know what real leadership looks like. They deserve to know the truth. ** For God, country, and our children’s future, The Kids Guide Team

2️⃣ **_Michigan:_ Republican Rep. announces plan to overturn same-sex marriage **
Michigan state Rep. Josh Schriver introduced a resolution urging the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn the _Obergefell v. Hodges_ ruling, which protects same-sex marriages. [This is the GOP’s latest horrific attack to attempt to roll back the rights of the LGBTQ+ community → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMSeuBWbw0m0T0iiMeXwdeVDxQpy-LIw2Pbagha5LZ0bu5SFBplFs7y3wGiYE7VUtU9nXe0nxuUuv6Fmg8E612Rb0FNCZ6YqhxsFTIiLN1T7LMuaJOTuOmNVdR2biOR7WRZ40TFXWNi-wl0jTf5khiGLNU0oxSGayrstA-e_nGazuRUk3GLoVI5rrd6aHc1Ph2wCQvNs39LSx_hOmVBjmeXk4ES-xGF7jqctYNhMxErw9yRlSalmTEh9t8N90qHTlxc-8NHeLG4MfCkNyazS7_Hqs_Z15nQDwdd8mLS7cquPhRBYGym5d7X3CrIMOkOUp5yHnC5Ss1lUVCBRYplXFt7HjXPG3hZ32nNwfwrXetJw9M6JpPcIk-dy46tl9whiXwR08mWu-JQgoh_4Bg8RSt9x9dTWo3kEKT2DX9fQuVuMxWXFMvm7l3iYxIp7x0rE5wB_RKIdqzWMjTTWHBS03MFhkGpHmPUjk9O2sWbZae71XcKU98pduqXBd_iut-JCfVvY0QAOEp6McZSdhdZWL7hDC32R0nEh8g_krlo3EgY-HGb9e33iYuiaGUfNZ-UaXzry4_FXN1hcpBzVS4xatp5nqJi0uSZWGM3rVNmQ1cYY7/4eg/b7piuoyOScGt-IZha9xAfA/h2/h001.8Yp2Vw1AtRhdFubxVFP2t_Sa4LO0h9GEL-OXhj9T4LI)
3️⃣ **_Florida:_ Dems work to overturn the state's 6-week abortion ban **
In Florida, where the GOP has a clear majority, state Dems aren’t backing down and are making it clear they will continue the fight for reproductive freedoms. [This week, Democratic legislators filed a new measure to overturn the state’s six-week abortion ban → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.RNKlYhK-gnABEpCnH88uwFY2uRvckrDC7e8BVzfRfW_x6MesqyrRyI6EXNmp5D2Sx6EzMPAXmiHaQkrM41ti_gqynaRtPk4_o6xcuZ-ETcQ-B-UNZUkjHoOdCQ5K3DHfUIfc63ddOt2VRn34di36N8r-cSHXtP3a4mJkMgkL6YkYg4o7Ay0NZtiUw7N4ivy5kA0mFxfBOHch1RuHrraamp7F31VI1itiCOavYLyW9gqbL1AKT_GQvdpgTI3qCfVxSLgiyRxOBaZ-Jd5MvqRjUkwF5jUzuAUH9fomuJP7oVfNwPHLh2D7jVmqctCfBc0mQ9X2Hif-MJB7SNU-wYzj9TPFFTGvEnn50NsFT2Hhi3pYSxFnIB0pwmjXWsAf77nyylEEskmydoMka1oHvHLq5gAS0CBmhKKsIDbbUz9DHaELTig2loKCEzB87RROui2SiXPaf5o1tRDogpAtvQnJvHsA3uheUTnj4u3X8cJB3x0j6Tn-SGCL4Rii7Qo9yNd2AX3aghd3tmhIphnr9Mz1GozzDdKc1KyiCDKE3lrn7uPPqcNn5gCO-P8LXYa_UtOwZEdEpVzp3TgGsNxQaFbDyx-bHNH-BJeR8cKPWG6uXsYFjbcyxwE3_-Mm5lg6i6z0-R-J-Y-Nd1fNyvDcaJmsLA/4eg/b7piuoyOScGt-IZha9xAfA/h3/h001.DlCBcxJ6b26K0-SUCtFHnHYVOztyX5i5s4kWpT63MZ4)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ DLCC highlights top candidates **
Ahead of Pennsylvania’s majority-making House special election, the DLCC is thrilled to announce Dan Goughnour as a Spotlight candidate. This race could determine the future of Pennsylvania, so we’re making sure you have a chance to get to know Dan. [**Read more about him here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDSRZN6vSOQk-5GlHZI639dYwzBONzveM5LkvYKVrvWjh0kssqNgwEDoFNKspGHDcFEdhmkj91TiN9LaEgM9NPsOqzJsamdKhm_iBItlNCwAej6xOIf5Ah6GYD6sU1j4WLjzgQQEz_2rJVnOlviQFHGr8rzPWP_H9rNLmbhs7fDBMm93EHoBrJX65lVEHjS330fgnyQb-l3kh5zH3KuuL6frfxq3LTOLpS1c2CmQusziVlK6oke-ssXdgyxtozQhpaS2XhsAslSPFXysAD-cKcEly1j9ul4O5PWH74FxEi2lz0tdEiss_CbBc9DaKfqyow0aD89Qi8ssrV8tQWpTQyVTVZpD0KWM4QWzF8cFB8TwKr6NEE7FkSeYU0lqh8mxzzYIgsXEjEicnp5EkOpF8NOg7PW2aRWYew105I0PFOz93uRZBBno5N6sl2zPQKCU6ElgQz217Mc4nnNdlvy4sop9qOmiJKXJH-0Dw_HGup_QULZClPHrQV7YmImPrujVAXpuwiltk79UxR3unngDldc5aFLUqKez5qcAYzvWmEGJZL5X7ngwPQluh1OqyQygsytD6TMDk8iCx2Mok_M5ju8TWMd4Fbh6LJZkUMMxxpdrg/4eg/b7piuoyOScGt-IZha9xAfA/h4/h001.Bcos4_xl0mFqF0_qyk7npbFZfUpluml0VIX00yVNxok)

Hodges ruling, which protects same-sex marriages. 3️⃣ Florida: Dems work to overturn the state's 6-week abortion ban In Florida, where the GOP has a clear majority, state Dems aren’t backing down and are making it clear they will continue the fight for reproductive freedoms. 🔦 Spotlight: DLCC highlights top candidates Ahead of Pennsylvania’s majority-making House special election, the DLCC is thrilled to announce Dan Goughnour as a Spotlight candidate. # BREAKING: Elon Musk calls for DEFUNDING Wikipedia
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T009fd800-d1ea-4bb2-b65c-35f0289407ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter – We know. The extreme right's actions have been ... well, goofy. They've called for removing the Department of Education, banning books, and now, defunding a free and non-partisan resource that millions of people use to learn! The LAST thing Americans need right now is less education by defunding a valuable information resource. So we need to make sure Democrats are fighting for education in all forms! With Trump's campaign for anti-intellectualism, [we need to know your answer to our one-question poll now:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T020cb177-89eb-4084-875a-defd6f52a52a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Do you support funding for our education?

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: It’s official. I JUST launched my campaign for Governor of Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in battleground Ohio.
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6d4424b751a4d85ac36e274146e5716&_e=4ySgsr0bvP1aTsJgJTsnymRS_Z41HEbC92PacSDkCwN7lNMfcYlqoK-ry7SM7A_DtKfon478PVZKxcdYveD4pVn6e4Xt2oJH26_hpCabETeJ3Uzg9WOXPJqNhU3AkXwDteRAxQUrv_wL_sRgE5Q3X_CQVxFI0ulWC410Jg1flOlZQElwUzsN0mqK6w0cyT0_JiKbMHaccj4KuhsvNbmMAFnqyaMNo8SbjicGNThgGahsHhPR65AVaLJ6sJMKSp607NMf-Yvao-LdSvrwvF3F6TOGRCdWBzSkV0Xz7Munc2hs5On2K5bjxM4DpgWDDU1X9F24f7-B2RytT7g6qvsCacYY5z3ZCdNGZulJOU7r6R6n5Shx41Tsi0mLC4__tj-qJwkxcMxDsp248CP913k9ighus4RBkOEQH5hzNv_TBWy0nZsp_7yLKGgpMwIiiEUU)
---
My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It's official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

**[If that's all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6d4424b751a4d85ac36e274146e5716&_e=4ySgsr0bvP1aTsJgJTsnymRS_Z41HEbC92PacSDkCwN7lNMfcYlqoK-ry7SM7A_DtKfon478PVZKxcdYveD4pVn6e4Xt2oJH26_hpCabETeJ3Uzg9WOXPJqNhU3AkXwDteRAxQUrv_wL_sRgE5Q3X_CQVxFI0ulWC410Jg1flOlZQElwUzsN0mqK6w0cyT0_JiKbMHaccj4KuhsvNbmMAFnqyaMNo8SbjicGNThgGahsHhPR65AVaLJ6sJMKSp607NMf-Yvao-LdSvrwvF3F6W-lLsyexpxQopiRIXfrhG6iTnQ2_8Cbg7WGpKHGf3by8LNlMuHsJwFTspEhOjvnXa-wTP2xNQcmgbgTQIlDFsr7QzUJEnU1Ig8Cnp8xNiFnWJiE1xrd4IigE3YJU67uTzYNExNkaT6ePEUtfyrEeLBJLtq5Hoo4_i5eHLjdjyNT "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**
---
| | [**PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6d4424b751a4d85ac36e274146e5716&_e=4ySgsr0bvP1aTsJgJTsnymRS_Z41HEbC92PacSDkCwN7lNMfcYlqoK-ry7SM7A_DtKfon478PVZKxcdYveD4pVn6e4Xt2oJH26_hpCabETeJ3Uzg9WOXPJqNhU3AkXwDteRAxQUrv_wL_sRgE5Q3X_CQVxFI0ulWC410Jg1flOlZQElwUzsN0mqK6w0cyT0_JiKbMHaccj4KuhsvNbmMAFnqyaMNo8SbjicGNThgGahsHhPR65AVaLJ6sJMKSp607NMf-Yvao-LdSvrwvF3F6Rz9mH3ALihZ_qBFB7LGst-SL0a6JMCck5hHKc7SdzTMf7UXpLYk8xDd7sPYJIEGh_wcAy0XRAXFq-DcPq8a4znoTTxWmNRxVGqJHXhjJ86a_vGs3BqRcFiOM5t0YFiC6tkDxmLvpaGwOeLRplThSIfcCvhqIIg5d0eOibwzPali)
---
My platform is simple:
1. **Tell folks the truth** - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
2. **Support Trump 100%** - he will have no better partner at the state level
3. **Overhaul failing schools** - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda
9. **Secure elections and prosecute fraud** - our elections will be the safest in the country
10. **Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy** - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat

I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running.

I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio.

**[If you agree, I'd be honored to have you aboard.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6d4424b751a4d85ac36e274146e5716&_e=4ySgsr0bvP1aTsJgJTsnymRS_Z41HEbC92PacSDkCwN7lNMfcYlqoK-ry7SM7A_DtKfon478PVZKxcdYveD4pVn6e4Xt2oJH26_hpCabETeJ3Uzg9WOXPJqNhU3AkXwDteRAxQUrv_wL_sRgE5Q3X_CQVxFI0ulWC410Jg1flOlZQElwUzsN0mqK6w0cyT0_JiKbMHaccj4KuhsvNbmMAFnqyaMNo8SbjicGNThgGahsHhPR65AVaLJ6sJMKSp607NMf-Yvao-LdSvrwvF3F6R8RmqKO-gH3qtokX8VdfZsrNhvc9MOoh7BYC-RVjClD4Aupz0WOF426bXtPVAY1JtQKIX0mss0ZH6KHStrdh_eLhPZcMmljCh-yCrLJPjT7uLs8AYZNgM6ofm2Mk8IKRI3Aur_2iYzQmHoTl4rN4YnwKLfZ43iMvHc_IU3j3eCj "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

So here's my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too.

Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.

**But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win.** **[So with all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6d4424b751a4d85ac36e274146e5716&_e=4ySgsr0bvP1aTsJgJTsnymRS_Z41HEbC92PacSDkCwN7lNMfcYlqoK-ry7SM7A_DtKfon478PVZKxcdYveD4pVn6e4Xt2oJH26_hpCabETeJ3Uzg9WOXPJqNhU3AkXwDteRAxQUrv_wL_sRgE5Q3X_CQVxFI0ulWC410Jg1flOlZQElwUzsN0mqK6w0cyT0_JiKbMHaccj4KuhsvNbmMAFnqyaMNo8SbjicGNThgGahsHhPR65AVaLJ6sJMKSp607NMf-Yvao-LdSvrwvF3F6VlapLDIb3Ay5nrD3KJpSXxLRiTRMNqMznLaaHml6NzTw_zLVFFWCjOk9dmj8gfE3Tuq-HyegwmztUu_Sss7t9f-i7ySR36itXQdXGpYwElSoLz-6Ppx5rUz6pxuBut95nL--bBmXQX9gbtCJpj0hvUHzYVy8E5Q9zdrbBuCGb2p "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in.

_So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? _
---

| | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e6d4424b751a4d85ac36e274146e5716&_e=4ySgsr0bvP1aTsJgJTsnymRS_Z41HEbC92PacSDkCwN7lNMfcYlqoK-ry7SM7A_DtKfon478PVZKxcdYveD4pVn6e4Xt2oJH26_hpCabETeJ3Uzg9WOXPJqNhU3AkXwDteRAxQUrv_wL_sRgE5Q3X_CQVxFI0ulWC410Jg1flOlZQElwUzsN0mqK6w0cyT0_JiKbMHaccj4KuhsvNbmMAFnqyaMNo8SbjicGNThgGahsHhPR65AVaLJ6sJMKSp607NMf-Yvao-LdSvrwvF3F6deuE4FMf9GokHTEBdmslkCgm-d_X4x1N-0Dm0mvgI-o9steCKaMsVh_P4BJB_qsbkhfhRqVjiXBPYcTCzj71g4T_gHzS4G0IrmAu4_3ozw87DfUzI9Cd7JCaiNMoVMrb6Z1jEsrgqxhPAa3fWJAUNrCd8z80Ffr84xXFhg9zknr)

clean_body: I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in battleground Ohio. I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy. It's official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." | | My platform is simple: 1. Tell folks the truth - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak 2. Support Trump 100% - he will have no better partner at the state level 3. Overhaul failing schools - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers 4. Restore national identity - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood 5. Deport every illegal alien - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office 6. Roll back transgenderism - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors 7. Slash taxes and lower prices - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it 8. Gut all DEI programs in the state - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda 9. Secure elections and prosecute fraud - our elections will be the safest in the country 10. Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running. I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." So here's my final pitch to you: The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too. Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot. But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in. So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? | | | | | | | | Regardless, thanks for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you'll consider joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America. Together, we'll make history! God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: The Democratic Party
subject: The worst president America has ever seen →
body:
We have one message for Trump and Musk: We’re coming.
---
Derek, In just a few weeks, Elon Musk has shown that he is the worst president America’s ever seen. We have one message for Trump and Musk: _**We’re coming.**_ This is a new Democratic Party, and we’re taking the gloves off. We cannot and will not stand for their extreme, harmful agenda and efforts to drag our country back centuries. We’re in this fight until the very end, but it’s going to take Democrats from every corner of the nation stepping up and joining this movement to defeat Trump and his MAGA cronies. name: James O'Keefe
subject: I'm suing the DOJ
body:
| | | Together we can hold the DOJ and the deep state accountable.
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c304ab9e1aa4a01b851336861a3bde5&_e=OnNTFq5VQQFLeNLbQbrzX1t9xoAA7CyCXkDjp0zoRltFc7W43TDjPfRSLtzKdxl4sV2rEn1YSnAnmisKFcOeyH4NsbXPQmlbgw7YS3xrF8UvmwCvPaZNyhy7rawjY1gpj7BSD_bwO_KV8bdkj1v-6Qu9OTM5g9MgqGyRpDvcLdZwGaawm9JwIRM-5Ix-lRlsUI_-OHU6ACSruP-AJu_1yV5kz0S3dQC0kV8QaSlntvHrtnLYo_RvMx66dzgO4uqHqp3gkJ9v0FBcxaWRxhLzfhdS6wbgBiXRlm7rhwLyZpgQfk8adCnJUWRn2eWsIJ_gf9uxUHA8os5EBLOK2mzvyADFUQWdcol-Y--n_P4yALhKddXt1-BPGbPPamVi6fYqE3OppAV4_jOziPCkBydA3g%3D%3D)
---
Three years ago, The DOJ threatened me and other journalists with _**criminal charges** _in connection to the explosive Ashley Biden Diary. Heavily armed FBI agents burst into my residence and ransacked my personal property. They raided two of my fellow journalists homes too. To this day, they refuse to show me the evidence they used as probable cause to conduct a heavily armed raid of my residence. From day one my lawyers and I knew the case against me was purely political – and it succeeded in suppressing politically damaging contents of the Ashley Biden diary. As soon as Attorney General Pam Bondi was sworn in, the charges against me were suddenly dropped. But do you really believe that the corrupt actors at the DOJ that sent armed FBI agents with battering rams to my house are suddenly going to see the light? Remember, this this the same weaponized DOJ that: **\---> Investigated moms who spoke at school board meetings **** **** \---> Turned a blind eye to our reporting of corruption and abuse in federal prisons**** ****\---> Attempted to censor our reporting of voter registration irregularities in Georgia.** Now they’re playing possum – some of them might think they can just wait Trump out like they did last term. As a journalist, I refuse to let them hide in the shadows. We must expose them now. That’s why I’m laying the groundwork for our lawsuit against the DOJ. We need to expose the ringleaders. We need to uncover all internal communications. The career corrupt actors who’ve been weaponizing the DOJ for years aren’t going to go down without a fight. We’ve seen their playbook before. During the first Trump administration, my reporting caught DOJ officials plotting to “resist from the inside” because “they couldn’t really get fired”. But with your help, we can expose these bad actors and hold them accountable. When we win, It's going to be a win for the first amendment. And if we can prove that they broke the law, you can be sure that we will push for criminal prosecutions. My friend, this political witch hunt against me has already cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars. But we’re not going to cure the rot at the Department of Justice by nibbling the edges. We need to go in there with our own battering ram. My lawsuit will do just that. [That’s why I’m calling on you to join me in this crucial effort by making a $25 tax-deductible contribution to the Citizen Journalism Foundation today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c304ab9e1aa4a01b851336861a3bde5&_e=OnNTFq5VQQFLeNLbQbrzX1t9xoAA7CyCXkDjp0zoRltFc7W43TDjPfRSLtzKdxl4sV2rEn1YSnAnmisKFcOeyH4NsbXPQmlbgw7YS3xrF8UvmwCvPaZNyhy7rawjY1gpj7BSD_bwO_KV8bdkj1v-6Qu9OTM5g9MgqGyRpDvcLdZwGaawm9JwIRM-5Ix-lRlsUI_-OHU6ACSruP-AJu_1yV5kz0S3dQC0kV8QaSlntvHrtnLYo_RvMx66dzgO4uqH6_yJSHmeI0Wcb-6WtqiANrf7G7mVgzFKUz-VnNOBiRsbHPumxqP5psnt5tkJMrzm1DKGUy2G1rql43QH68QtPoG11OWhObH3pmFEbuQrINXpsoZ-h00sWtmEfLvaJ-S3o20aHkrTJXYK5liMUHY4cA%3D%3D) Together we can hold the DOJ and the deep state accountable.
---
Thank you for your support,
---
| | James O'Keefe
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c304ab9e1aa4a01b851336861a3bde5&_e=OnNTFq5VQQFLeNLbQbrzX1t9xoAA7CyCXkDjp0zoRltFc7W43TDjPfRSLtzKdxl4sV2rEn1YSnAnmisKFcOeyH4NsbXPQmlbgw7YS3xrF8UvmwCvPaZNyhy7rawjY1gpj7BSD_bwO_KV8bdkj1v-6Qu9OTM5g9MgqGyRpDvcLdZwGaawm9JwIRM-5Ix-lRlsUI_-OHU6ACSruP-AJu_1yV5kz0S3dQC0kV8QaSlntvHrtnLYo_RvMx66dzgO4uqHnkDAO503VKPQi_dwk6WR-0yunPHQusjArGP_K-CF-39lTzHXfVRHm-fpFBuFDv7bN1baA_ykB-6VYOMQfDo0GBij97-wbmXrst8otWaVsmItUiQMMkuvq-d4mSBTeo5Gt4J8NYRptXZncbj9TqX0HA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c304ab9e1aa4a01b851336861a3bde5&_e=OnNTFq5VQQFLeNLbQbrzX1t9xoAA7CyCXkDjp0zoRltFc7W43TDjPfRSLtzKdxl4sV2rEn1YSnAnmisKFcOeyH4NsbXPQmlbgw7YS3xrF8UvmwCvPaZNyhy7rawjY1gpj7BSD_bwO_KV8bdkj1v-6Qu9OTM5g9MgqGyRpDvcLdZwGaawm9JwIRM-5Ix-lRlsUI_-OHU6ACSruP-AJu_1yV5kz0S3dQC0kV8QaSlntvHrtnLYo_RvMx66dzgO4uqHuB1qqeLy0zORClcHDrzJJkXqecvTsxIIS71YwSBn3I7eW7YPMCtnsDOvafVEw2Nrgh7ezheKAZfKgX94CcYf-ZhhKMI998xKo5xKWqcy-FuTcQnm-h_hdSZLIgVlqVaEZSqE28AsOix21KnU_Hl6ig%3D%3D)
---
**James O'Keefe**

| | Dear Fellow American,

Your benefits are expiring, and time is running out to activate your [Heritage Foundation membership for 2025](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ak82XPsayLVUusw7IYiYFG9wge-SNej_ruKpIaaqLMleoLDMDfWir5tlbbKrkuMRt_3kOdUWurXKx0E3zYTPOlQzS7raHalhh-u_4jh4Hy-HZw_8AWIifQNfzoP4gbLBy_S0XhErsVoXjsGjnOT1QJ-DphgIpMxoZyQ7Pkd36iTnQ3c7peQS1MFpnyhPpuMQWeCutZIxu4AFp66dknBb8VY2C_655PapvYxSOCJBQJcHKxeljePXxBT7rJAUPacSiHPv5WC1lKpjqMAmBQqzXOuPdHU1SYZD_4hFQs80xKf0ByuuiYzFOfg_hyrqLcv41bplaqDjun2Wd4UxGdkyUhk053N02tF0UWGNFImc3ESSqR3jcqGRShIsCJUwHAdJrVp3IfwGZND3-2gG/16bY0RcnreJPLL2Lg5uweNyDgAVlrMDm/6).

If you don't act now, you could lose out on your member benefits like:
* **Your official Heritage Foundation membership card:** Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own exclusive membership card.
* **Special invitations to virtual Heritage events:** As a member, you will be invited to attend virtual gatherings where you can hear from and interact directly with Heritage experts and other conservative movement leaders.
* **Exclusive Updates from Heritage Leadership:** We want you to be constantly informed about the impact of your membership. Every member receives regular updates from the front lines of policy battles happening in Washington D.C. and across the country.

Most important, by activating your membership today, you'll be supporting our effort to rescue the American Dream and defend America's founding principles.

Right now, we are working with the Trump Administration to advance the policy priorities that matter most to you--like dismantling the Deep State, securing our borders, eliminating woke ideologies, and promoting economic opportunity for all.

Your membership is key to the success of these efforts.

**Don 't let your member benefits expire. Activate your Heritage Foundation membership with a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/activate-now**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/9xTP2IGGAQqHJlsFCJ86leZiE0JjSbPJ4iZcg8imGsZ6ZyDwQsXH0PRvUrck7jw5P2vz-D9HsBZ0uV0xixo2VPO5iw9FBb5VN3EHQN4lFatUge3RQv9NeJqWybrJ94t87PHebgsHfRpGnsK5yvsd1UvatPG2Fn9GTNxkPfO-3MTR1uQpS0oLIjiTCu9vWtqWh5AaNXSJs8QGYF8FN8iJJnACWpHdCjLj2Zyj69GcDDk7mx8lGVGyVRu7fkYrFG6dPbgmpFwX2e0qGBFUR9yZ8zgvm3f6w0oCptZeqMCxao5oqRVZimeAL_Lsb8u3Biv--x5TmL5YblA8LW-pr38JrdwKk6gt3fiHU9_ROdmf1c03lg_HdntdxDvuzGW53FOe3fvaXP_nG4oUwC1i/OsfbmutGdujozsAkj18GT_W0VzQ_Lgat/6)

Thank you for standing with us at this important time for our country.

Best regards,

name: National Alerts
subject: 3 Foods That Fight Memory Loss
body:
| | | | [](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---
| | Why do some people stay sharp as a whip as they get older, while others have trouble recalling names, dates, and even conversations?

New research from Harvard University suggests age may not be the culprit.

And one Boston medical doctor now says memory problems are often caused by the foods you're eating — or NOT eating.

Dr. George Karanastasis, MD says: _"Your brain needs fuel to create new brain cells, recall memories, and focus on tasks. And where does it get that fuel? From the foods you eat."_

However, due to a change in modern dietary habits, Dr. K says most of us aren't getting the nutrients our brain needs. He says this lack of nutrients can cause brain fog, forgetfulness, or worse.

_"When your brain doesn't receive the right nutrients, it literally starts to starve. And that's when you start to suffer those embarrassing senior moments. You might forget people's names, walk into a room and forget why you're there, or even get lost driving to familiar places,"_ Dr. K says.

Fortunately, Dr. K developed a simple protocol that can help fight memory loss.

Best of all, it doesn't require any major lifestyle changes. It just requires adding [**these 3 foods back into your diet**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.).

Dr. K recently put together a video revealing these foods. And since the video was released, it's gone viral, racking up more than 1 million views. Thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this protocol.

He says: _"I've seen this protocol work for thousands of people. People keep telling me: 'Dr. K, I feel so much sharper and smarter. Even my family noticed.' It's wonderful to hear how many lives this has changed."_

Now, what about you? Are you concerned about your fading memory? How would you like to take back control of your life?

If so, watch the video at the link below and try this protocol for yourself. You'll discover which foods can help make sure your brain lasts as long as your body.
---
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Project 2025
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We must elect the next generation of progressives who will defend our country from fascism.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250302-1&t=1&akid=1809%2E587540%2EFNxb2P)
Remember Project 2025, Peter? Let’s take a look back:
**First** , in 2022, 140 former Trump staffers got together to write a 900-page manual for reorganizing the entire federal government to serve their right-wing agenda.
**Then** , on the campaign trail, Trump claimed that he had "nothing to do with Project 2025," had not read it and didn't intend to read it.
**Now** , we’re watching Trump enact _the exact_ cruel, racist, and bigoted policies outlined in Project 2025. Trump lied, plain and simple.
**Our best and only solution is to start the work NOW to elect the next generation of progressives who will defend our country from fascism.**
[**Can you please chip in $5 so that Leaders We Deserve can support more candidates and defeat the far-right agenda by electing a record number of young progressives?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250302-1?refcode=em20250302-1809&amount=5&refcode2=1809_587540_FNxb2P&akid=1809%2E587540%2EFNxb2P)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250302-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250302-1809&refcode2=1809_587540_FNxb2P&akid=1809%2E587540%2EFNxb2P)**
Here are just a few of the policies Trump has enacted that are straight from the Project 2025 playbook:
* Banning transgender people from serving in the military
* Ending all DEI programs within the government
* Withdrawing from the World Health Organization
* Eliminating the Office of Environmental Justice and External Civil Rights
* And so many more

**In order to repair our democracy and build a better future, we must weed out this far-right extremism. That starts by electing a new generation of young leaders who will fight back and advance a progressive vision for the future.**
Leaders We Deserve is investing in candidates who reflect our generation and its values — giving them the resources they need to run strong campaigns, win, and change the face of power.
[**Please chip in whatever you can today. Every dollar makes a difference and goes straight to our mission of supporting the next generation of leaders.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250302-1?refcode=em20250302-1809&amount=5&refcode2=1809_587540_FNxb2P&akid=1809%2E587540%2EFNxb2P)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250302-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250302-1809&refcode2=1809_587540_FNxb2P&akid=1809%2E587540%2EFNxb2P)**
With resolve,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250302-1&t=2&refcode2=1809_587540_FNxb2P&akid=1809%2E587540%2EFNxb2P)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Leaders We Deserve

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: RE: “King Trump”
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250302-1252-foote&t=1001&akid=1252%2E342411%2Ek2HnRN ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud – again. Trump, in his
never-ending, money-burning, victory lap, has actually declared himself
“king.”

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250302-movement.7RRyhE&refcode=em20250302-1252&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1252%2E342411%2Ek2HnRN ][IMG]

This is not just absurd — it’s dangerous, and our Squad won’t stand by as
he drags this country further down this undemocratic path.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250302-movement.7RRyhE&refcode=em20250302-1252&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1252%2E342411%2Ek2HnRN ]If you stand with our Squad, chip in today to fight back against Trump
and the far-right’s destruction.

A monarchy is the exact opposite of everything America was built on,
Peter, yet
here we are. Trump, with the full support of MAGA and his billionaire
backers, are inching closer to turning this country into an oligarchy. By
justifying his executive orders and letting Elon Musk run rampant, the
far-right is stripping away the very foundations of our democracy and
selling it off piece by piece.

Peter, our
Squad won’t be intimidated by the chaos and absurdity of the far-right.

Instead, we’re doubling down on holding elected officials accountable to
show up for the people, not to cater to destructive billionaires who only
care about lining their own pockets. We’re standing up to a system that’s
rigged against us.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250302-movement.7RRyhE&refcode=em20250302-1252&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1252%2E342411%2Ek2HnRN ]If you believe in fighting for a government that works for people, not
billionaires, please chip in to help strengthen our movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250302-movement.7RRyhE&refcode=em20250302-1252&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1252%2E342411%2Ek2HnRN ]Contribute ››

The future of our democracy is on the line and we need you in this fight.

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1252%2E342411%2Ek2HnRN

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I want to tell you personally:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.
I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.
I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.
| |
---
| | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: _I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. _
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvSyhpKdstD81QEWjO-0C3LG2xysvDJk_HI3DtEDLM4I1f41SIkpI9xxt3FBB81lRHJ_FP7a3a3_aMJv702ISXiY00irQRD3SW-SwA2EXkPRXbnpkK_-xIkTBuXfrfxSsxnwgkg-7g677up96V7_foTGQ%3D)
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvSwfAqIyscpnJfGO982Ye6P-jsQR6RPxwqoubd4ncBGiqm9d6V8psbzAY9OMe1a0ub5gtWaKVpYUOnEUS9PsO73ZCqY2ReH-PjId72J4B6qXxMUEmstRyZAlPfggzRyAqxk7Mgp-kWOx_oWDCYg-iAgk%3D "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvS_oJLcTYIRXsPTRvG7dqIsfpI312Ixb6cGP5HuMfkmMY8_etUc4CFV4QD_eXs8DARkGCYUnh10Y6U8YBbJnb_cp2-rxF-xnri8N5C7rb9hUFBs_kH6zMHJUHRED3O9WmnvibLKAsi_tW1OoSpKiNtoY%3D)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvSy67rCKUe1IPoje6c2cqJSE8HMwl4N37d60pbCznC5JYjeFfYOzyutQepLxSRC17jW_MpZHwxlu4eqctNfxJ2mbosMmXlKmM5Dct6oM0x6jscX9ds-RB2bU7OUwbH3RKCXXPkJodOH66XMZ7MlnmChk%3D)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvS7l49_Wqqe3AA-JtEnF5DTgSXHvd0d0QclWXodQ7T-UGkwdHVoMdQD8dkCFXiYgHnc6Qo9kVccgvO4KPN3KohdlO6dFznseNzhpAqYSiUkjjNU66lEGtonCTj8y_vKt96_Z7FLiRB2F-JquHkiTYgRA%3D)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvS6RXW5EZMcjoaJpvA1bQcaPPzveDq9l9RTsdtAj7Aw8BV5-2QZtwEUL3-9jGU1d7tiTY4VHW9f_PVd83XvccI3C2kUVsywZrpupL_mD6OS2e9y0m4XjPE3OrlAHCRWhPLWmBbKf12OE66X46xIVh-q4%3D "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvS3_FzHrsx-pDwfrra0R-k9m4D-UYsGxd-Sw9wi8WAwWTydNmlMHY66EF4FIb1Afb9vbIfrvwZx_69WbFyv28T2JQhaUwhq5E6_IegZ3qQKFO6yXTj9Q7fNAH6_04n6uiK50y8UKA-qrhlSMQAHIKiIg%3D)
---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvSyeTxq2Wu_-A8hm2QyH2fzLmcGLyuOro9IjqXvHmQtr0-HyJIOwkKnyAc8K9nhtOnuec_tTzXxhquk9L1EFMW-7Kvd-GGmSYS0SpDfBa05ZWc-iWNKD7Vr6JGxvemDaL4fv02GJX4KjRXjU9rz48GZk%3D)
---
We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvS_kO-OwMrc-dmqr9M1txAwRcnuNtmNsjcSnobSbrpCPn4N_6KVy1njKdzFvsOCgHOUvRog6jtB0GlYPxa1YsDvelX4DeOWP9v-hth8hJzH0uDnJJ8PZXvvDCvVvmusMaplyL_K9FvqcQecVQ5uES1xM%3D)
---
That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. [I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ed86bb090e746ebbb556b8d3b7d48cc&_e=QI0zyPD6MlBLdaOjYI4I_wITGXx7-vGfRcn4LEiWD4ucE9bWQ5vLYoQO79hc2d_0yYweq2k-DtcPq9ed6iw-42W4Xe0cmz9aXLVDFQRMdRyjdXfCbHhv4B64B0-8zSCT2_BXvj1_UWNvpWNLyJWfZ6_qgh-rek77X9QKh2dVMIMrZJRR7zAFOrYN2Zs4GjNs1RakBzyZ36jWHSU1AoABNEzW33GBZtPFuGvUYv0DsD5RbOHS7HbXHkvpRmfXan9NOpaZxaOj2-O_elXL_QPvS2qWTbY5C1yJgjD3mxsMw6BDWS79ETC7euYOFh3SiS31ZgInefhNOHXIh5AtKsrjc4gczjFZFFI76qxJ9U4DyON2rWZa4SuR0oq2eY1ljNV5j7iYSMjCBCj6aD0HOzPS1KcYNDFGkTFcqnxAr8Wnge0%3D "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.")

clean_body: I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country. I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment. I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment. | | | | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy. I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. | "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment." WHY RUN NOW? President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote. | It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally. | Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely. This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America! But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW! WHY OHIO? This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno. | The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for." | WHY GOVERNOR? Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. | We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. | That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country." So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor. "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size." | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time. God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: AOC
subject: Elon Musk is a leech on the public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This guy is a leech on the public.
No matter how many billions he gets in tax cuts and government contracts, it will never be enough for him.
Now he’s going after the elderly, the disabled, and orphaned children so he can pocket it in tax cuts for himself.
**It’s disgusting.**
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire, right-wing donors.
Our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next four years.
[ Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250302.unVTMs&refcode=em20250302-8255-P_FND_RES_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8255%2E2526796%2EuNJDgQ)

Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/_fBlfpNnYv9rZCcPh2OKUL8CZzG2bx7wLcEzIZycnnzz-7ilcj2V9H7_8NngfL5EcC8MLLhR9FhE-QwV2DTjvvgLWW6ggKPB5dwUaiLoi4wyX-CpB0WBBn63irZLAp-Y7x3apniPB-ytjmPXD6i5hyIaFYdMCotpEZCFFntSBU2acsLcYJxFE4e72dseQwMzLmscDCA-6PAr5VECeJAacSGelL2bJwuNwNY28jlenQ72HHMsfNXgNYBnFXy9Fx8Mvc7K7TKxmXqLuCTvUWItDdT-d-djciWCagWgeOSQIQVl6whPFYyuB6W5ODxfdCPgrv4QbPQDLhvtyaFsVCpkXrRa4oK1PNIfMG8qRrPyPCj7JWzY0zT5dzBybf8_zkUFsnYVFfqPcCGifxsQNEc1nNZNeut5B9nFBS2Ogo6kIIKnognoJE2bvg/oPQkW_DMRaNhrA8eT2QtMhTUzHQvlsYi/6).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Are you familiar with Project 2025?

**Project 2025 is an extreme plan created by Trump’s MAGA allies** that would dismantle the federal government, undermine democracy, and prioritize their far-right agenda. And its chief architect, Russ Vought, who is currently running OMB into the ground, and many of its contributors are joining the Trump administration every day.
Here’s what’s at stake:
* **Criminalize reproductive health care:** Project 2025 calls for a nationwide abortion ban and limits access to contraception.
* **Defund public programs:** The plan would defund public schools, libraries, and programs millions of Americans depend on.
* **Expand executive power:** Project 2025 also consolidates power in the presidency, weakens checks and balances, and would erode our democratic institutions.
* **Environmental protections:** Project 2025 would slash regulations designed to combat climate change and protect our air and water.
* **Erase LGBTQ+ rights:** The GOP wants to strip away fundamental protections and freedoms for LGBTQ+ Americans.

Now that Republicans have taken over Washington, D.C., we're seeing Trump try to make Project 2025's main goals a reality.
**Our research team is compiling responses and wants to know: ****[Do you support Project 2025? Expand executive power: Project 2025 also consolidates power in the presidency, weakens checks and balances, and would erode our democratic institutions. name: Katie Porter
subject: Dems must fight back (and this shouldn’t be a hot take)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39477%2E3422442%2Ekfe7H7)
Donald Trump and his administration are taking a wrecking ball to bedrock programs, like funding for lifesaving medical research and clean air. And up next on the chopping block will be healthcare.
That’s why I was surprised to read that a pundit suggested Democrats should take a “tactical pause” from fighting Trump and his congressional cronies:
_Let the Republicans disagree with themselves publicly. Do not offer a single vote. Do not insert yourself into the discourse. Do not throw a monkey wrench into the equation. Simply step away and let ’em flirt with a default. Just when they’ve pushed themselves to the brink and it appears they could collapse the global economy, come in and save the day._
_Let the Republicans push for their tax cuts, their Medicaid cuts, their food stamp cuts. Give them all the rope they need. Then let dysfunction paralyze their House caucus and rupture their tiny majority. Let them reveal themselves as incapable of governing and, at the right moment, start making a coordinated, consistent argument about the need to protect Medicare, Medicaid, worker benefits and middle-class pocketbooks. Let the Republicans crumble, let the American people see it, and wait until they need us to offer our support._
This theory assumes that Republicans will fail to pass any meaningful legislation. But that assumption doesn’t account for what we’ve seen, especially in Trump’s second administration. Time and time again, Republicans have fallen in line with Trump.
**Now more than ever is the time for Democrats to get loud, to be persuasive, to offer new ideas, and to lead.** Democrats in Congress have little formal power to legislate right now, but that shouldn’t be an excuse for inaction. At every level of government, Democrats need to fully engage. And our message is clear: “Trump’s policies will hurt you and we will fight like hell to stop it.”
I’ve long championed the need for Democrats to have a stronger message on the economy and to engage Americans all year-round and in every setting. It’s unwise to sit it out until election season, and it’s unacceptable to sit back until Republicans harm us.
Being a Democratic leader means being willing and able to explain why cutting Medicaid would devastate our hospitals and clinics, and how it’ll lead to worse health care for every single one of us.
Leaders should be able to explain why tariffs will drive up prices for all of us as consumers. Anyone running for office should support keeping America safe, and be able to connect that to investments in humanitarian foreign aid to stop wars.
Millions of Americans voted for Democrats in November. They voted for a party that will fight to uphold democracy and lower costs. We can’t just take a break and tell people to wait until chaos erupts.
We cannot wait, as this pundit suggested, “until people need us to offer support” because for so many Americans, like federal workers, LGBTQ+ people, and small businesses, the pain is already being felt.
Politics is NOT a game. Our politics and government affect the lives of real people.
**With a little bit of hope and a whole lot of grit, we can and must fight back against Trump and his MAGA enablers. Thanks for being a part of that fight.**
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250302?refcode=em20250302-39477&refcode2=39477_3422442_kfe7H7&akid=39477%2E3422442%2Ekfe7H7)

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250302-39477&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39477_3422442_kfe7H7&akid=39477%2E3422442%2Ekfe7H7)**

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

That’s how we picture your Sunday mornings from now on — because we just launched a Substack , and trust us, you won’t want to miss it. ✨ ✨ If you’re fired up about taking on Big Oil’s bought-and-paid-for politicians, or if you simply love a little behind-the-scenes Jane Fonda tea... this is the place to be. Think of it as your go-to spot for deep dives and exclusive updates straight from the frontlines of the climate fight. Oh, and if you missed Jane’s powerhouse SAG Awards speech last weekend? No worries. My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It's official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

**[If that's all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=67725aba59b54977a2acb3fc48ad2faa&_e=onGIZm-vuPxBSAfUpXUE3DA7Hr_fQyjOxdP_4a2jo13yTG1O22jEgWjZoXSFtEAfhkGcbtZXXwuNrAx4vBBAhRbPko4mifNWWyJodXpZB5Dk0Ye30W9EgexxnYxE56qBJAaInz6Yi6O3WJYoypjWipileCZErzYjwlXE6anJsa4yAonKSbpzwS3af2rtlUGNeivT5h5rnetv4RDsM4SUVW6_l724alcF3KhiuPxtjJS7EnfCOdQQbF7r7xl9DiapKbvRy_SfaVwLXtitx5Y32QT4k-CmOAk42q9woLv4C0J6rULozeGpMyERB1oJvOkTUJp4HVulVw1xZHCus20a-4cR6ctzrVykoqj9c-g7uFLFW9HWyxqXcNBoZ2XVqN6gWG2OFS3PWddUT7tNeXtN9fCTq1Aa0daTBSJDaeKSoDQ%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

My platform is simple:
1. **Tell folks the truth** - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
2. **Support Trump 100%** - he will have no better partner at the state level
3. **Overhaul failing schools** - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda
9. **Secure elections and prosecute fraud** - our elections will be the safest in the country
10. **Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy** - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat

I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running.

I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio.

**[If you agree, I'd be honored to have you aboard.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=67725aba59b54977a2acb3fc48ad2faa&_e=onGIZm-vuPxBSAfUpXUE3DA7Hr_fQyjOxdP_4a2jo13yTG1O22jEgWjZoXSFtEAfhkGcbtZXXwuNrAx4vBBAhRbPko4mifNWWyJodXpZB5Dk0Ye30W9EgexxnYxE56qBJAaInz6Yi6O3WJYoypjWipileCZErzYjwlXE6anJsa4yAonKSbpzwS3af2rtlUGNeivT5h5rnetv4RDsM4SUVW6_l724alcF3KhiuPxtjJS7EnfCOdQQbF7r7xl9DiapKbvRy_SfaVwLXtitx5Y32ciR-6Z3UzJIhZ2Ne3sjWWV41Xhi3MQorv9nZjqiT6MvAXgZD3DO90w5c9AJya3MrccPfX5Y7iU46e0-6U4qhl7PKMBHe477OU281xBsQTTJWUf3-_uIPyO5ZcCYNOhecvTIocH5Y0YNKUi0K2SM_hc%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

So here's my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too.

Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.

**But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win.** **[So with all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=67725aba59b54977a2acb3fc48ad2faa&_e=onGIZm-vuPxBSAfUpXUE3DA7Hr_fQyjOxdP_4a2jo13yTG1O22jEgWjZoXSFtEAfhkGcbtZXXwuNrAx4vBBAhRbPko4mifNWWyJodXpZB5Dk0Ye30W9EgexxnYxE56qBJAaInz6Yi6O3WJYoypjWipileCZErzYjwlXE6anJsa4yAonKSbpzwS3af2rtlUGNeivT5h5rnetv4RDsM4SUVW6_l724alcF3KhiuPxtjJS7EnfCOdQQbF7r7xl9DiapKbvRy_SfaVwLXtitx5Y32U_Ee1MnduJMEew4gWTvvOdvVYaQC4ZEgwLuZXUm9oHPdpyjqOlgZaPmxiy_mE4UIcmFHSgjCvuBzg4-DJQwYh6dw3xclf4HiSwTFyDV6_n2kVfA_2TnAnOHcNH5Gml5_HKgIwq8vNWoyiXkcA5U0uw%3D "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in.

_So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? _

America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." | | My platform is simple: 1. Tell folks the truth - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak 2. Support Trump 100% - he will have no better partner at the state level 3. Overhaul failing schools - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers 4. Restore national identity - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood 5. Deport every illegal alien - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office 6. Roll back transgenderism - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors 7. Slash taxes and lower prices - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it 8. Gut all DEI programs in the state - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda 9. Secure elections and prosecute fraud - our elections will be the safest in the country 10. Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running. I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." So here's my final pitch to you: The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state." On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too. Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot. But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in. So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? | | | | | | | | Regardless, thanks for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you'll consider joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America. Together, we'll make history! God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: Ravi Bhalla
subject: A Terrific Campaign Kickoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bhalla for Assembly 4 14th Street #119, Hoboken NJ, 07030
body:
Thank You for Joining Us
---
| | [ ](https://bhallanj.com/l/gTdeRScJIbDV)
---
Dear , I write to share a heartfelt thank you to the over 70 people who attended our campaign kickoff. By far, what moved me the most was the sincerity and authenticity of people who gathered together. From across Jersey City and Hoboken, some of the most active and consistent advocates for good, people-centered government joined our collective campaign launch. That support, the support of honest, sincere, and fierce advocates is deeply motivating. Thank you. Before I share some pictures, I would like to thank the speakers and current and former elected official and candidates who joined us this week. First the speakers: Current 32nd District Assemblyman John Allen; Hoboken Democratic Party Chairman and Councilman Joe Quintero; and Mamta Singh, Jersey City candidate for Council-at-Large on Councilman James Solomon’s ticket. In addition to the speakers, thank you to Hoboken Council Member James Doyle; Hoboken Board of Education President Aileen McGuirk; Jersey City Councilman James Solomon; Jersey City Council candidate Elena Little; Jersey City Council candidate Veronica Akaezuwa, former State Senator Bernie Kenny, and former Hoboken Council Member Vanessa Falco for attending. **[H ere’s a glimpse of our incredible night](https://bhallanj.com/l/3xZ65oJeFJAC)****.** We also received some positive coverage, which you can read **[here](https://bhallanj.com/l/2CpHwYwMbWhz)** and **[here](https://bhallanj.com/l/p8bciS1zmjVr)**. Our campaign is powered by authentic, grassroots supporters like you. If would you like to contribute to our campaign, please so do [here](https://bhallanj.com/l/JmcfMVH6Rehr). You can volunteer for our campaign [here](https://bhallanj.com/l/Ctk0mKCbK2CN). Let’s work to make our state government better, together. Sincerely, Ravi Bhalla
---

body:
Now, let's keep going.
Peter –

We hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for February – _and it’s because of you._

Your contributions allow us to continue to support good, honest leaders who will deliver on their promises and do what’s right for the people they serve. **But here’s the truth:**

Hitting our goal isn’t the finish line. We've still got a lot of work to do – and if we want to keep building momentum and ensure we’re ready for the battles ahead, **we have to stay ahead.** Let’s not wait until the next big deadline.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I just launched my campaign for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.
