My fellow Americans – this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It’s official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

**[If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkMuumzAQhp9m2IHssTFhwaKniC6q3lW1XUUTX4hbDMQYaN6-IjrKutuZT__3z1CYB-_uDVQvgHj1ZgFEEG8A8fZrD3H9Hd6_y3_25S2_qY-hPLb49hXd8AmPmr5un7_ZHy-JFm4u329Kftn4E0_32T7hV2lhA_nhmFZtZhrhDJOZbXglWS2kQJVdG2KuJrrompyx5Oh0InQWCYV0pE2V-QYZlkww5KpEJgvOHDPIy5PR-sKkBskenoKCjV4TX9JOMU5TKPQUsqG5pjQvj2IdYLdYvUZb7H6M1hwEYLf5zf7JIwVadgr33E0xn65-Aux8yOM6jn7s88UdCaKLR0L0Yw-iTXG1gIrCtI4JRCtKQLWmcNYUZvL9CKJ99Ec8nT99qFnBeYVMnBNXrC5PPBcKBaCyf8_Jm_-lD0OyMYBo98iz2Jh598PgF1WBZP3jHcfxW4P_AgAA___aPpqf "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**
---
| | [**PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkMuumzAQhp9m2IHssTFhwaKniC6q3lW1XUUTX4hbDMQYaN6-IjrKutuZT__3z1CYB-_uDVQvgHj1ZgFEEG8A8fZrD3H9Hd6_y3_25S2_qY-hPLb49hXd8AmPmr5un7_ZHy-JFm4u329Kftn4E0_32T7hV2lhA_nhmFZtZhrhDJOZbXglWS2kQJVdG2KuJrrompyx5Oh0InQWCYV0pE2V-QYZlkww5KpEJgvOHDPIy5PR-sKkBskenoKCjV4TX9JOMU5TKPQUsqG5pjQvj2IdYLdYvUZb7H6M1hwEYLf5zf7JIwVadgr33E0xn65-Aux8yOM6jn7s88UdCaKLR0L0Yw-iTXG1gIrCtI4JRCtKQLWmcNYUZvL9CKJ99Ec8nT99qFnBeYVMnBNXrC5PPBcKBaCyf8_Jm_-lD0OyMYBo98iz2Jh598PgF1WBZP3jHcfxW4P_AgAA___aPpqf)
---
My platform is simple:
1. **Tell folks the truth** – no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
2. **Support Trump 100%** – he will have no better partner at the state level
3. **Overhaul failing schools** – I’ll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** – we’ll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** – Tom Homan is a hero, he’ll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** – ban men in women’s sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** – you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** – we’ll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda
9. **Secure elections and prosecute fraud** – our elections will be the safest in the country
10. **Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy** – I’ll take a hacksaw to government bloat

I get that’s not everyone’s cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That’s just not who I am nor the campaign I’m running.

I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in battleground Ohio.

**[If you agree, I’d be honored to have you aboard.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkMuumzAQhp9m2IHssTFhwaKniC6q3lW1XUUTX4hbDMQYaN6-IjrKutuZT__3z1CYB-_uDVQvgHj1ZgFEEG8A8fZrD3H9Hd6_y3_25S2_qY-hPLb49hXd8AmPmr5un7_ZHy-JFm4u329Kftn4E0_32T7hV2lhA_nhmFZtZhrhDJOZbXglWS2kQJVdG2KuJrrompyx5Oh0InQWCYV0pE2V-QYZlkww5KpEJgvOHDPIy5PR-sKkBskenoKCjV4TX9JOMU5TKPQUsqG5pjQvj2IdYLdYvUZb7H6M1hwEYLf5zf7JIwVadgr33E0xn65-Aux8yOM6jn7s88UdCaKLR0L0Yw-iTXG1gIrCtI4JRCtKQLWmcNYUZvL9CKJ99Ec8nT99qFnBeYVMnBNXrC5PPBcKBaCyf8_Jm_-lD0OyMYBo98iz2Jh598PgF1WBZP3jHcfxW4P_AgAA___aPpqf "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

So here’s my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a “household name in the state.” On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump “Republicans” are eyeing this seat too.

Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That’s why I’m taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.

**But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win.** **[So with all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyMkMuumzAQhp9m2IHssTFhwaKniC6q3lW1XUUTX4hbDMQYaN6-IjrKutuZT__3z1CYB-_uDVQvgHj1ZgFEEG8A8fZrD3H9Hd6_y3_25S2_qY-hPLb49hXd8AmPmr5un7_ZHy-JFm4u329Kftn4E0_32T7hV2lhA_nhmFZtZhrhDJOZbXglWS2kQJVdG2KuJrrompyx5Oh0InQWCYV0pE2V-QYZlkww5KpEJgvOHDPIy5PR-sKkBskenoKCjV4TX9JOMU5TKPQUsqG5pjQvj2IdYLdYvUZb7H6M1hwEYLf5zf7JIwVadgr33E0xn65-Aux8yOM6jn7s88UdCaKLR0L0Yw-iTXG1gIrCtI4JRCtKQLWmcNYUZvL9CKJ99Ec8nT99qFnBeYVMnBNXrC5PPBcKBaCyf8_Jm_-lD0OyMYBo98iz2Jh598PgF1WBZP3jHcfxW4P_AgAA___aPpqf "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.")**

Whether it’s $4, $40, or $400 – whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in.

_So what do you say? Can I count on your support today?_

Regardless, thanks for everything you’ve done to help elect President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you’ll consider joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America.

Together, we’ll make history!

God bless you and God bless America,
Vivek Ramaswamy

clean_body: I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy. I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy. | | | | | | My fellow Americans – this is Vivek Ramaswamy. It’s official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." | | My platform is simple: 1. Tell folks the truth – no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak 2. Support Trump 100% – he will have no better partner at the state level 3. Overhaul failing schools – I’ll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers 4. Restore national identity – we’ll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood 5. Deport every illegal alien – Tom Homan is a hero, he’ll have a direct line to my office 6. Roll back transgenderism – ban men in women’s sports, no sex changes for minors 7. Slash taxes and lower prices – you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it 8. Gut all DEI programs in the state – we’ll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda 9. Secure elections and prosecute fraud – our elections will be the safest in the country 10. Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy – I’ll take a hacksaw to government bloat I get that’s not everyone’s cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That’s just not who I am nor the campaign I’m running. I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in battleground Ohio. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." So here’s my final pitch to you: The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a “household name in the state.” On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump “Republicans” are eyeing this seat too. Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That’s why I’m taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot. But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link." Whether it’s $4, $40, or $400 – whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in. So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? | | | | | | | | Regardless, thanks for everything you’ve done to help elect President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you’ll consider joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America. Together, we’ll make history! God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign to stop Medicaid cuts and end medical debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
In addition to stopping Republicans’ cuts to healthcare, we need to transform our broken system. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhE3KUtd-3AvUmQV2eqr7CJVRvco1okqCUTjDNVG1HCzjwIdLzlxz4T3WimRChaBGg0Y05giCuz6PwXCOXan0OwMH8Sy1L6oasQ83zAzgupWw5qzd7JN3ZugjcTCYQ_XLemF--a_YbKeJxQGRiGc7tBScC8oQgDgkcAxwPB88ONhzzlqGW7SdoGO9-jM4MCL0I43JnTgXisjslICb7lCoow/4eg/PJWtIykUQh6u6hZKM8wdtg/h0/h001.GfWDntT2NAzDvC3G4DmUSYSwfTVX7mEpj1SKs5vf9_A)
---
Friend, Last week, I voted NO on my Republican colleagues’ budget plan, which would make deep cuts to Medicaid and other services that millions of Americans rely on. Negotiations are continuing in the House and the Senate has yet to take a first vote, so now is the right time to keep pushing on this issue. Additionally, some members of the Trump administration and some Republican members of Congress seem open to messages about protecting Medicaid. In response to massive public outcry, some have paused or slowed their attacks on essential services. We have power. We must not only _push back_ against attacks on healthcare and other life-saving programs, but also _work toward_ the society that all people deserve—with universal healthcare for all. We also must defend a recent healthcare-related victory I helped secure with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). **The CFPB was set to change 15 million Americans’ lives this month by erasing $50 billion in medical debt from their credit reports.** But Trump and Congressional Republicans are trying to reverse this victory. We can’t let that happen—will you join me in speaking out? [**Sign the petition to leaders in our federal government: No cuts to Medicaid! Keep medical debt off our credit reports, and end medical debt altogether by pushing for universal healthcare for all!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNXj6TSp3tt3JWrwkBDn-fDobSwdI9luObEN0xnkQMl89_bOQV1sJ07Ec6U6zt36_PKmZLq6OWFzdm1TJfLba70e7f3JhHEQj-36sAcUSDWuIDJ_I7L2vtJjyKFne8GNxZPvqyuUStgxTes0HFPZUSs_rHrOk6yqJgyR0MeDdnB6nleLcWcXOGcKPQJkYHb1CCEewzZHEYrY_5qXYIABf8yxnabKK8KGF8C_Ro36Y7yYpgVZpBk7ZusiJ_qgHQeWDv-7oLRsA9agM1wx5LaAwj_8/4eg/PJWtIykUQh6u6hZKM8wdtg/h1/h001.pA7n3-n5y3LmrfyZf3OeUfa5XqeIpt54r5F5ZXuxLi8) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNQBXpStbzKBdVEPODZHB8Y-xdDIDWFQmapBOZ-X7D1_gn3Qb9brOOgODzs__0zAb1zgeYkBUgtIkKoJr8J-wSNHvpqJEeWOCL0Nh4cDCldJRaG8K2ytQYZvlie35wO7vqNnyNHePp08MobE1p6msqtpmaiuVxMeSFGJ6Q1BmxrWQdWSYaRzKHUBfzgsGRsnslKMvn65pwlbLVeKCJIeR4sqpTrVXgaNKyKv5zNQrYUal5SNeZIG1WFTuiGEAd03NUGWKLpLkclKu0Kfn4IFPj2Q/4eg/PJWtIykUQh6u6hZKM8wdtg/h2/h001.8o_wQpj7Js1_KQgXQhJJg7so6qkuLtL3mBYrlyEksvk)
---
Thank you for continuing to demand our human rights. Healthcare is a human right, not a commodity—and we need fundamental transformations to ensure that people get the care they need.
Whenever our federal government has made progress, it’s always moved in response to the people. Let’s stay loud.
With you in this fight,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Mar 1, 2025
Subject: Sign to stop Medicaid cuts and end medical debt
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This week, I voted NO on House Republicans’ budget, which would make massive cuts to programs that millions of lower-income and disabled Americans depend on every day—including $880 billion in cuts to Medicaid and threats to the _Affordable Care Act_.
**As negotiations continue in the House and Senate, right now is the time to keep pushing back against planned cuts to healthcare.** Some Republicans in Congress and the presidential administration have signaled that they may be susceptible to pressure from the public in support of Medicaid.
2.6 million Michiganders benefit from Medicaid coverage. If these attempts go forward, 36,000 residents of my Congressional district who receive coverage under the _Affordable Care Act_ would see increases in their insurance premium payments. In my district alone, nearly 260,000 people who are on Medicaid and CHIP (Children’s Health Insurance Program) would be at risk of losing their healthcare—including 100,000 children under 19 years old and 22,000 seniors over 65 years old.
**I’m working alongside organizations to stop these proposed cuts, and to defend the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s plan to change the lives of 15 million Americans by removing $50 billion in medical debt from their credit reports.** After passing policies to address medical debt, I worked with the CFPB to secure this much-needed relief, which was set to happen this month. Now we must protect this victory: Republican members of Congress are trying to overturn it, and the Trump administration is trying to dismantle the CFPB altogether.
[**Will you join me in demanding the leaders of our federal government stop cuts to healthcare and keep medical debt off credit reports?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNdzU308qgbKdId_Bo7ylO1Gea3v08h6i617NqmGkci3tm0Xkvb6e8LVuOTeH7vb4FkdKrx8DBWMLNM3FGPDAR19i1xVnAlEbIwzMu1nXkATtMqfFpYE59TWwMhm613cgEfDBVi2cTZYz7nnh7V1B3Wi_8TiApD_gGkUs5c0vmDwfaMgLQ6pwqSjDN9x-OKVqRspByNKgtrAygC6-eYdaxtxR2lDPR-x3VU6B9l_dpQGDKBQOY8oAHmRYqO7QDaTiGSTQxyMsyZ_pxPZoNTj-a9E/4eg/PJWtIykUQh6u6hZKM8wdtg/h3/h001.SVM5EuPRHD21YCSI0JBm9JtxdsdI0tPfi-wA4hFRMOk)
[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNZh9z0gWbIbyBw-MN5eLldeQeV9Arc-S7anUTCp6z9C5ztBoAgXyIOz2KSTkxhNnWrmUF3IL9rXBIRLaE6LTlEmLr23eaj7g8XWEZLJf5Y69Kj5BdbJOW_bizy0Jdg-A2aNOJGukLMOWiyGNVaNUQ-r6m3Z4emTYgYfA3Z6FMRBWX-KTNSF37fhl72LouxsT1BKVPrFrgt6eGyVxKCaGZzXAr0WCPAOjDY9W1xOoTGNyXgmZcOPFc5erPX5fdN0tnYhEHdfBqem3utKLLeWyRv8/4eg/PJWtIykUQh6u6hZKM8wdtg/h4/h001.Mpd39dpP44s-5eUTj__cryPZwr6-qKTLeGq98sZZ2gg)
---
**No one chooses to get sick, and getting sick should never haunt someone financially. But 90% of****bankruptcies are due to extreme medical debt** , and thousands of Americans die each year just because they can’t afford healthcare—including people who have health insurance.
Nearly 1 in 5 U.S. adults have medical debt on their credit reports, which means they may be denied housing, employment, transportation, or other necessities because of a sudden health crisis or visit to the emergency room. In addition to pushing to ban medical debt from credit reports, I’ve also co-led legislation to go further and cancel all medical debt.
**Healthcare is a human right—not a commodity. That’s why I’m advocating for Medicare for All** , including within the Congressional Medicare for All Caucus.
Instead of letting corporations profit off our pain, the U.S. government must end medical debt and ensure universal healthcare for all. We have the money to do this. This money could come from the Pentagon budget, which takes nearly $1 trillion of our tax dollars each year, even though the Pentagon has failed to pass audits for 7 years in a row.
[**Please sign if you agree: Our federal government must stop cuts to healthcare, but we can’t end there. Federal leaders must also transform our healthcare system so everyone can get the care they need—by ending medical debt and ensuring universal healthcare.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ik4yu4Q_PvC5ysqdZhagmYLjb52hJI71VQ6vnXZal0GHpPKLsFpQ44dBjPZ7FHUPUz8KrJjYFlRf6BJRAxtd51fXVF8MTRs1PihxF0fCiNEyLbc6wOXIjI2-WYq777tKnyZQzEeKc97u9sWVshJIGaSOEwpDpyQi3fevN0HcGNckx_iRFHOuaTOJE96tFjyI8ZzvKXw_S6uOf0N3nlvKFJWJgBc9Y_Dafmd5XHpQST_Fmv_JokolnUzeuW7FFvSxOSo1DuBlustnRG07jrQf2p5T0s__YzDDpMwgdSdzXHNFEGGdS0Q6ebUwE6BzsUVHypOEbCEHIqQm4t3dC_KJKxb_lF4irAseeMRagTxpUfr6HbNTin8bAvzfHCfuB6Nf-VqoQX0eGep28TJ8TptPdDHEErHvjprBsPVrN7RVexGgMHOve4OsdG7CkK3FqyH0/4eg/PJWtIykUQh6u6hZKM8wdtg/h5/h001.ull7aOZdk602MW_WvIa2fiRvS8ACmffqJhH6OPII074)
Thank you for demanding the government we all deserve.
In response to the massive public outcry against attacks on essential services and programs, some Republicans and members of the Trump administration have walked back their harmful plans. So we must keep pushing—not only _against_ attacks, but also _for_ the world we need.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Instead of letting corporations profit off our pain, the U.S. government must end medical debt and ensure universal healthcare for all. We have the money to do this. This money could come from the Pentagon budget, which takes nearly $1 trillion of our tax dollars each year, even though the Pentagon has failed to pass audits for 7 years in a row. Thank you for demanding the government we all deserve. In response to the massive public outcry against attacks on essential services and programs, some Republicans and members of the Trump administration have walked back their harmful plans. So we must keep pushing—not only against attacks, but also for the world we need. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | Team, we have a rare opportunity in front of us to stop Trump and take back the House.
**
Within Trump’s first 100 days, we can deliver a shocking blow to Project 2025 and stop the MAGA assault on our government and our rights.**

There are some important special elections coming up that __we can, and must win__ :

---
|
---
* In New York, Democrats have nominated Blake Gendebien, a local farmer and community advocate, for an open seat formerly held by Elise Stefanik
* In Florida, Josh Weil, a public school teacher, is taking on an anti-LGBTQ bigot and MAGA lunatic who cosponsored FL's "Don't Say Gay" bill
* Gay Valimont, a gun violence prevention activist, is running to flip another open seat in Florida after Matt Gaetz resigned in disgrace

| These candidates are running _badass grassroots operations_ that are raising millions of dollars from donors across the country. **We can win each one of these contests if people everywhere come together and FIGHT.**

---
|
---
**[_We have a real shot to win here._ That’s why National Ground Game is working every day to make sure Democrats WIN these special elections: Victory here all but assures a stop to Project 2025 and accountability for Trump. Can we count on your support to register new voters and flip these House seats?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3NzgwODc5MDA0OTkyODcyLFwiclwiOjE0Nzc4MDk0MDgwNTk2NTc4Mn0iLCJzIjoiYjc2MzA2NGQ5MjEwMzc0ZCJ9)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Our rights and freedoms in Wisconsin depend on you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it.
| | |
---
Team,

I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. **This year, the stakes are just as high.**
**Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in — making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.**
_We can't let them win._ We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got.
[**_Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and Jacky Rosen's? name: USO T-Shirt Vote @ USO
subject: [YOU’VE BEEN SELECTED] Vote now!
body:
We want your input!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[VOTE NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs7ja3~)
---
USO Supporter,
This year marks 15 years since we began our annual USO T-shirt campaign to honor the people who serve.
In that time, the USO T-shirt has become something like a uniform that gives military supporters the chance to show their gratitude for our service members while supporting the USO's mission to serve the people who serve.
**And because of how important the USO T-shirt has become, we 're now inviting top supporters like _you_ to help us choose the design for 2025. **
[**EXCLUSIVE INVITE**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/LaXVHgjyN~)
---
[**HELP US CHOOSE THE 2025
USO T-SHIRT DESIGN!**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/LaXVHgjyN~)
[](https://links.e.uso.)
| | [VOTE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
The members of our Armed Forces wear a variety of uniforms, but there is only ONE official uniform of military supporters that you can wear to show them how grateful and appreciative you are of their service.
That's why we think you should have a say in deciding the design for our 2025 USO T-shirt -- **[but voting closes soon, and you still haven't cast your vote!](https://links.e.uso.)**
[VOTE NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)
---
Please: **[Submit your vote in our 2025 USO T-Shirt Design Contest now, and we'll let you know the winning design as soon as it's released, and give you the chance to be among the first to get yours.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-)**
Thank you for helping to make all of our work For the People Who ServeTM possible.
--The USO

1-888-484-3876

[](https://www.uso.org/) [VOTE NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-)

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Republicans took the first step to gut Medicaid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Sign on now to join Tammy’s fight:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo)
Peter, President Trump and Republicans just took the first step to gut critical programs like Medicare and Medicaid to make room in the budget for tax breaks for their wealthy friends. **Tammy is fighting back.[Add your name to our petition in support of crucial programs Americans depend on. It’s up to us to show Republicans that this deeply unpopular move won’t go unanswered.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_Medicare_Medicaid?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250302_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_Medicare_Medicaid?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250302_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo)
---
President Trump and Republicans claimed their budget cuts will not touch Medicaid.
__That’s a lie.__
Trump endorsed the House resolution which will slash Medicaid — along with support for our veterans and nurses, doctors, and scientists who work to keep Wisconsin families healthy. _And all but one House Republican voted in favor of it._
As Wisconsin's Senator and member of the Senate Health, Education, Labor and Pensions (HELP) Committee, Tammy stands with the 1.1 million Wisconsin seniors, children, and veterans who depend on Medicaid. In defense of this essential health care, Tammy joined a group of her colleagues to demand Republicans keep their hands off Medicare and Medicaid.
**As Republicans try to dismantle essential programs to pay for their billionaire tax breaks, we’re calling on this team to stand with Tammy against this full-on threat to Americans’ health care.**
**[Sign on now to join Tammy’s fight:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_Medicare_Medicaid?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250302_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo)**
| [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2503_Medicare_Medicaid?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250302_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo)
---
Thank you,
Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4607%2E35263%2EpjCEJo)**

name: Defund Musk via Our Revolution
subject: Tell Congress: Cut Off Elon’s Govt Contracts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Elon Musk is out of control. The world’s richest man is racing to seize
our confidential data, gut key agencies, and take away our health care,
Social Security and more. And he’s doing it all while raking in billions
of our taxpayer dollars through government contracts!

It’s an outrageous conflict of interest, but it’s also his vulnerability.
If Musk’s assault on our government puts his companies’ government
contracts in jeopardy, his skyrocketing profits could disappear overnight.
And then pressure from shareholders and his own bottom line could FORCE
him to stop the takeover.

And now we have a way to do it: all we have to do to put a hold on Musk’s
contracts is get Senate Democrats to filibuster ALL funding mechanisms for
Tesla and SpaceX’s government contracts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21770?source=email-030225&t=1011&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]This is a battle we can WIN. But for it to work we need to OVERWHELM
Democrats with public demands to hold up Musk’s contracts NOW, before more
damage is done. Will you add your name now?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21770?source=email-030225&t=1012&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]ADD YOUR NAME

Musk is getting more emboldened by the day. Last week the billionaire held
up a massive chainsaw while bragging about the massive cuts he was making
to programs families need to survive:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21770?t=1013&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ][IMG]

Then over the weekend he sent an ultimatum out to ALL government employees
demanding they outline everything they got done over the last week or be
fired.

It’s starting to backfire. Even some of Trump’s appointees are pushing
back, telling their workers to ignore his threats. And public support for
Musk is shrinking rapidly.

If there is one thing we know, it’s that Musk cares about keeping his
massive profits coming. Which is why we need Democrats to step up RIGHT
NOW and stop the flow of money straight into Musk’s pockets. Then it’s
only a matter of time until Musk gives in to the pressure and stops his
government takeover.

NOW is the time for Senate Democrats to step up, and they don’t even need
the majority to do it. But we need to move quickly, before Musk cuts all
the way through our government, Social Security, Medicaid, and so much
more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21770?source=email-030225&t=1014&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Will you add your name and demand Senate Democrats filibuster funding
for SpaceX and Tesla contracts until Musk gets out of the government?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-030225.V9-vCi&t=1007&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-030225.iY8YDA&t=1008&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-030225.6pfh3R&t=1009&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-030225.k7VOET&t=1010&akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7775%2E5885482%2EOyKKTI

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Donald Trump says immigrants “poison the blood” of our country.
Elon Musk is illegally firing civil servants and attacking unions.
**This November in Virginia’s General Assembly elections, we have a chance to deliver MAGA Republicans a big defeat -_and I’m Donald and Elon’s worst nightmare._**
I’m Elizabeth Guzman - a proud mom, Latina, immigrant, civil servant, and union leader running to defeat a MAGA Republican in Virginia’s toss-up 22nd House of Delegates district.
**I’ll tell you more in a bit about what’s at stake, but if you’re ready to donate,[you can pitch in here to help us get out the vote.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviGD0mMOw0bwi-xezY7v7Np7quIvB9tLoiN8aLn4TcKLr9PRIcybRACL-9xsLCQi15CBm_-dw8qASjbNTbnEk511_TzadgaQqAghHZN0mdsKUzb5NOmkuwXlcl9oaDGLG8fRPrEDnBg4E-qo5_CjsgYVi88ZyQal0GOzGTezP8DruhD-smjc86_wZWxc3gQTsX-L_089hnstrz0SXMOoIooRud5vh_jpA1EVXdjZZoi9d/4eg/Pypq3UnoQvehQtWYVd7PCA/h1/h001.u4Bg2LlHzNjZdziIrWom_i47Xp2ogXBFL1x7NOICMr4)**
I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader.
But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us.
After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let _anyone_ tell my children that they didn’t belong here.
I ran for the Virginia House of Delegates, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history, and delivered the Spanish-language response to the State of the Union.
Now, as Donald Trump returns, I’m running for Delegate again to continue our work and fight back.
**We need pro-choice, pro-worker, pro-democracy leaders in our state legislatures to resist Trump and Musk - and I’m running to flip a district that Donald Trump lost.**
Virginia doesn’t have contribution limits, which means Republicans nationwide are going to write _HUGE_ checks to stop us.
But I know that thousands of activists like you banding together will help us stay competitive.
**[As Donald Trump and Elon Musk continue their rampage, don’t give up - FIGHT BACK. Donate to help flip VA-HD22 and deliver them a big defeat this November.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnodpF17bneoDKp9_miyn0tf60nuK7_ab4smAY0hZWhODlzRmMH6mQdmyHpX9rdc-jjunByublFH5pffPQslls8npMsR4Zautax9rf2gkFmALfg-PuypkXgeQLyAvH6DJ3fCxtiuj2rM2VsLF0MrBZbr28-6Muhk0MIRxDQQdDBbDIHzZEjbiLBK2a5Tnh5cQ-EeALLZBmen_rv1xzlSWw4hzXddnvz1tegIvG5O14C1Q/4eg/Pypq3UnoQvehQtWYVd7PCA/h2/h001.hEjyM4jdvOmgvnQnLF_n0ET-AXxG3dSBqzmV5wB8xNc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: GOP ON BLAST! (via VPP)
subject: Rep. Jeffries just broke his silence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Read this NOW >>
| **_Team, Hakeem Jeffries just BROKE HIS SILENCE »_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87468?t=6&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep) THIS is the type of leadership Democrats need, _now more than ever._

Rep. Jeffries is working tirelessly to hold Trump, Elon Musk, and all of their MAGA buddies accountable, and we couldn’t be more grateful. [**So we’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. Claim your spot ASAP before we hit send: SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87468?t=7&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87468?t=8&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87468?t=9&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87468?t=10&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87468?t=11&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19101%2E878179%2E26Unep).**

| Here’s finally some good news: New polling out shows that Democrats are currently leading by **_5 POINTS_** in the swing seats that will determine control of the U.S. House in 2026. **And here’s the kicker:** This encouraging finding was from Donald Trump’s own pollster. **[It couldn’t get more clear than this. We are fully within reach of taking back the U.S. House, but we cannot rest on our laurels and hope that victory simply falls from the sky. We need to lay the groundwork in the make-or-break swing seats that will determine whether Speaker Johnson gets fired or not. Will you pitch in now to our mobilization efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103100032/531170074/803820036?refcode=20250301_FR_45DO_SwingStatePoll&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM4ZmQyNi05MWY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqFRTDKsgpY2mHalf8LpYk_mJKr4EAN6SSfsow3EvSo=)** [CHIP IN $35 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103100033/531170075/803820036?&refcode=20250301_FR_45DO_SwingStatePoll&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM4ZmQyNi05MWY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqFRTDKsgpY2mHalf8LpYk_mJKr4EAN6SSfsow3EvSo=) The poll itself focused on 18 swing districts across the country, and the findings are remarkably clear. Voters want tax policy to prioritize working people...but the Republican Congress just voted to fund tax cuts for billionaires by cutting Medicare and other essential services. 68% are unhappy about their financial situation, and want the ACA expanded — not repealed or neglected. _These swing voters basically want the exact opposite of everything President Trump and the Republican Congress are doing.**That gives us a critical opportunity.**_ **[We need to kickstart our organizing programs sooner than ever so we can educate voters on what is going on and present a different vision. But right now that isn’t in our budget. Could you pitch in a donation of $15 or $35 so we can take advantage of this moment and lay the groundwork that will ensure we retake the U.S. House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103100034/531170076/803820036?refcode=20250301_FR_45DO_SwingStatePoll&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM4ZmQyNi05MWY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqFRTDKsgpY2mHalf8LpYk_mJKr4EAN6SSfsow3EvSo=)** [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103100035/531170077/803820036?&refcode=20250301_FR_45DO_SwingStatePoll&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM4ZmQyNi05MWY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqFRTDKsgpY2mHalf8LpYk_mJKr4EAN6SSfsow3EvSo=)

clean_body: New polling out shows that Democrats are currently leading | = | Here’s finally some good news: New polling out shows that Democrats are currently leading by 5 POINTS in the swing seats that will determine control of the U.S. House in 2026. And here’s the kicker: This encouraging finding was from Donald Trump’s own pollster. = = The poll itself focused on 18 swing districts across the country, and the findings are remarkably clear. Voters want tax policy to prioritize working people...but the Republican Congress just voted to fund tax cuts for billionaires by cutting Medicare and other essential services. 68% are unhappy about their financial situation, and want the ACA expanded — not repealed or neglected. These swing voters basically want the exact opposite of everything President Trump and the Republican Congress are doing.That gives us a critical opportunity. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. | | Why do some people stay sharp as a whip as they get older, while others have trouble recalling names, dates, and even conversations?

New research from Harvard University suggests age may not be the culprit.

And one Boston medical doctor now says memory problems are often caused by the foods you're eating — or NOT eating.

Dr. George Karanastasis, MD says: _"Your brain needs fuel to create new brain cells, recall memories, and focus on tasks. And where does it get that fuel? From the foods you eat."_

However, due to a change in modern dietary habits, Dr. K says most of us aren't getting the nutrients our brain needs. He says this lack of nutrients can cause brain fog, forgetfulness, or worse.

_"When your brain doesn't receive the right nutrients, it literally starts to starve. And that's when you start to suffer those embarrassing senior moments. You might forget people's names, walk into a room and forget why you're there, or even get lost driving to familiar places,"_ Dr. K says.

Fortunately, Dr. K developed a simple protocol that can help fight memory loss.

Best of all, it doesn't require any major lifestyle changes. It just requires adding [**these 3 foods back into your diet**](http://email.mail.republicanbreakfastclub.com/c/eJx8kk9vnDAQxT-N98bKjGHBBw5JyR6q9I9SqcrNGmwDTmyDbEO6_fQVZLtVe-iFw-Pnmef3jG62pr80pLonAKNRkQAQdkcAhu_ry_IEPz-lrP7ySLOHF_dIt7_w4YqucIO9xGeV5q-P3-7j5al9OBcMw5rf8HSZ9Q2-Lj1qh8ZuatUeVMOrHPlBN3lVUM44Y3AYm7LQmmkJdc9Z0SsqT3neVyeOPa3qkvcH0wCFkjIKeZ2XDI6cVlzqsu8KmdOOc1LQbc0x6HnprJHou6DxtceYpF26o5zcwTZjSnPc3Z0JnFNA-XqMCS9xxDBjQn_BQW8sgbNmWqmixgx7wKzIC8hqhTIraUe7imna15yw82xRaqd9IqwdximmVfu0BB1FnOwkHBovKEBJ4ITKKMJa1k-TiiLanMAp7ZIyQcvUif8NEH-dW5ITTiuzOMLaa8K7GKclSL2Z-VOsl1Zc27hSEt2MZvCEte-xZtsHSiEnL94wOOMHETopPCYzebSiC5uRUaNNo5jDNAR0UTCxm_o9dfLpPQkvbbZ2hb9Ln58_ngmchLf7Tf8R96fI2h9ufl7cSxsOoVHzm7HWxFNFCjrspW7lrQ38CgAA___gWucv).

Dr. K recently put together a video revealing these foods. And since the video was released, it's gone viral, racking up more than 1 million views. Thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this protocol.

He says: _"I've seen this protocol work for thousands of people. People keep telling me: 'Dr. K, I feel so much sharper and smarter. Even my family noticed.' It's wonderful to hear how many lives this has changed."_

Now, what about you? Are you concerned about your fading memory? How would you like to take back control of your life?

If so, watch the video at the link below and try this protocol for yourself. You'll discover which foods can help make sure your brain lasts as long as your body.

clean_body: But with the GOP trifecta of extremism taking over our government, our work is only just beginning. Peter – Kim is so proud to see that – thanks to your support – we hit our February fundraising goal! Your support means everything to our team, and Kim wants you to know how grateful she is to have you fighting by her side through thick and thin. But we won’t sugarcoat it: March marks our first end-of-quarter deadline under this new GOP trifecta, and it's crucial that we demonstrate the strength of our grassroots movement early on. With everything from our economy to our basic civil rights on the chopping block under the Republican regime, the stakes are high, which means that we truly can’t afford to fall behind. ---

**“Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next”** [Source: _Newsweek_]
---
Voters like YOU made your voices heard loud and clear last fall when you sent President Trump back to the White House with Republican majorities in Congress.
---
But the Democrats couldn’t care less about the will of the _PEOPLE_.
---
In fact, the Radical Democrat who filed these articles even claimed that impeachment doesn’t require a crime at all. He simply said, “the word _misdemeanor_ means misdeeds.”
---
In other words, the Democrats believe they can **IMPEACH** the duly elected President of the United States so long as they don’t like him.
---
_That’s how little the Left respects our Republic._
---
Peter, make no mistake, there’s only ONE thing that should _“happen next:”_ **These sham articles of impeachment should be thrown to the ash heap!**
---
_Which is why I’m reaching out to every grassroots patriot I can to ask that you sign your name to demand the Democrats' latest sham impeachment hoax be SHUT DOWN IMMEDIATELY._

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Piling into a Chevy Impala station wagon
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Photos and book recommendations inside.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103101615/531173459/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM3ZjM3NS05NmY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEnZS6QbbchPvADOdXIo8EcBV2ECwHqWuaR54E54HvU=&emci=9fd7d39a-19f6-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=a1c7f375-96f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Growing up in Arlington, Washington, every Wednesday night at the Larsen household was library night. We would pile into a Chevy Impala station wagon, made when cars didn't have seatbelts, and my Dad would drive us to the library. We would bring our stack of books we read in the last week, turn them in, and then check out more books for the next week. **Libraries are very important to education and very important to my family.** The Larsen household library night built up my love for reading which continues for me today. Fast forward a few decades, and **today is National Read Across America Day.** This annual holiday takes place on the birthday of author Dr. Seuss and promotes reading and education all across the country — and brings back those fond memories of crowding into that Chevy, eager to find our next great read. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103101617/531173461/1596212816?refcode=2025-03-02-read&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a1c7f375-96f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM3ZjM3NS05NmY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEnZS6QbbchPvADOdXIo8EcBV2ECwHqWuaR54E54HvU=) Over the years, I have enjoyed working to share my love of reading with children across Northwest Washington. **Early last month, I had the chance to hand-deliver children and young adult books to Mariner Library from the Library of Congress' Surplus Books Program.** I had a great time reading "_I Feel Purple_ " by Margaret Salter at the Marnier Library last month, and I hope you and your family use this holiday to grab a book and read together. It is an honor to represent the 2nd District. Our shared values – working hard, caring for each other, and serving the community – guide my work in Congress to serve the people of Northwest Washington. Those Northwest Washington values also mean making sure our kids have the resources they need so that they can focus on learning, exploring their interests, and achieving their goals in the classroom and beyond. More soon, _Rick_ _P.S. Need a book recommendation? I recently finished reading Tana French's "The Hunter," which is the sequel to "The Searcher." But I am looking forward to reading Francis Spufford's "Cahokia Jazz," which is a noir novel of sorts set in the past but somewhere in a different world._ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:
| [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103101619/531173463/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2025-03-02-read&refcode2=a1c7f375-96f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM3ZjM3NS05NmY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEnZS6QbbchPvADOdXIo8EcBV2ECwHqWuaR54E54HvU=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103101622/531173466/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2025-03-02-read&refcode2=a1c7f375-96f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM3ZjM3NS05NmY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEnZS6QbbchPvADOdXIo8EcBV2ECwHqWuaR54E54HvU=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103101626/531173469/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2025-03-02-read&refcode2=a1c7f375-96f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM3ZjM3NS05NmY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEnZS6QbbchPvADOdXIo8EcBV2ECwHqWuaR54E54HvU=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103101631/531173473/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2025-03-02-read&refcode2=a1c7f375-96f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM3ZjM3NS05NmY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEnZS6QbbchPvADOdXIo8EcBV2ECwHqWuaR54E54HvU=)

clean_body: Photos and book recommendations inside. | | | | Growing up in Arlington, Washington, every Wednesday night at the Larsen household was library night. We would pile into a Chevy Impala station wagon, made when cars didn't have seatbelts, and my Dad would drive us to the library. We would bring our stack of books we read in the last week, turn them in, and then check out more books for the next week. Libraries are very important to education and very important to my family. The Larsen household library night built up my love for reading which continues for me today. Fast forward a few decades, and today is National Read Across America Day. This annual holiday takes place on the birthday of author Dr. Seuss and promotes reading and education all across the country — and brings back those fond memories of crowding into that Chevy, eager to find our next great read. = Over the years, I have enjoyed working to share my love of reading with children across Northwest Washington. Early last month, I had the chance to hand-deliver children and young adult books to Mariner Library from the Library of Congress' Surplus Books Program. I had a great time reading "I Feel Purple " by Margaret Salter at the Marnier Library last month, and I hope you and your family use this holiday to grab a book and read together. It is an honor to represent the 2nd District. Our shared values – working hard, caring for each other, and serving the community – guide my work in Congress to serve the people of Northwest Washington. Those Northwest Washington values also mean making sure our kids have the resources they need so that they can focus on learning, exploring their interests, and achieving their goals in the classroom and beyond. More soon, Rick P.S. Need a book recommendation? I recently finished reading Tana French's "The Hunter," which is the sequel to "The Searcher." But I am looking forward to reading Francis Spufford's "Cahokia Jazz," which is a noir novel of sorts set in the past but somewhere in a different world. | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . You heard it here first-- we have an incredible line up of featured speakers for our GIRL FIRST RALLY on Saturday, March 15, 2025.
If we've learned anything this past week, it's that everyday citizens are waking up and standing strong to support fairness in girls sports. I'm looking forward to hosting this event and can't wait to see you there!
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73

I'm looking forward to hosting this event and can't wait to see you there! Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73 | | | == | | == | | | | | The Girl Dads are Fired Up! Last Saturday I had the opportunity to address one of the largest crowds I've seen at the State House-- and here was my message: YOU AREN'T FIGHTING ALONE! | == | Last week on WVOM rewinds It's always a pleasure to join George Hale and Ric Tyler on WVOM. I shared the latest from our efforts to protect girls in sports, and the implications we could be faced with here in Maine for ignoring Federal law. Make no mistake: the Trump Administration has been hearing from us for months on this subject and many others. == | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | | Maine Issues & Action PAC | PO Box 603 | Augusta, ME 04332 US | | | | | | |

name: BARACK OBAMA ANNOUNCEMENT (via Raja Krishnamoorthi)
subject: STUNNING announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Please stop what you’re doing and read this, Peter: Barack Obama just called on every single grassroots Democrat to step up and mobilize. He knows Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are playing political games with our livelihoods, and we need to prove that their schemes have no place in our government. But it’s going to take all of us banding together to answer Obama’s call and stop Trump in his tracks. Before midnight: Will you rush $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

This is HUGE, Peter:

FIRST: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Trump and his Republicans barged their way into power.

SO THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
For the FIRST time since the election, President Obama broke his silence and called on us to stand firm and speak out!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Before midnight: I’m asking my grassroots supporters to chip in $14. With your help, we can answer Barack Obama’s call to step up and mobilize. Truly, Peter, your $14 can help us prove to Donald Trump and his allies that their schemes have no place in our government. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to step up with $14, this is it, Peter.

When one of our most beloved Democratic Presidents personally asks us for help – we wouldn’t dare let him down.

Will you rush $14 before midnight?

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you, RajaP.S. Here's a picture of President Obama and me back in the good old days when I served as his Policy Director for his U.S. Senate campaign! He’s made such a powerful impact on my life, and now, I want to answer his call. So please, will you chip in $14 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]Raja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?refcode=footer]
Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
Friends of Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

| | | ** **
**RED ALERT!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!**

---
| Are you aware there's an Ohio bond issue on the primary ballot in May? If not, you're not alone!
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: It’s official – I am running for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.
I am humbly asking for your support as I announce my candidacy.

#
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

My fellow Americans – this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It’s official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home
state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our
country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to
President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

IF THAT’S ALL YOU NEED TO HEAR, I HUMBLY ASK YOU TO BECOME A
FOUNDING DONOR TO MY CAMPAIGN USING THIS SECURE LINK.
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

My platform is simple:

* TELL FOLKS THE TRUTH – no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
* SUPPORT TRUMP 100% – he will have no better partner at the state
level
* OVERHAUL FAILING SCHOOLS – I’ll expand school choice and reward
excellent teachers
* RESTORE NATIONAL IDENTITY – we’ll promote merit and patriotism,
and reject victimhood
* DEPORT EVERY ILLEGAL ALIEN – Tom Homan is a hero, he’ll have a
direct line to my office
* ROLL BACK TRANSGENDERISM – ban men in women’s sports, no sex
changes for minors
* SLASH TAXES AND LOWER PRICES – you earned your nest egg, you
should keep more of it
* GUT ALL DEI PROGRAMS IN THE STATE – we’ll be a model for
rooting out woke propaganda
* SECURE ELECTIONS AND PROSECUTE FRAUD – our elections will be the
safest in the country
* OBLITERATE THE MANAGERIAL BUREAUCRACY – I’ll take a hacksaw to
government bloat

I get that’s not everyone’s cup of tea. Some folks would rather
have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead.
That’s just not who I am nor the campaign I’m running.

I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter – with the grit
and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine – at the helm in
battleground Ohio.

IF YOU AGREE, I’D BE HONORED TO HAVE YOU ABOARD.
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

So here’s my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open
seat, and AP called her a “household name in the state.” On top of
that, a bunch of anti-Trump “Republicans” are eyeing this seat
too.

Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. That’s why
I’m taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.

BUT NOW THAT I OFFICIALLY LAUNCHED MY CAMPAIGN, I REALLY NEED YOUR
HELP TO WIN. SO WITH ALL THAT BEING SAID, COULD YOU PLEASE BECOME A
FOUNDING DONOR TODAY?
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

Whether it’s $4, $40, or $400 – whatever you can afford will go a
long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds
up when everyone pitches in.

_So what do you say? Can I count on your support today? _

CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=4]

CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=40]

CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=400]

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&ex_tid=20250227_WA90.116684_t1609108-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

Regardless, thanks for everything you’ve done to help elect
President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you’ll consider
joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America.

Together, we’ll make history!

God bless you and God bless America,
Vivek Ramaswamy

#

It’s official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again. IF THAT’S ALL YOU NEED TO HEAR, I HUMBLY ASK YOU TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TO MY CAMPAIGN USING THIS SECURE LINK. [] PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN [] My platform is simple: TELL FOLKS THE TRUTH – no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak SUPPORT TRUMP 100% – he will have no better partner at the state level OVERHAUL FAILING SCHOOLS – I’ll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers RESTORE NATIONAL IDENTITY – we’ll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood DEPORT EVERY ILLEGAL ALIEN – Tom Homan is a hero, he’ll have a direct line to my office ROLL BACK TRANSGENDERISM – ban men in women’s sports, no sex changes for minors SLASH TAXES AND LOWER PRICES – you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it GUT ALL DEI PROGRAMS IN THE STATE – we’ll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda SECURE ELECTIONS AND PROSECUTE FRAUD – our elections will be the safest in the country OBLITERATE THE MANAGERIAL BUREAUCRACY – I’ll take a hacksaw to government bloat I get that’s not everyone’s cup of tea. Dear Readers -
**Thank you for reading** _**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid**_**.** Your support allows me to keep doing this work. Here's the thing--as billionaires continue to buy and dominate the media landscape, it's critical now more than ever that we build our own platforms funded by We the People, not by billionaires capitulating to fascists.
**And the truth is, we are building something great. Here are two powerful facts:**
1. 1 month after subscribing to Let's Address This, 99% of readers stay subscribed
2. 6 months after subscribing to Let's Address This, 90% of readers stay subscribed

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0717059-717b-4d20-97a8-c3cfb24ea6da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**So, this lovely Sunday I have a simple ask:** If you value my advocacy, it would mean the world to me if you invited your friends to join you by subscribing to Let's Address This. And as a bonus, inviting your friends earns you neat benefits too.
### **Here 's How to Participate **
**1\. Share Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid.** When you use the referral link below (or the "Share" button on any post) you'll get credit for any new subscribers. Simply send the link in a text, email, or share it on social media with friends.
[Refer a friend](https://substack..cxglX6uhE6HJyCu42mZuU0ORYPP3tuzy7-ExPvLuwlg?&utm_source=post)
2.**Earn benefits.** When your friends use your referral link to subscribe (free or paid), you'll receive special benefits. (Yep, free referrals count too).
* Get a 1 month comp for 3 referrals
* Get a 3 month comp for 5 referrals
* Get a 6 month comp for 25 referrals
* Get a 1 year comp & free Let's Address This merch (coming soon!) for 50 referrals

**As you know, I don 't paywall any of my content**, because I don't ever want to be a financial burden on anyone. Instead, I only ask readers to become paid subscribers if they feel inspired to do so _**and**_ if they can do so without financial hardship.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ziJ52JG4gtLpsV8ck_E7o7fMcqfJ1weEB1ynT1hNRLg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=144801845)
### Conclusion
Your continued support has already helped us build _Let 's Address This_ to an inspiring community of more than 121,000 activists reaching _2.5 million monthly readers_. I love your comments, your notes, your emails, and your eye rolls at my dad jokes!
Thank you for helping get the word out. Thank you caring about these critical issues of human rights and justice. And most of all, thank you for trusting me to keep you informed. Let's continue to build together. ❤️✊🏽

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/8JVt7B2t2vshj7ab9S4YwiTHhLd4J-4Tq5PFlct449u0YCP30CQ7BkrzamxKLB3QOvgBWetGwQPOE2QxUYY4VpJ3_FPgCZpH5cDRFVc1MDnhw3yAErwQgV684_rKWajUd4HCvkRXm88wA32-7P4GMG2Sno6DJcwi0AYpiTskHyWA7pxVFrwEqf6U/QFO_-kMXNq7d4FaDBHIDYTMQdu0eesj9/6)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/5xJDUoYgPUdMUWtszuyzKnsTaO1zddvnp7rjOHQo5FYQ2rFGZyoqpsT635CVkrqBHP16qg5fTIYbndRllIiuSlulu83PDOVtZx1--zlZSxOO4pbmYFje0uLYqdVXIB6rIawAesvaVZWlgs4UsSnC45xq5lz6V9OI7Nu5Fvdup6D1wDo3-dLa9YA0iihQLfjSidPUynQRBMmuc_WjJ-BBKJwPgvm-UHfwc8NteVkyd8pimLtLL7IRH2b28zScaqtRlViAM11XNPVa8R3d0zeUPt_kkQpRRYfg6w2vBCvBcM2gxPDIoa2JSxcpBQ-7qSWK41HNYFUgbvbmUYMrhu9b4mr6xIDTavq4QyBjhU87EP7bUgqBlGiypyQb8SWiO5SD-V1Q3AW2iSbpFHpEworRo4RKT3ccqdveXQVBZ_ruVtEi7WL4PVSghQ/8Y6G9OreXBlXmLRl1OsaC4ZNuTjQdRqg/6)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/TBrF72CUmARnUP9I_dHI_nwReVsh-B7u0XrhBUqAIK7QFzlxEBNSMTzOZJaYaq4AbFHrsyMMTVbdrM-aKNu6kVbZ0tdbbd7HdnmYNjfMxoL8vyiOp3HllV3iHdT4uO4as04Rqz0YI5TUD6zdS4M9RxYviCTUo1ytVu9B11kcAsKIXhJXRJCqftO_aQGn1Y4ccEpBvs3KmXBY1bdcgYyb_mOsaMZrL6-RqL_8fZG_8K036Y3w9VDUQ2ReskQyl2cN-rVulqcD5Zqwg9-dX1DC52UnLu31pDSBC-o4KhGvHNMlsV_8bCIoszNyPFUpD8CMnA-Dok91_Hj1-3JLl0dMBXuu_RVPRYkjWx6xDatznDTCOBxliM-9Vem7eM0LOMLUy0K8SEtH6zT28sj7bUfqaBwgFNWgMLrAXmFY0mYFt-uyB7Vm7mFE5Q/CJOWX-83mrN3IOhfX6oM382qp2nEuott/6).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/MtF4c0gQPJYcDd_a51_Qj5y3Aq2y24-BIiPMvfswQRJIX6qZogYncSwnmwh3Lkq0SLIZLXvW0C4wLbxM_hytrruxnHJZE6dJIp2oJLaIsBV7Id3eFo-QXmiBIjIT3ahUE7sr3v4QJ-YK1BxJrpx1XCs7xfBGFBb0MXn0nTAcID8haQvJwdPXjAUtpQ6-yO2fYJ_J3X7Xb6fx_t0uTihYFFrF3Q6iuYEUf2eRdLkuL-dagjG8q9c0vsKhlwuCW4nK3zOfMeXHdok9e04E7bmEtTXExmERyqiL8mY45jmfNBoBpaYmVcbFaQC4q2aJfhcBnI6bOANXl_beY5xN9ZIcPnN5n5Thg_ATOfv0ln28olPif6VgUPeZxGzmIJ157aPOqRP7vHS6sNI17-Ko95xWpbfGQSw1bVSoVGyfe09mIMyKON8JcFT3nA/xjU_2Z4wOofdsSQUgB3dSKJPyf1gpUW3/6)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/333gQyNHNF2rviLqfzZMr-QtBAYu0H10uCn0mTRsjerfY7pD2rPguHMzdlFkw0uuGg0j-sNPwwtj3HNUL631z-Vy_DMV9HVeCyPRdi6na2MbC5av2A5D2SxuAajeYI5-Hp9OSuDx0TSn1rCFQ1zT1vq50QKUBsiRwOFZ3-Vty8NQy6tWT48wTFEjVeGbUynE9z3zH3qMXLCjmm3j8nXPRRy4q7VPfDRY-Lz-ju6nM2ab0hVO3JojljlPL96RceAp8S5jDZbV6wF2ZdCCa3djf3WZpuVJTTKIuwXbU2269VrNEb3X06o670-vQa7qgX94GAjcW98J14EjtaB-eWZZdx5y7oC6Dpr4ZqtxY1OzWSaHK9ph4kkt9pNuTg9NoCKPukTQrnz-PPI2Q-RBGvt7Dxs7hTsnRo8d_KHlQBBZ1mgXpALbnu5KbA/CodAE9VplM5J1XxZL2WIovsV1gNVyyDM/6)

Thank you!
---

body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75af9563b73d4b54a8e66797131fc3d9&_e=jJ3kUpujRUsKa6-BiPYlB_pHUGSHecGdECUQWSxWhpCJi58FnFWSben4L_zG7BhdInBqmlN45Gi-JQ2TGLwuKVMLTUtlou0bSyywDVvcbJBtT0NctPvz3Y0L2yCAPxSePABvAjmcZC5aR_Uw9rK3xIW9gdPaQY8oXLNWE9ktOerxcA8fyZjr1L1Af_o5SpbGSyVrH6rMqLUhxIrMow3dmytCAVn121MJxVUpbL-onzrGZ6ud69H9mP2_3eOtpO_thCYZJZ8KhzpxlqnFTw58g7txX0gI8iz8RvBWePdxHjfbDM-0EKv67rQhCLwvm8CIFNkepTtojeYxYTEd622f21rJvWi7FXcLHOqgy3j4TyjrcOX7N4_n-3lbvxMuB2PVN5W_jFV7u8xS86bXoXkKAQ%3D%3D)

Dear Parents and Grandparents,

America doesn’t move forward without bold leaders—people who fight back, break the rules of the establishment, and refuse to let the media control the narrative.

[**President Donald Trump and Elon Musk aren’t just shaping the future—they’re leading it.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75af9563b73d4b54a8e66797131fc3d9&_e=jJ3kUpujRUsKa6-BiPYlB_pHUGSHecGdECUQWSxWhpCJi58FnFWSben4L_zG7BhdInBqmlN45Gi-JQ2TGLwuKVMLTUtlou0bSyywDVvcbJBtT0NctPvz3Y0L2yCAPxSePABvAjmcZC5aR_Uw9rK3xIW9gdPaQY8oXLNWE9ktOerxcA8fyZjr1L1Af_o5SpbGSyVrH6rMqLUhxIrMow3dmytCAVn121MJxVUpbL-onzrGZ6ud69H9mP2_3eOtpO_t6dDaVMhx2O6XAleW3gfgfFcBSdM_gjBLIVnV9XpjDF8yHUlbOkujsLgg2ydmzgI-MdQPpLJI4bdjvwiF5dnKDXBrDp1CgRXg_2oYx6WfWQxmns0YE94oizO17NUTVRhQJsj0e1wvUBrzYBjP8lplxA%3D%3D)

President Trump is taking on Washington and fighting for American families, while Elon Musk is revolutionizing technology, taking on Big Government, and proving that bold ideas can reshape the future.

But let’s be honest—our kids aren’t hearing the truth. The media, the left, and even their schools are distorting the facts about these two leaders. If we don’t teach them what real leadership looks like, who will?

That’s why we’re excited to offer you this [FREE educational bundle](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75af9563b73d4b54a8e66797131fc3d9&_e=jJ3kUpujRUsKa6-BiPYlB_pHUGSHecGdECUQWSxWhpCJi58FnFWSben4L_zG7BhdInBqmlN45Gi-JQ2TGLwuKVMLTUtlou0bSyywDVvcbJBtT0NctPvz3Y0L2yCAPxSePABvAjmcZC5aR_Uw9rK3xIW9gdPaQY8oXLNWE9ktOerxcA8fyZjr1L1Af_o5SpbGSyVrH6rMqLUhxIrMow3dmytCAVn121MJxVUpbL-onzrGZ6ud69H9mP2_3eOtpO_tq_3c3B340KTZWqM-g17PjuIG4syuuPVMKfIySy66AF3D_MCvtnzR-bJ0eAxUs8kZ-d6GWqwxHYUuKd3lVCfH_xgbxiaiIAtUci45mlm2t2lj-yOWEZMcXTyyzjJoCzbHhkT2SQYUzq2u42c9DqU-LA%3D%3D)—to give kids the real story of these two bold leaders and their impact on America’s future.

[**Two Leaders. Two Stories. clean_body: Dear Parents and Grandparents, America doesn’t move forward without bold leaders—people who fight back, break the rules of the establishment, and refuse to let the media control the narrative. President Trump is taking on Washington and fighting for American families, while Elon Musk is revolutionizing technology, taking on Big Government, and proving that bold ideas can reshape the future. But let’s be honest—our kids aren’t hearing the truth. The media, the left, and even their schools are distorting the facts about these two leaders. If we don’t teach them what real leadership looks like, who will? That’s why we’re excited to offer you this —to give kids the real story of these two bold leaders and their impact on America’s future. ✔ Donald Trump: The leader who put America First, fought for families, and reshaped politics. ✔ Elon Musk: The visionary behind Tesla, SpaceX, and groundbreaking technology. ✔ How they’re teaming up to challenge the status quo and fix what’s broken. Trump is taking on Washington’s corruption. Musk is taking on Big Tech. Trump fought to bring back American jobs. Musk is creating the jobs of the future. Together, they’re proving that leadership, innovation, and thinking big can change everything. Our kids deserve to know what real leadership looks like. They deserve to know the truth. ** For God, country, and our children’s future, The Kids Guide Team

name: Gay Valimont
subject: We don’t do KINGS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks,

Donald Trump says a lot of crazy stuff but watching him lean in to proclaiming himself King is scary - and so gross.

Gross because he is ACTING like a king - flaunting the Constitution and the Rule of Law - in ways that are going to hurt every working American, seniors, veterans, you name it.

This is America and in America: WE DON’T DO KINGS.

I’m Gay Valimont, running for the 1st Congressional District seat in Florida’s Panhandle vacated by the sleazebag Matt Gaetz (who DEFINITELY would see Trump wear a crown).

To fight back against this talk of kings, I need your help-the special election is on April 1st! Can you help me defeat my Republican opponent - who will ALWAYS BEND THE KNEE to Donald Trump?

Can you give $15, $45, or even $100 today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton -- to help me WIN this crucial seat? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

We are told time and again that when Trump says this crazy crap he’s just trolling the libs, etc. etc. But haven’t you seen enough? The guy poops on a gold toilet! He has vassals and estates! He thinks himself ABOVE the law! He just does what he wants.

That seems rather KINGLY to me, and this is America: WE DON’T DO KINGS. Most of our ancestors came from the lands of princes and paupers to create a Constitution and a society where every man and woman is equal in their citizenship.

Let’s stop the Trump kingdom in its tracks: Donate $25 or whatever you can afford today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]I’ve been running for this seat for almost two years and NOT ONCE has anyone I’ve talked to spoken of the need for a president to act more like a king.

Here, everyone is concerned about the cost of homeowners insurance and eggs. Whether their Medicaid, Medicare or Social Security benefits are going to be slashed to pay for billionaires who live like kings.

Please, let’s all stand up to this just like the patriots before us.

With contempt for kings,

Gay Valimont
Democratic Nominee, FL-01

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]
