name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Slams Governor Healey’s Hypocrisy and Political Posturing in Latest Interview
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kso1hB5zjurVwMxwDJezjwYoST_-0MCQxQw8n4N_DOxbGo2K6W0YGuSUShsA45-CwkFXMgv-pwLybAdlB8AAbYwMGCnqEFgn6Krnr90sn2zqTSgSGKYNLQrB2XmZkmMyC8_HDGfRIl1RKLgTUq40bQ==&c=JJ8fNoie2OnnZlF46b27da2RqByz2wvrtjr2mraTrZKzx0QuN_Y5WQ==&ch=do8V1nf2mQTOhjmGFRJCkoW3R8R8a1rMHenvhldJgCzvlzMVdR8suA==)
---
| MassGOP Slams Governor Healey's Hypocrisy and Political Posturing in Latest Interview
---
---
| Boston, MA - In a recent interview, Governor Maura Healey showcased a stunning display of hypocrisy, misleading claims, and political posturing that put her national ambitions ahead of the well-being of Massachusetts residents. The Massachusetts Republican Party is calling out the Governor's blatant contradictions and failures to address the real issues facing the Commonwealth. "Governor Healey wants to lecture others on leadership while she herself is weaponizing funding, hiking taxes, and misleading the public on the consequences of her policies," said MassGOP Executive Director John Milligan. "Her administration has been defined by mismanagement, political gamesmanship, and a refusal to take responsibility."
Weaponizing Funding While Accusing Others
During the interview, Governor Healey condemned the idea of using funding as leverage, criticizing former President Trump for allegedly withholding federal support. Yet, she is guilty of the very same tactic--punishing municipalities that do not comply with the MBTA Communities Act by withholding grants.
"The Governor's hypocrisy is astounding," said Milligan. "She decries federal funding decisions while strong-arming cities and towns right here in Massachusetts."
Falsehoods and Finger-Pointing on the Migrant Crisis
Governor Healey continued her misleading narrative on immigration, falsely claiming that the migrant crisis began a year before she took office. In reality, the crisis began under her administration due to her refusal to enforce policies that would protect Massachusetts residents.
"She wants to blame everyone but herself--Trump, the federal government, even 'public perception'--while conveniently ignoring the fact that it was her own inaction that led to this crisis spiraling out of control," Milligan added.
Healey also claimed that most people in the state's emergency shelter system are Massachusetts families. If true, the solution is simple: release the data. Yet, her administration has refused to provide transparency, dodging questions and keeping the public in the dark.
"Governor Healey keeps saying there's nothing to hide--so why is she hiding everything?" said Milligan. "If she wants to prove her case, she should open the books instead of gaslighting voters."
A National Ambition at the Expense of Massachusetts
Governor Healey's performance made one thing clear: she is more focused on her rising influence within the Democratic Party than solving the problems of everyday Massachusetts residents.
"This is not the Maura Healey of Massachusetts--this is a national-stage Maura Healey, avoiding local press, dodging accountability, and positioning herself for a bigger political role," said Milligan. "While she plays to Washington insiders, Massachusetts taxpayers are left paying the price for her failures."
From out-of-control spending on the migrant crisis--now totaling nearly $2 billion--to policies that punish local communities, Governor Healey has repeatedly demonstrated that her priorities lie with party politics, not the people of Massachusetts. The MassGOP stands committed to holding her accountable and fighting for real solutions that put taxpayers first.

### ###

From out-of-control spending on the migrant crisis--now totaling nearly $2 billion--to policies that punish local communities, Governor Healey has repeatedly demonstrated that her priorities lie with party politics, not the people of Massachusetts. The MassGOP stands committed to holding her accountable and fighting for real solutions that put taxpayers first. ### | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

Friend, Donald Trump and Elon Musk have taken a sledgehammer to the federal government, gutting key programs like the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, the U.S. Agency for International Development, and even firing Federal Aviation Administration staff. So, it shouldn’t surprise us that this month the **Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)** was a target of Trump and Musk. If you're unfamiliar with CISA, they’re tasked with providing state and local election officials with critical tools and assistance to defend against cyber and physical threats to election systems. **And now, they’re being ordered to halt “all election security activities.”** This is a blatant attack on our elections – and Arizona Secretary of State is fighting back: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103110517/531187515/38783912?refcode=em-3.2.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWJlYjU1MS1hOWY3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYjUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQ3PthT83qTny19yD9XPRnXB2cWGAHr3tob3wM-ROvA=) It’s clear, folks: Trump’s federal government is retreating from defending free and fair elections – and our Democratic Secretaries of State are truly the last line of defense against attempts to undermine our democracy. Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Peter, If you think the fight for fair maps is slowing down, think again. It’s true: The work we do _this_ _year_ could determine who controls the House of Representatives after next year’s midterm elections. The GOP has to defend a razor-thin majority, but they could protect or even expand it by engaging in more gerrymandering in the months to come. **By fighting for fair maps in 2025, we can help make sure Democrats have a fair shot at winning back control of the House in 2026, ending the GOP trifecta in Washington, and putting a real check on Donald Trump’s power. ** [**While Republicans continue working to undermine our democracy and fair representation, it’s going to take this entire movement to ensure the National Democratic Redistricting Committee has the resources to fight back. As Trump’s extreme agenda continues to unfold, the need for fair maps and fair representation has never been more urgent.
And we can’t let Republicans hold onto their trifecta in Washington with more map manipulation.
Ahead of last year’s House elections, the GOP was able to gerrymander three more districts in their favor in North Carolina — _and Republicans only won control of the House by three seats._
This year, Republicans could draw new maps in Ohio that tilt _three more_ Democratic-held seats in the GOP’s direction. We have to be ready to fight back for fair maps in Ohio and around the country right now if we want a fair chance at taking back the House next year.
The NDRC is playing the long game to ensure we’re ready to respond to any and every gerrymandering threat by Republicans. But what we do now will determine how we’re able to respond to ensure Americans have a representative map.
[**We’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we can keep up the fight. Donate today and help fund this critical work — every donation helps determine how much we can invest in advancing fair maps across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103110800/531188289/469381263?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TakingBacktheHouse_email_20250302-NDRC-Tier1-TakingBacktheHouse_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250302-NDRC-Tier1-TakingBacktheHouse_&utm_campaign=TakingBacktheHouse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3YmViNTUxLWE5ZjctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNiNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GPAZSMQJ4zKfPZucKpYGvc-QUPNkW3jH8gKZOWm29-I=)

clean_body: We need to keep building to keep up this fight | Peter, If you think the fight for fair maps is slowing down, think again. It’s true: The work we do this year could determine who controls the House of Representatives after next year’s midterm elections. The GOP has to defend a razor-thin majority, but they could protect or even expand it by engaging in more gerrymandering in the months to come. By fighting for fair maps in 2025, we can help make sure Democrats have a fair shot at winning back control of the House in 2026, ending the GOP trifecta in Washington, and putting a real check on Donald Trump’s power. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As Trump’s extreme agenda continues to unfold, the need for fair maps and fair representation has never been more urgent. name: SAVE PUBLIC BROADCASTING (via VPP)
subject: Don’t let Trump get away with this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
NPR and PBS under MAGA attack
| **_BREAKING:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3) Public broadcasting is under TOTAL ATTACK — Trump won’t stop until the ONLY news outlets left are propaganda networks like FOX and Breitbart!

**We’re STUNNED to see you still haven’t signed our petition to defend PBS and NPR.** We need you in this fight, friend!!

[**You have _one more hour_ to add your signature before we officially close the petition: Add your name now to save PBS and NPR! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3) | [SIGN NOW: SAVE PBS AND NPR FROM TRUMP’S DESTRUCTION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3)
---
Together,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**—ORIGINAL MESSAGE ATTACHED BELOW—**
**FCC Orders Investigation into PBS and NPR as Republicans Push “Defund NPR Act”** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3) | [YOUR SIGNATURE REQUESTED: SIGN NOW TO SAVE PUBLIC BROADCASTING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3)
---
**Here’s what you need to know NOW:**

→ Trump and Elon Musk said _“legacy media must die.”_ Under Project 2025, ANY public broadcasting that criticizes Trump would LOSE funding.

→ Republicans are already launching baseless investigations and their “Defund NPR Act” — **_we have to stop them NOW!!!_**

[**This is a DESPICABLE attack on the free press and our democracy! We refuse to let the MAGA mob get away with this: SIGN NOW to SAVE public broadcasting »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3)
[15,000 SIGNATURES DUE BY MIDNIGHT: SIGN NOW TO SAVE PUBLIC BROADCASTING IN AMERICA »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250302_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3)
---
Thank you for taking quick action,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19108%2E878179%2EYIuiy3)
---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Elissa giving the State of the Union Response
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I'm looking forward to leveling with the American people about what is actually happening in this country.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2248%2E135344%2EKinMIC)

Please see the email Elissa sent earlier this week. We hope that you'll be tuning in to watch.

\- Team Slotkin
* * *
Every year after the State of the Union Address, the opposing political party selects one person to give an official response carried on national television and watched by millions of people.
This year, I've been asked to give that response. It’s a big honor, especially as a brand new, 8-weeks-in Senator.
I'm definitely looking forward to leveling with the American people about what is actually happening in this country.
Whether it's our economic security or our national security, we've got to chart a way forward that actually improves people's lives in the country we all love.
You've been a very important part of my journey to get to this point, and I am hoping that you'll tune in to watch next Tuesday night.
Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-feb25.hgaHPE&refcode=em250227-1&t=2&akid=2248%2E135344%2EKinMIC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-feb25.ZmO5oB&refcode=em250227-1&t=3&akid=2248%2E135344%2EKinMIC)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-feb25.hgaHPE&refcode=em250227-1&t=4&akid=2248%2E135344%2EKinMIC)**
---
****

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2248%2E135344%2EKinMIC).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=2248%2E135344%2EKinMIC)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread. But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator. | | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angp_HWLfd0MWphRRYkMxZ3pGA8NPR4QjR-mp3YWuN5ZhbZWX9j3thSLQoQliOttOdaBkaVEo0DiCZ9UBZ1UooVvlkb-i7Ahk4_cYjl3kWi_DHPZmb87Ywhai2qggTUxX5xwo80xTG0CbfkYb5ibiE8yXqUYEasVVd9WeYweqYm8y7a-7YDlvH63MOAJbgRdXYvRR7msdgM_M8DeJT541oxp7etfcc_SrsbrlKbYQt_vyV3LcnVDSYGEYfYi0riG876E06xsv4-DwCAJndDpML0giJMURQaHx31-W6kJmMc9i5mcvGjKjDieaBGpKk2if8fA%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angp_HWLfd0MWphRRYkMxZ3pGA8NPR4QjR-mp3YWuN5ZhbZWX9j3thSLQoQliOttOdaBkaVEo0DiCZ9UBZ1UooVvlkb-i7Ahk4_cYjl3kWi_DHPZmb87Ywhai2qggTUxX5xwo80xTG0CbfkYb5ibiE8yXqUYEasVVd9WeYweqYm8y7eApH-hrllYX3Wt5Tndg3oPENICTbeFsoYw0Z45yh7RqAUXvQ7OS4xNYYsTaz2c6VIog4osfUDjgWjxkrttLznpa_IcEOlIQcJ1xkYsUqqY-gx4XP2qF6ERnyboVyCBGotxT9WSnm1lD8OGZaJ55vq4%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angq_Bw4YitNbNk3licdqBgoOG-1lPaFPFHWKneNiYidqrWLacQmvajoyXA6Gem6UGle7cqetE4Dg4QJKAdLSO-9-tSMkTFXOL6xGNmLvZTrYCqKIgSj7_GDurzNVuEbHiotwrDOXsMVNJhe_08OdLSzYtpz123cQmODYFmoGRhant2HSKAIlbNB40j6s8WIDP5I%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angp_HWLfd0MWphRRYkMxZ3pGA8NPR4QjR-mp3YWuN5ZhbZWX9j3thSLQoQliOttOdaBkaVEo0DiCZ9UBZ1UooVvlkb-i7Ahk4_cYjl3kWi_DHPZmb87Ywhai2qggTUxX5xwo80xTG0CbfkYb5ibiE8yXqUYEasVVd9WeYweqYm8y7ZIHWU8F5RY_Ic1RarP_2UcCZAo28QJzfUBNWCGldmxjfAatEO1AJGZTLMgM-1GBZLGaT_lnpT_6q5q1Gl_7D6mThdlOIV97BfRMN74LoxYMOAH_fQSFVQco3N4_jhJDAly9zchhXQtj1X9Br6HyD3g%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angp_HWLfd0MWphRRYkMxZ3pGA8NPR4QjR-mp3YWuN5ZhbZWX9j3thSLQoQliOttOdaBkaVEo0DiCZ9UBZ1UooVvlkb-i7Ahk4_cYjl3kWi_DHPZmb87Ywhai2qggTUxX5xwo80xTG0CbfkYb5ibiE8yXqUYEasVVd9WeYweqYm8y7Tcly6bDyQwO_nlFvBLdaFm85s1jCzczV_orzz-Pe3qPP5qI5AOr9oNsghqlNRupjolDgORuNqwpjt985DknDl8U4gYD_v6bIGaoRMbuqNNv4PQaz8LnwWAXah8zPHqr3lpj9yHtBCA9DxvsHLmIK1U%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angp_HWLfd0MWphRRYkMxZ3pGA8NPR4QjR-mp3YWuN5ZhbZWX9j3thSLQoQliOttOdaBkaVEo0DiCZ9UBZ1UooVvlkb-i7Ahk4_cYjl3kWi_DHPZmb87Ywhai2qggTUxX5xwo80xTG0CbfkYb5ibiE8yXqUYEasVVd9WeYweqYm8y7TB5o8cc3wCc3qcmcoMNek8rQoN1EHj1sMidVhCbNf8HlMAtdMcNakoNlJCkaiVmntBag_uFEaSkwInWVxs_I8wxmXgk9brdgIiU2P0Cs8rG5ewHsIybi4MzrCfoRG67vl-e48ZRugP-OIkvobbuAGQ%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a9dbf88989b84fa8959f79c1beb9a709&_e=Z7qJRF4MuJzOJLwCLOC8FbfiVR4imuPdE6_j9n-Angp_HWLfd0MWphRRYkMxZ3pGA8NPR4QjR-mp3YWuN5ZhbZWX9j3thSLQoQliOttOdaBkaVEo0DiCZ9UBZ1UooVvlkb-i7Ahk4_cYjl3kWi_DHPZmb87Ywhai2qggTUxX5xwo80xTG0CbfkYb5ibiE8yXqUYEasVVd9WeYweqYm8y7bAk3yY0y4msjc8mbmQJvoas9s85ENRuQpef0QkbFJQe5JeLY_D_nSMiOAaTZUOIQoufRzDx3ww5X_m7pAi4Qs5dt7-hwfXmdCuI_jN2gr3NUY8mAcTTHqV5Pg8uv4YT2U0eDPRpz76IxS-7zCN56Po%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

subject: The guy who humiliated Zelensky about his clothes was Marjorie Taylor Greene's boyfriend
body:
Brian Glenn is Marjorie Taylor Greene’s boyfriend and far-right podcaster at "Real America’s Voice."

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103111378/531189560/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhkZmNmNzQtYjFmNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rb96areyK-Z7yCicNxQyITtDadhuXoSrSy77SQxjq1U=&emci=b7dfcf74-b1f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&emdi=b8dfcf74-b1f7-ef11-90cb-0022482a93b5&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
By now, you've seen the clip.
It’s the Oval Office. Cameras are rolling. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky sits opposite Donald Trump and JD Vance, enduring their humiliating, schoolyard bullying.
**Just when it seems things can't get worse, a voice interrupts—not to challenge Trump’s policies or ask about the war—but to mock Zelensky’s clothing as “disrespectful.”**
It’s surreal: Zelensky, a heroic ally whose country is fighting for survival, scolded over his outfit while his family and nation face existential threats from Putin’s brutal regime.
**Here's the kicker: That wasn't even a real journalist. It was Brian Glenn—Marjorie Taylor Greene’s boyfriend and far-right podcaster at "Real America’s Voice."**
[**We'll explain exactly how this happened (and why it's just the beginning). But first, please chip in now to help COURIER protect independent journalism and ensure the truth survives this dark moment:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103111379/531189561/2081197767?refcode=20250302_Zelensky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhkZmNmNzQtYjFmNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rb96areyK-Z7yCicNxQyITtDadhuXoSrSy77SQxjq1U=)
**[Support the Free Press](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103111380/531189562/-1581427288?refcode=20250302_Zelensky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhkZmNmNzQtYjFmNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rb96areyK-Z7yCicNxQyITtDadhuXoSrSy77SQxjq1U=)**
Here's how we reached this disgraceful moment, where Marjorie Taylor Greene’s boyfriend was given a major role in shaping American diplomacy:
Trump and Republicans have spent decades eroding trust in journalism, labeling legitimate reporters as threats to America if their reporting challenged Trump or the wealthy interests he serves.
**Back in power, Trump is escalating his attacks—insulting reporters, encouraging doxxing, filing lawsuits, and even creating absurd loyalty tests (like demanding the AP call the Gulf of Mexico the "Gulf of America") to justify banning reputable outlets from the White House.**
Now, Trump is adding slots for right-wing propagandists and replacing respected journalists with figures like Brian Glenn, who don’t just report the news but actively participate in staged spectacles to shape public perception.
Peter, Glenn isn't an outlier; he's soon to be the new normal in the Trump administration.
**This calculated assault on press freedom aims to silence accountability and reshape the truth to be whatever Donald Trump says it is. COURIER is fighting back with fearless, independent journalism—free from corporate influence or political manipulation.**
[**If you care about preserving democracy and protecting truth, we urgently need your support to defend journalistic independence and the free press while we still can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103111381/531189563/2081197767?refcode=20250302_Zelensky&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhkZmNmNzQtYjFmNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2I1IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rb96areyK-Z7yCicNxQyITtDadhuXoSrSy77SQxjq1U=)

We can’t win. | | | | | ---|--- What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership? ** 1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 8,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending. 2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections. 3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, much more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power. Listen, all you really need to know is this: Without you on our team, we can’t invest in state legislative races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? name: Research Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Tracking survey: Statehood for D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
WaPo Opinion: D.C. statehood is a voting rights issue [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/WaPo_DC_Statehood_VotingRights.png]
If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ).
We want to hear from 87 more voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?

clean_body: WaPo Opinion: D.C. statehood is a voting rights issue [] If Washington, D.C. was a state, the U.S. Senate would look different and the landscape for critical legislation would definitely be altered. While it doesn't have the square mileage of other states, D.C. would actually be ahead of Wyoming and Vermont in terms of population ( according to the 2020 census ). We want to hear from 87 more voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away? Team: Should Washington, D.C. be a state? # [Where MAGA goes to let loose in DC](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158121317&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTIxMzE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA5NTU0ODAsImV4cCI6MTc0MzU0NzQ4MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.84mcdsJy54wWgDBXxJZwqqLBe2VQNC36QuNz87K1YoA)
### The new hangout of the populist right on Capitol Hill
Mar 2
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158121317&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTIxMzE3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDk1NTQ4MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQzNTQ3NDgwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sVO0kcCOBb-9mwzZyGV75EUuQx5_TsUg2fdM8rMoX3E&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158121317&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTIxMzE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA5NTU0ODAsImV4cCI6MTc0MzU0NzQ4MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.84mcdsJy54wWgDBXxJZwqqLBe2VQNC36QuNz87K1YoA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158121317&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MTIxMzE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA5NTU0ODAsImV4cCI6MTc0MzU0NzQ4MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.84mcdsJy54wWgDBXxJZwqqLBe2VQNC36QuNz87K1YoA)
---
| | [](https://substack..tBcCCGbA-3Baii8ucEmJYup-exDD-4VjfrOWRXISYlI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/where-maga-goes-to-let-loose-in-dc?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d849abc9-66c2-4f5f-824b-50a6ea311ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Weeks ahead of Trump's second Inauguration, I found myself watching Steve Bannon giving a speech at a War Room . "We're flooding the zone [with cabinet picks]!" He stated to a hundreds were crowded into an event space festooned with late-empire antiques and weathered, imported French mirrors at a new restaurant called Butterworth's.
Yet despite winning the popular vote, affiliation with the Trump administration can still get you barred from watering holes in DC. In mid December a block up Pennsylvania Avenue, [two incoming Trump officials were refused service at Beuchert's Saloon](https://substack.com/redirect/75de2030-10a6-42c7-ac5b-b8183c2a841b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Though the owner condemned the waitress' activist actions after the fact, the incident signals that, at least inside the Beltway, the anti-Trump resistance is alive and well.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09756205-f2d5-4e3a-8759-55941f39249e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A few months into Trump's term, it appears that strategy of "flooding the zone" has worked out better than any DC pundits could have imagined. MAGA loyalists and enemies of the establishment were confirmed by the Senate: Tulsi Gabbard is now the NSA Director, RFK is running HHS, and Kash Patel, who famously said that he would turn the J. Edgar Hoover FBI HQ into a museum on day one, is now Director of the Agency. Many of Trump's top cabinet picks are former Democrats, indicative of the transition of Trumpism from the backwaters of American culture to the mainstream.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zBVA6mC5VTFpnHngh0u3MVF_mJNEy5HagMYjH1OjZTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158121317)
If one examines the differences between Trump's first stay in the White House and his second, look no further than its unofficial headquarters to see how the first Admin was different from what we see today.
You may have heard stories about the old MAGA hangout from Trump's first term, situated in the old Post Office Museum, Trump Hotel. It was a grandiose Bar-A-Lago of sorts. The bar sat beneath massive a vaulted spire with a sprawling and echoey space with admin notables scattered across a vast marble floor. They sipped $25 martinis and munched $50 orders of hickory-smoked bacon as they discussed the latest Trump vs. the Swamp showdown. I sipped a few drinks in that mausoleum that doubled as a bar; though because I was wearing my FAKE NEWS flip flops and Hawaiian shirt, my lack of formal attire drew some skeptical stares.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4a33e33-e498-43f3-b9f5-7fdf795ea392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This space is now owned by the multinational hotel chain, the Waldorf Astoria.
Contrast that with a new hangout which accommodates MAGA, MAHA, Hawaiian shirt-wearing kooks like me, and everyone in between: Butterworth's is a cozier, more intimate space just blocks away from the Capitol.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zBVA6mC5VTFpnHngh0u3MVF_mJNEy5HagMYjH1OjZTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158121317)
While Trump Hotel was situated in the no-man's land of Pennsylvania Avenue between the White House and The Hill, Butterworth's is a stone's throw from the hallowed halls of Congress. A MAGA hat was a rare site in DC from 2016-2020, but now I see the red hats as commonly as maroon Commanders caps. The accumulation of candle wax suggests that even a new paradigm has its roots in the Old World.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a14c8659-1a3b-4011-8fa3-e8f8d6daf411?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was uncommon to see anyone other than a Trump-adjacent individual at Trump hotel, but Butterworth's is regularly populated by hill staffers on both side of the political spectrum, tourists, and Trumpers alike. As MAGA becomes mainstream, they no longer hide away at an ostentatiously expensive vault like Trump Hotel. They hang out at the center of DC's social scene at a place that may host an event for a progressive think tank one day, and an America first one the next.
It would have been inconceivable to DC insiders that Trump would ever make his way back into the seat of power as the tear gas and pepper spray was settling on January 6, 2021. From the ashen residue of discharged fire extinguishers expended inside the Rotunda, I had an inkling that Trump's movement would rise again.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97f2181f-ab7a-4ae6-8066-28f8770d87d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With snot on my face and pepper spray still burning my eyes, I knew that January 6 definitely a riot, but not the nail in the coffin Insurrection that cable news hosts hoped it would be.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2855de76-80c7-4bb8-9c76-ac90f0142e3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When I pitched my recent book, RIOT DIET, to publishers, I was told by both Conservative and Progressive imprints that Trump would never make it through the primaries, let alone win a second term. They told me Trump as "old news." Yet Trump has proven the publishers I spoke to--as well as the entire establishment--wrong with a historic popular-vote victory on the fifth of November, 2024.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zBVA6mC5VTFpnHngh0u3MVF_mJNEy5HagMYjH1OjZTU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158121317)
That brings us to the unexpected home base for the populist return to Washington. The restaurant was opened in 2024 and its proximity to Capitol Hill as well as the fact that it is one of the few District locations with owners that accommodate anything tangentially associated with the Orange Man's allies. It is no surprise because DC is anything but a Republican stronghold, let alone a MAGA one. But as the city seems to be engrossed in a battle between ideas, the difference this time is that the MAGA coalition seems to be winning. Butterworth's isn't an exorbitant display of bawdy tastelessness (while Trump Hotel had a magnificent interior, the fake antique chairs and the knockoff Persian carpets would never be appreciated by so-called high society). It has real antiques, weathered mirrors imported from France, handmade stained glass, and--though my McGinniss name makes me impartial--a vintage photo of Queen Elizabeth II.
That returns us back to the original question after Trump Hotel was bought up by the big boys and his administration is back to DC for MAGA 2.0. Where can Trump supporters enjoy a pint or a bite in a city that voted Democrat in every election since 1964? Does populism have a place in DC? Well, considering I ran into the January 6 Lectern Guy at this joint, I would say yes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/141cccef-30bf-4899-b32f-ea4d2304a7fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The machinations of America's populist future will likely take hold among late empire French antiques, old murky mirrors and beneath a portrait of the Queen--with one foot in the Old World and another in the New. Time will tell whether or not Trump will bring about his promised "Golden Age," but having been in Washington for both of his terms I can say there is something different in the air this time around.
Bart Hutchins, the owner of Butterworth's, noted the transition of MAGA from outsiders to the stewards of culture, "When you're an outsider, no one cares what you're doing. But when you're in power, all of a sudden everyone's watching and go 'oh that's the wine to drink, that's the food to eat, that's how you act in public.' And we really gotta learn how to do that."
22-year-old Conservative activist CJ Pearson called the joint, "the watering hole for the MAGA movement." His younger demographic also speaks to many of the youthful voters who may not have voted at all were it not for Trump's appeal to new media personalities like Theo Von and Joe Rogan, "During the first administration I was still learning how to drive so I didn't spend too much time at the Trump Hotel now Waldorf... So for me living in DC now being here, it's so cool to see what they've been able to build here."
When you ask yourself the question of why it is that the ideological left occupies nearly every corner of this city and yet there is no way for the new right to make inroads, perhaps there is an opportunity for the red hats to find their home at a place with not only some class, but also one where people don't posture from a distance. A bar where there beers are decently affordable, and where one can't hide behind their titles or a VIP section roped off from the rest of the bar. The mere fact that such a place exists is evidence of the fact that the tides are turning here in our nation's capital.
* * *

name: Something wrong?
subject: You're ignoring us!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
You STILL haven’t signed the petition to mandate Voter ID in all 50 states...

| |

Hello all,
I’m Gay Valimont, and as someone who believes deeply in compassion and accountability, I’m speaking out against a deeply troubling issue: the treatment of migrants under the Trump administration.
Reports of migrants being sent to Guantanamo Bay, where conditions are described as abusive and inhumane, are unacceptable. These individuals are fleeing violence and seeking safety, and we cannot allow them to be treated like criminals.
I can’t fight the GOP alone. There is under a month left until elections and I need your help to take this fight to Capitol Hill.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6338394C65796B42784F75722F734861544330636373646138326E3463476861345850634865545A6C4D53796A307368306F7533586852322B30564672616234/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-02%20at%202.59.01%E2%80%AFPM.png]
I am committed to fighting for humane immigration policies, improving healthcare access, addressing the opioid crisis, and supporting our farmers. My campaign is focused on ensuring a brighter future for Northwest Florida through policies that put people first. I want a government that listens to working families, prioritizes justice, and ensures everyone has a fair chance at success.
We’re in the final stretch before the special election, and I need your support. We are just $1,000 away from reaching our goal for the week, and with your help, we can continue to fight for a future where everyone is treated fairly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

# [Islamic Thought and the Search for a Just Society](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=158217439&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MjE3NDM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA5NTQ5NTgsImV4cCI6MTc0MzU0Njk1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pPrnTiB3T7DCoQTT7UjKorvmEM-oIpwPhrhYCB0m-Lo)
### In a fractured America, with low trust and high division, it's time to reconsider the frameworks that shape our society. What if the answers we need have been hidden behind fear and misinformation?
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Mar 2

| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/islamic-thought-and-the-search-for?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

Let's step back from the daily chaos and take a broader view of how we build societies that actually _work_.
If America is struggling--politically divided, economically strained, and socially fragmented--it's not enough to tinker around the edges. We need to think deeply about the **frameworks that shape our lives**. What if we've been operating from broken assumptions? What if a better model exists, but it's been ignored, misunderstood, or even deliberately misrepresented?
To move forward, we need an honest look at different traditions of thought - _especially_ the ones we've been taught to fear or judge, rather than understand. In this post, I'll explore Islamic guidance--not as a rigid religious system, but as a coherent ethical framework that has historically supported justice, economic fairness, and social cohesion. In my next post, I'll expand the lens further, comparing Islamic thought with other philosophical and governance models to see what we can learn from each.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=158217439&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MjE3NDM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDA5NTQ5NTgsImV4cCI6MTc0MzU0Njk1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pPrnTiB3T7DCoQTT7UjKorvmEM-oIpwPhrhYCB0m-Lo)
* * *
### **Islamic Thought and the Search for a Just Society**
America is at a breaking point. Trust in institutions has crumbled, political discourse is fractured, and communities feel increasingly isolated from one another. Many people--liberals, conservatives, and those who are simply exhausted--are wondering: _Is there a better way to build a society?_
Islamic philosophy, at its best, provides a compelling answer. It offers a structured, justice-centered way of organizing personal morality, economic fairness, and social cohesion. However, due to decades of misinformation and political weaponization, many Americans have been taught to fear or misunderstand it. The reality is that Islamic guidance, when done well, works better than almost any system Americans have been presented with in their lifetime.
### **Strengths of Islamic Philosophy and Guidance**
1. **Holistic Ethical System** - Islam does not separate morality from daily life. Business, family, governance, and personal integrity are all interconnected within an ethical framework.
2. **Justice and Equity** - The Qur'anic principle of _adl_ (justice) mandates fairness in governance, economics, and human interactions. It is a divine obligation, not a political preference.
3. **Balance Between Individual and Collective Rights** - Unlike systems that emphasize only individual liberty or collective control, Islam calls for both personal accountability and communal well-being.
4. **Compassion as a Core Value** - The Quran repeatedly emphasizes _rahma_ (compassion), making kindness and care central to interpersonal and governmental actions.
5. **Structured Economic Justice** - Islam prohibits exploitative financial practices (_riba_ , usury) and mandates wealth redistribution through _zakat_ to prevent extreme wealth gaps.
6. **Ethical Governance and Rule of Law** - The principle of _shura_ (consultation) requires leaders to govern with justice, transparency, and accountability.
7. **Resilience and Flexibility** - Islamic jurisprudence (_fiqh_) allows for adaptive interpretations (_ijtihad_), making it highly applicable to modern needs when approached with sincerity.
8. **Radical Personal Accountability** - Unlike other religious or secular frameworks, Islam emphasizes direct, personal responsibility for every human being. There are no blanket pardons, no inherited sin, no saints to intercede on your behalf--each person stands accountable before their Creator for their own deeds. This profound moral structure cultivates a sense of responsibility that results in more ethical behavior at both personal and societal levels.

### **Challenges and Misapplications**
1. **Historical Rigidity in Interpretation** - Some interpretations of Islamic law have failed to evolve with societal changes, leading to unnecessary restrictions or stagnation.
2. **Misuse in Governance** - Political rulers throughout history have twisted Islamic concepts for power, contradicting Islam's true commitment to justice.
3. **Gender and Social Roles** - While Islam originally revolutionized women's rights, cultural traditions have sometimes imposed regressive norms in its name.
4. **Sectarian and Interpretation Conflicts** - Differences within Islamic schools of thought have been manipulated for division rather than constructive diversity.
5. **Legalism Over Ethical Spirit** - A focus on rigid rules rather than the spirit of justice and compassion has, in some cases, undermined Islam's broader moral aims.
6. **Modernity and Social Justice Struggles** - Islamic ethics provide a strong foundation for justice, but some institutions have been slow to apply them to modern systemic challenges like climate change, corporate power, and state violence.
* * *

### **The Golden Age of Muslim Civilization: A Legacy of Knowledge and Justice**
For over a thousand years, the Islamic world was a beacon of civilization, stretching from Spain in the west to China in the east. The rapid expansion of the Islamic empire was not only a military or political feat but an unprecedented fusion of cultures, knowledge, and governance that fostered one of the most advanced societies of its time. Under the Abbasids in Baghdad, the Umayyads in Cordoba, and the Ottomans in Istanbul, the Islamic world became a crucible of intellectual achievement, where scholars of diverse backgrounds--Muslims, Christians, Jews, and others--collaborated in an environment that prized knowledge and discovery.
The contributions of Muslim civilization to global progress cannot be overstated. Muslim scholars preserved and expanded upon Greek, Roman, Persian, and Indian knowledge, making groundbreaking advancements in medicine, mathematics, astronomy, and architecture. Figures such as Al-Khwarizmi (who developed algebra), Ibn Sina (whose medical texts were used in Europe for centuries), and Al-Zahrawi (a pioneer in surgery) laid the foundations for modern science. The world's first degree-granting universities emerged in the Islamic world, with institutions such as Al-Qarawiyyin in Morocco and Al-Azhar in Egypt fostering a tradition of higher learning that would later inspire the university system in Europe.
The Islamic Golden Age was also a time of remarkable social coherence. Non-Muslims were protected under Islamic law, granted religious freedom, and often held positions of respect and leadership in government, academia, and commerce. The concept of _dhimma_ ensured their safety and prosperity, while many Christian and Jewish scholars thrived in Muslim-ruled lands, contributing to the vibrant intellectual ecosystem.
Islamic governance also created a strong social welfare system through _zakat_ , the obligatory alms-tax that funded hospitals, education, infrastructure, and aid for the poor. This ensured that economic disparity was actively mitigated, creating societies where even the most vulnerable were cared for. Women, far from being relegated to the sidelines, made notable strides in academia, law, and politics--Fatima al-Fihri, for instance, founded the world's oldest still-operating university, Al-Qarawiyyin, in the 9th century.
It is also crucial to correct a widespread historical misconception: Islam strictly forbids forced conversion, as stated unequivocally in the Quran (_" There is no compulsion in religion"_ - 2:256). The Muslim conquest of Jerusalem in 637 CE, led by Caliph Umar, was notably bloodless, a stark contrast to the brutality of the Crusades centuries later. Muslim armies, in principle and in practice, have historically rejected the pillaging, mass rape, and scorched-earth tactics commonly associated with warfare in other civilizations. This moral code, rooted in clear and strict Islamic teachings about the limits of warfare, fostered stability and security in the regions under Muslim rule, making them some of the most prosperous and socially cohesive societies in history.
The Golden Age of Muslim civilization was a period of immense artistic and architectural splendor as well, giving rise to innovations like intricate geometric design, stunning mosques, and advancements in engineering and urban planning. Crucially, this flourishing civilization acted as a bridge to Europe, transmitting knowledge through centers of learning in Spain and Sicily. **The works of Muslim scholars, translated into Latin, helped ignite the European Renaissance, setting the stage for the scientific revolution**. Yet, much of this legacy has been overlooked, distorted, or erased from mainstream narratives, leaving even many Muslims unaware of the rich intellectual and societal contributions of their civilization to the world.
* * *
### **Bridging the Gap: What America Needs**
Islamic thought, in its highest ideals, aligns with the core American values of justice, personal responsibility, and community well-being. The history of Muslim civilization shows that a society built on ethical principles, social welfare, and respect for diversity can thrive--not just for Muslims, but for all people.
At a time when Americans feel disillusioned by capitalism's excesses and the dysfunction of partisan politics, it's worth asking: _What lessons can we take from a civilization that fostered intellectual, scientific, social, and economic progress for**centuries**?_
By drawing from the Islamic model of ethical governance, structured economic justice, and community-driven responsibility, we have an opportunity to reimagine a system that prioritizes fairness, stability, and human dignity. The past offers a roadmap--not as an outdated relic, but as a source of wisdom that can be adapted to meet today's challenges. **What if, instead of dismissing Islamic thought due to decades of fearmongering, we considered how its strongest principles could help shape a more just and prosperous America?**

Balance Between Individual and Collective Rights - Unlike systems that emphasize only individual liberty or collective control, Islam calls for both personal accountability and communal well-being. 4. Compassion as a Core Value - The Quran repeatedly emphasizes rahma (compassion), making kindness and care central to interpersonal and governmental actions. 5. Structured Economic Justice - Islam prohibits exploitative financial practices (riba , usury) and mandates wealth redistribution through zakat to prevent extreme wealth gaps. 6. Ethical Governance and Rule of Law - The principle of shura (consultation) requires leaders to govern with justice, transparency, and accountability. 7. Resilience and Flexibility - Islamic jurisprudence (fiqh) allows for adaptive interpretations (ijtihad), making it highly applicable to modern needs when approached with sincerity. 8. Radical Personal Accountability - Unlike other religious or secular frameworks, Islam emphasizes direct, personal responsibility for every human being. There are no blanket pardons, no inherited sin, no saints to intercede on your behalf--each person stands accountable before their Creator for their own deeds. This profound moral structure cultivates a sense of responsibility that results in more ethical behavior at both personal and societal levels. Challenges and Misapplications 1. Historical Rigidity in Interpretation - Some interpretations of Islamic law have failed to evolve with societal changes, leading to unnecessary restrictions or stagnation. 2. Misuse in Governance - Political rulers throughout history have twisted Islamic concepts for power, contradicting Islam's true commitment to justice. 3. Gender and Social Roles - While Islam originally revolutionized women's rights, cultural traditions have sometimes imposed regressive norms in its name. 4. Sectarian and Interpretation Conflicts - Differences within Islamic schools of thought have been manipulated for division rather than constructive diversity. 5. Legalism Over Ethical Spirit - A focus on rigid rules rather than the spirit of justice and compassion has, in some cases, undermined Islam's broader moral aims. 6. Modernity and Social Justice Struggles - Islamic ethics provide a strong foundation for justice, but some institutions have been slow to apply them to modern systemic challenges like climate change, corporate power, and state violence. The Golden Age of Muslim Civilization: A Legacy of Knowledge and Justice For over a thousand years, the Islamic world was a beacon of civilization, stretching from Spain in the west to China in the east. The rapid expansion of the Islamic empire was not only a military or political feat but an unprecedented fusion of cultures, knowledge, and governance that fostered one of the most advanced societies of its time. Under the Abbasids in Baghdad, the Umayyads in Cordoba, and the Ottomans in Istanbul, the Islamic world became a crucible of intellectual achievement, where scholars of diverse backgrounds--Muslims, Christians, Jews, and others--collaborated in an environment that prized knowledge and discovery. The contributions of Muslim civilization to global progress cannot be overstated. Muslim scholars preserved and expanded upon Greek, Roman, Persian, and Indian knowledge, making groundbreaking advancements in medicine, mathematics, astronomy, and architecture. Figures such as Al-Khwarizmi (who developed algebra), Ibn Sina (whose medical texts were used in Europe for centuries), and Al-Zahrawi (a pioneer in surgery) laid the foundations for modern science. The world's first degree-granting universities emerged in the Islamic world, with institutions such as Al-Qarawiyyin in Morocco and Al-Azhar in Egypt fostering a tradition of higher learning that would later inspire the university system in Europe. The Islamic Golden Age was also a time of remarkable social coherence. Non-Muslims were protected under Islamic law, granted religious freedom, and often held positions of respect and leadership in government, academia, and commerce. The concept of dhimma ensured their safety and prosperity, while many Christian and Jewish scholars thrived in Muslim-ruled lands, contributing to the vibrant intellectual ecosystem. Islamic governance also created a strong social welfare system through zakat , the obligatory alms-tax that funded hospitals, education, infrastructure, and aid for the poor. This ensured that economic disparity was actively mitigated, creating societies where even the most vulnerable were cared for. Women, far from being relegated to the sidelines, made notable strides in academia, law, and politics--Fatima al-Fihri, for instance, founded the world's oldest still-operating university, Al-Qarawiyyin, in the 9th century. It is also crucial to correct a widespread historical misconception: Islam strictly forbids forced conversion, as stated unequivocally in the Quran (" There is no compulsion in religion" - 2:256). The Muslim conquest of Jerusalem in 637 CE, led by Caliph Umar, was notably bloodless, a stark contrast to the brutality of the Crusades centuries later. Muslim armies, in principle and in practice, have historically rejected the pillaging, mass rape, and scorched-earth tactics commonly associated with warfare in other civilizations. This moral code, rooted in clear and strict Islamic teachings about the limits of warfare, fostered stability and security in the regions under Muslim rule, making them some of the most prosperous and socially cohesive societies in history. The Golden Age of Muslim civilization was a period of immense artistic and architectural splendor as well, giving rise to innovations like intricate geometric design, stunning mosques, and advancements in engineering and urban planning. Crucially, this flourishing civilization acted as a bridge to Europe, transmitting knowledge through centers of learning in Spain and Sicily. The works of Muslim scholars, translated into Latin, helped ignite the European Renaissance, setting the stage for the scientific revolution. Yet, much of this legacy has been overlooked, distorted, or erased from mainstream narratives, leaving even many Muslims unaware of the rich intellectual and societal contributions of their civilization to the world. Bridging the Gap: What America Needs Islamic thought, in its highest ideals, aligns with the core American values of justice, personal responsibility, and community well-being. The history of Muslim civilization shows that a society built on ethical principles, social welfare, and respect for diversity can thrive--not just for Muslims, but for all people. At a time when Americans feel disillusioned by capitalism's excesses and the dysfunction of partisan politics, it's worth asking: What lessons can we take from a civilization that fostered intellectual, scientific, social, and economic progress forcenturies? By drawing from the Islamic model of ethical governance, structured economic justice, and community-driven responsibility, we have an opportunity to reimagine a system that prioritizes fairness, stability, and human dignity. The past offers a roadmap--not as an outdated relic, but as a source of wisdom that can be adapted to meet today's challenges. What if, instead of dismissing Islamic thought due to decades of fearmongering, we considered how its strongest principles could help shape a more just and prosperous America? name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines - 03/02/2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

It was another packed week of traveling the Commonwealth. This week I was fortunate to be able to spend a significant amount of time in the Shenandoah Valley, and grateful for the continued support from our elected officials, party leaders and residents.
---
| |
---

After visiting Frederick County this week, I was honored to earn the endorsement of Delegate Bill Wiley, who represents Winchester and most of Frederick County. Delegate Wiley's support will be very valuable in the northern Shenandoah Valley, and I'm honored to have him on the team.
---
| |
---

In Craig County, I'm grateful to have earned the endorsement of Supervisor Jordan Labiosa, who previously served on the New Castle Town Council and as chairman of the Craig County Republican Party. Supervisor Labiosa is a hugely influential force in Craig, and I'm happy to have him in my camp!
---
|
Stay tuned this coming week as we prepare to announce additional significant endorsements of my candidacy for Lieutenant Governor!

---
| |
---
On the road, we started this week meeting with the Central Chesapeake Republican Women's Club as they hosted other local women's clubs. Enjoyed meeting so many passionate conservatives ready to work to keep our statewide elected offices in Republican hands this year.
---
| |
---

The next day took us to the Shenandoah Valley, where we began the trip visiting the Frederick County Republican Committee and talking about the importance of the 2025 election.
---
| |
---

I was grateful for the opportunity to meet with the leadership of the College Republicans at Bridgewater College on how I can support their efforts. I was able to meet with many of the other members later in the evening.
---
| |
---
I joined a sellout crowd at Rockingham County's Lincoln-Reagan Gala that evening as a guest Rockingham Board Chair Dewie Ritche. I was able to reconnect with many supporters from my previous visits to Valley and earned the support of many more.
---
| |
---
The next day took me to Waynesboro, where I spoke with the 6th Congressional District Republican Committee - our party's leadership from across the Shenandoah Valley. The leadership of the 6th district is ready to turn out Republican voters in droves in November to carry the ticket to victory.
---
| |
---

We wrapped up this week by joining Heritage Baptist Church in Prince William County for their Sunday morning service. I was grateful for the opportunity to speak and worship with their congregation!
---
|
Don't forget that my annual St Patrick's Day Celebration is coming up in two weeks on Sunday March 16thin Springfield. [Get details and RSVP here.](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=fe50b5bf84&e=a1ea0f9c99)

---
| [RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=4bb9473ed7&e=a1ea0f9c99 "RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!")
---
|
As always, thank you for taking the time to follow along with the campaign, and I'll see you soon on the campaign trail!
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---
|
---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=d17bf178ac&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")

The USPS is a critical resource that helps millions of Americans receive life-saving medication, Social Security bills, mail-in ballots, and so much more! body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22896%2E4449941%2E37vEXX) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22896%2E4449941%2E37vEXX) **_BREAKING ALERT -> "DOGE Access to Social Security Payments Raises Alarm"_** | | []() | Since Day 1, Elon Musk has been dead-set on gutting Social Security benefits.

And now, he's putting his plan into motion - he just ILLEGALLY gained access to sensitive Treasury payment systems!

_But top Democrats have a plan to stop him._

**Hakeem Jeffries and Elizabeth Warren are teaming up to BLOCK Elon Musk 's Social Security interference!!**

[**_ADD YOUR NAME AS ONE OF 125,OOO CITIZEN CO-SPONSORS ON THIS NEW LEGISLATION >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59882?t=3&akid=22896%2E4449941%2E37vEXX) | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59882?t=4&akid=22896%2E4449941%2E37vEXX)
---
_This is EVERYTHING you need to know about Elon Musk 's plan to slash Social Security ↘↘↘_

**FIRST:** Trump appointed Musk as the leader of the fake "Department of Government Efficiency."

**SECOND:** Musk told Joe Rogan "there won't be money for Social Security" and vowed to make massive cuts to this vital benefit -- to pay for tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy.

**THIRD:** The DOGE just forced their way into sensitive Treasury systems that control $6 trillion in payments, to begin tampering with Social Security!

**NOW:** Top Democrats Hakeem Jeffries and Elizabeth Warren are coming together to stop him and safeguard our benefits - yes yes yes!!

_Please listen to Elizabeth Warren 's stunning warning ->_
[]()
[**_We 're racing to hit 125,OOO Citizen Co-Sponsors on new Democratic legislation by MIDNIGHT to prevent Elon Musk from interfering with our Social Security. Please add your name:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59882?t=5&akid=22896%2E4449941%2E37vEXX)
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59882?t=6&akid=22896%2E4449941%2E37vEXX)

My fellow Americans – this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It’s official: I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

1. **Tell folks the truth** – no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak

3. **Overhaul failing schools** – I’ll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** – we’ll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** – Tom Homan is a hero, he’ll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** – ban men in women’s sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** – you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** – we’ll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Why your support is so important right now →
body:
Americans did not elect Elon Musk.
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to donate directly to the DNC to help us build a strong Democratic Party that will fight back against Trump and his extreme billionaire allies. If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link to pitch in: [**https://democrats.org/go/March**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250302_2866_fr&refcode2=2866_22930333_H177x8&akid=2866%2E22930333%2EH177x8) Otherwise, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why your support is so important right now: Americans did not elect Elon Musk. But every day, he tries to take charge of more and more of our government — and the rest of us will pay the price. In one month, Musk has targeted multiple federal agencies, laying off thousands of employees and putting the sensitive information of millions of people at risk. Musk has targeted agencies like the IRS, Social Security, the CFPB, and more. Agencies like the CFPB not only protect consumers, but agencies like the IRS and Social Security also hold sensitive taxpayer data and pay out millions of dollars to Americans every month. Money that Americans rely on to live. And the agencies he has targeted are not a coincidence. They have all been involved in investigations into Musk and his businesses. It’s clear Elon Musk is more worried about protecting his own interests than the interests of the American people. And Trump is letting him get away with it. What’s happening right now is unconstitutional and extraordinarily dangerous. And the consequences of crippling these agencies and allowing Musk unchecked control could be disastrous. **Republicans have already proven that they won’t check Trump or Musk’s power, so we need to elect as many Democrats as possible who will. But to do that, we need your help.** Maybe you weren’t considering making a contribution to the DNC today, but we hope this message has shown you how urgent and meaningful your support is right now. So here comes the part where we ask: [**If you can, make a $3 contribution now to support the DNC’s work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250302_2866_fr&refcode2=2866_22930333_H177x8&akid=2866%2E22930333%2EH177x8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250302_2866_fr&refcode2=2866_22930333_H177x8&akid=2866%2E22930333%2EH177x8)**

It’s clear Elon Musk is more worried about protecting his own interests than the interests of the American people. And Trump is letting him get away with it. What’s happening right now is unconstitutional and extraordinarily dangerous. And the consequences of crippling these agencies and allowing Musk unchecked control could be disastrous. Republicans have already proven that they won’t check Trump or Musk’s power, so we need to elect as many Democrats as possible who will. But to do that, we need your help. Maybe you weren’t considering making a contribution to the DNC today, but we hope this message has shown you how urgent and meaningful your support is right now. So here comes the part where we ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for donating during this very important moment, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
